name: Fred Keller
subject: Thank a Veteran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress
body:
For their unwavering support and dedication to the preservation of freedom
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---

Fellow American,

Today is a special day in this nation’s history. Today we honor those who selflessly served and fought for our great nation.

We are lucky to have men and women in this country of the highest caliber who gave their lives to protect each and every American, so that we may enjoy the comfort and freedoms of being an American.

If you are a veteran, thank you. If you know a veteran, thank them.
God Bless our veterans,

Fred Keller
_(Taking the values of PA's 12th District to Congress)_

Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress
---
**Our mailing address is:**
23 North Derr Drive, Suite 2
Lewisburg, PA 17837

Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_s=b77d5f061fce4ce4ad1f5dab916f43c5&_t=NpGVtjfq40Oa3TdoIo9vqOsH60XIIr6vTt6Jjm-bjxHVm2LwPAKhvr6ciIuSzfk-LrnRTJM6aDsrTFqONbWM27KnhNDxmgwmUcoOdIDGMs9nxYmuYy7Ged2eVvD_mz4Rq8yrJKNUUECrG2MNoBGdblznO7qYbyIzKfPhS8ETHlM%3D)

body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cee0da863bc040aeb0b53c5a47a7b6bb&_e=kIxVryMBztJ_MXZ-cQNJZtGCWagnfk60_gXza7F7TV5ccfCnfAxHUnZ0qUx7hYyP180xehBCgBdtcp2UKO1Rj9ZQUAw8PsiKAXhNvIbnXZUjKtFzzoFjwEHUaC1C02mrV8QwqAzO4kOjK6nl3QBfm0lbR1m6MuVrBIiZY0n6AOUivPgN0vCpnDwjgudkgZMsic5ccaVIuYelvTyRdOQC6ypqbkL438_RedqrhGxH_MgAhJY5S-Y0lU-1w9DEgXksyTFDt-3oP-UMpJdYE9nzPfyXH1ukBOqAlqw9GqZuXGUTv31q3tjdqB89W741Dk_fpgHP9kga61d9WLMO1kZlYuhm-RAYK2vEokfNe8m5dTbgC-xAx889hnEDQDEp9Ih2h0Tj-WIXEpwBiHcZfvnxtqh-4ddrShsjwPszPPMQZxOp_pajUxjFdZ-ctEVw_rPEZ4mgSPIZSDlCgnJfOSejwl-yGd6G7Zb8jR71fM3f-AM%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cee0da863bc040aeb0b53c5a47a7b6bb&_e=kIxVryMBztJ_MXZ-cQNJZtGCWagnfk60_gXza7F7TV5ccfCnfAxHUnZ0qUx7hYyP180xehBCgBdtcp2UKO1Rj9ZQUAw8PsiKAXhNvIbnXZUjKtFzzoFjwEHUaC1C02mrV8QwqAzO4kOjK6nl3QBfm0lbR1m6MuVrBIiZY0n6AOUivPgN0vCpnDwjgudkgZMsic5ccaVIuYelvTyRdOQC6ypqbkL438_RedqrhGxH_MgAhJY5S-Y0lU-1w9DEgXksyTFDt-3oP-UMpJdYE9nzPdOk0OAvSOzLbYg4Ixoo18xXUwgOKVVAgad0OiGbfQGfHu0mrNa97K4y-rIUHvFEEmMnXwLjyV48xQvhj-CABZqTdBSYPk9kPk9J4v4_kB-TtngSWKTAH4U0Ft0MFaaBrag2GH6mxWxxNRT4RbTRvPFkNNYMkAKqh9jTH1fO7SlO47T_e2xGYn8xQ_Ww8idV_zAVhIo-EPp5zxFpgtofWnE%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cee0da863bc040aeb0b53c5a47a7b6bb&_e=kIxVryMBztJ_MXZ-cQNJZtGCWagnfk60_gXza7F7TV5ccfCnfAxHUnZ0qUx7hYyP180xehBCgBdtcp2UKO1Rj9ZQUAw8PsiKAXhNvIbnXZUjKtFzzoFjwEHUaC1C02mrV8QwqAzO4kOjK6nl3QBfm0lbR1m6MuVrBIiZY0n6AOUivPgN0vCpnDwjgudkgZMsic5ccaVIuYelvTyRdOQC6ypqbkL438_RedqrhGxH_MgAhJY5S-Y0lU-1w9DEgXksyTFDt-3oP-UMpJdYE9nzPQIPMBod70pgRJ_nYv-gkjK_KAbNE78p1_voFkom9wKz8U1u2Czs9ULDRa3wNLxrOi1y9FYoBuS6A1386eG4-FmqC-9K4grYQ36FNKSKvkuh6HCa2VxsmFGfwcXEM2pOod4TNH---pZeri0EHlnATd7nTDNx_nbrzEWXn-_zrQFU9O3b0Lx8SlbzN3VBQil8V6grcp5p92sf92jUJVOZpBE%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cee0da863bc040aeb0b53c5a47a7b6bb&_e=kIxVryMBztJ_MXZ-cQNJZtGCWagnfk60_gXza7F7TV5ccfCnfAxHUnZ0qUx7hYyP180xehBCgBdtcp2UKO1Rj9ZQUAw8PsiKAXhNvIbnXZUjKtFzzoFjwEHUaC1C02mrV8QwqAzO4kOjK6nl3QBfm0lbR1m6MuVrBIiZY0n6AOUivPgN0vCpnDwjgudkgZMsic5ccaVIuYelvTyRdOQC6ypqbkL438_RedqrhGxH_MgAhJY5S-Y0lU-1w9DEgXksyTFDt-3oP-UMpJdYE9nzPceG6SSP8uNgqZmg1DvkYkxWK22U2ZLxzJBGmreJXp6J7X2X4KCQJVtaLuFq2Qctc5ea4QdLTo9DqlgnXH_F3JdwoxJWp3eZ2mTYzp1fLDf70VwrMjkyB2lhN9s03kk_3IMF9xxEVdrx52NQ9eZcXH3A-_fPzzqcY2fRmJYfHzTggvpQK9qNOYcKfPtVVWShHldZW1bQoWvA0oyWfFIzMhw%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cee0da863bc040aeb0b53c5a47a7b6bb&_e=kIxVryMBztJ_MXZ-cQNJZtGCWagnfk60_gXza7F7TV5ccfCnfAxHUnZ0qUx7hYyP180xehBCgBdtcp2UKO1Rj9ZQUAw8PsiKAXhNvIbnXZUjKtFzzoFjwEHUaC1C02mrV8QwqAzO4kOjK6nl3QBfm0lbR1m6MuVrBIiZY0n6AOUivPgN0vCpnDwjgudkgZMsic5ccaVIuYelvTyRdOQC6ypqbkL438_RedqrhGxH_MgAhJY5S-Y0lU-1w9DEgXksyTFDt-3oP-UMpJdYE9nzPQhgCupJQdU5fW-N-H4mkQ0ayLv4wVwp89Ls59vz9TPOQC0CoUXdy1ium7volafnh0uW3SqkB48j1GWe8Z-8yjhFdF81JsDS0dNtVqIH_vwrne69fH1JmJr9EHvx531AoJ5jl-_Qw--OTfvoWGauWZKhPGNFFJmMgzpv-0RdtgS4t5LY0xDCwO4gzdNDUE8Vaawd9UsYI0EG3zh9UR5AaxM%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=cee0da863bc040aeb0b53c5a47a7b6bb&_e=kIxVryMBztJ_MXZ-cQNJZtGCWagnfk60_gXza7F7TV5ccfCnfAxHUnZ0qUx7hYyP180xehBCgBdtcp2UKO1Rj9ZQUAw8PsiKAXhNvIbnXZUjKtFzzoFjwEHUaC1C02mrV8QwqAzO4kOjK6nl3QBfm0lbR1m6MuVrBIiZY0n6AOUivPgN0vCpnDwjgudkgZMsic5ccaVIuYelvTyRdOQC6ypqbkL438_RedqrhGxH_MgAhJY5S-Y0lU-1w9DEgXksyTFDt-3oP-UMpJdYE9nzPbjiYeIsklskUCkXLJjRqqyi8h2ggdDH41UbiovtADExE-I5_H0B7BDUIzNpZ-yc4x0dCn-HxiVgWKEJWwguYLu2JihnWygsu6mF2nU8ta1BcHsk45De_LoTZOM-GhhHWV0NcY_XmY1M91LIIGRA_6KaTZJp16it6938gMNuLfSD-gAf-2HtfGPHeZQCR4WrjtsWePrmnbSHaFKU6duCorI%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

clean_body: I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | Fellow patriot, Not too long ago, Latinos were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Latino,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, a proud Latina Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: A Veterans Day note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
Rod Dorilas for Congress Today, we commemorate the heroism, bravery, and
sacrifice of our nation's veterans

No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may unsubscribe here
<http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=953241bf68e8496ea426b6fdd213f42a&_t=tEAweNHggAhwTYIokAh84-8vU5tm-0rxVpKsC_0GVsFsC46-j-egrdjyAG9Q-lBnHo32P0Sl8_g_B5V4nXqzpS6f8RVJr9ySHi-FehhwY-7Lphjbe8sNvEnC4g67LXST9s_laaoLk5GF0a21K9ti6ab0X2nSwcJCVcpwCw2y-1k%3D>
.

Fellow American,

Today, we commemorate the heroism, bravery, and sacrifice of our nation's
veterans. Veterans are selfless in their sacrifice and give their lives so
everyday Americans can be free. So future generations can grow to see the
fruits of our labor. So our rights can be protected and prolonged. So they can
grow up to live in our free nation we know, love, and proudly defend.

I'm proud to have served in our nation's military. At the age of 17, I joined
the Navy and served our country. These were incredible years. It was an honor
to defend this nation, and I was blessed to have fought alongside my fellow men
and women in service.

We are currently suffering a crisis of leadership in Congress, which, I
believe, is a direct result of having the lowest veteran representation in
Congress since World War II. Veterans like myself running to restore the
principle of service to public service is the solution.

In Congress, I will advocate for veteran issues. I will improve our veteran
communities' access and quality of healthcare. I live by the code that we never
leave a man behind, which doesn't stop when no longer serving on active duty.
Whether you're a veteran in Florida's twenty-first congressional district or
across the country, I will fight for you. I will defend your rights. I will
serve you because your needs matter. God bless our veterans; God bless Florida,
God bless these United States.

Rod Dorilas
Republican for Congress, FL-21

ABOUT ROD

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His
father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on
to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the
importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a
Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the
USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for
planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the
Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse
University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in
President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While
serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American
families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and
community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and
perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in
South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country
from the Radical Left.

Logo

** Happy Veterans Day
------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you to everyone who is or has served and the families that support them. I’m proud to be a part of two impactful groups that support our veterans. I’d be honored if you’d consider supporting them.
* The Yellow Ribbon Fund (https://yellowribbonfund.org?mc_cid=48049a8f2b&mc_eid=UNIQID) which supports not only veterans, but also their caregivers through their recoveries.

* The Independence Fund (https://independencefund.org?mc_cid=48049a8f2b&mc_eid=UNIQID) which provides tracked wheel chairs to veterans with mobility issues to give them their independence back.

** Stories I’m reading...
------------------------------------------------------------

DOJ announces indictment against alleged scam PAC operators uncovered (https://t.co/kWpockgdz3?amp=1&mc_cid=48049a8f2b&mc_eid=UNIQID) — via CNN

These Scam PACs prey on the kindness and generosity of elderly donors to enrich themselves —glad to see them getting their due.

Well, we have some news for the GOP: **Nevadans see right through their power-hungry charade.**

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The Battle Isn't Over
body:
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d9dfc8b0235747dc8004ae827e6421c3&_e=FQRWKqcI0CLLtl9KbyDeLxKVnp9Ewzr29taXSzA3M_Ehg-VjCLTd1pvT8bNWhFtL5lRJkk5G-6_kpsxNeJ7XbQb_iSh3DwKTF5kEdHw0gHR5gxh35WcukosqzgyVRg0xdkN7s_jEDBJ-5QInjeV0jK2q6IFimUoCWC-XWMaqAF761qvNv1BfDGPJ_jzE_PERKAqhOpVULafvMx6qto2X1JSczgXN35k5aUBTJ0a2CmnX35CfRSUc67toO2RIYiBGendmHzxgYe47WHahSaICzQXdV-BgyxL34lSpxOWjWNFd21b1ZJeu5C0YpOCO-YgdcGrfHDlMi6J9eu4EAhhPuZl9R8QqODCpjikCejKC3o2rGWee52dM0WvHUE2c5FrPhd4QUAyeqZqcg8JE-v_Zqg%3D%3D)
Friend --
With an all-out assault on our liberties taking place daily, Florida needs someone on the front lines who is willing to get in the fight. That's why I need your help to win re-election as Governor of Florida.
We cannot rest a single day, or we risk yielding our freedom to Democrats who seek to impose government mandates far beyond anything we've seen before. COVID was only the beginning. Without strong fighters in the ring, the left will push the envelope even further.
**[JOIN ME IN MY FIGHT TO SECURE FLORIDA'S FUTURE](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d9dfc8b0235747dc8004ae827e6421c3&_e=FQRWKqcI0CLLtl9KbyDeLxKVnp9Ewzr29taXSzA3M_Ehg-VjCLTd1pvT8bNWhFtL5lRJkk5G-6_kpsxNeJ7XbQb_iSh3DwKTF5kEdHw0gHR5gxh35WcukosqzgyVRg0xdkN7s_jEDBJ-5QInjeV0jK2q6IFimUoCWC-XWMaqAF4n24V2qVzs6xrAvBCT09jclej8SqGgr-DQQnkFYLEPmVABT3_734IOnbs_Asak8eyCgNOYMCqPCc3J_jEjBVtmhSF5NFpK7aIXonSEFlM9y43ZsgqvblZAiaS5XOawgNwcoXPGudok6EiEwVPUBSd8GOXXFsaGRYB8LhbwBOXTwsfRJ7vLVRD0sh37PRQxTDW6Lhi9X4WR-8Wqy0WrD9hiNu8uPi0ekAhkDhyCiDOUwA%3D%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/the-battle-isnt-over-ren")**
It's been my honor to stand up for Floridians in my time as Governor. I wake up every single day knowing what's on the line. My mission is to keep Florida free, and I'm proud to say we've done that. But Democrats never take a day off. They are constantly looking for ways to inject the government into our lives to gain more control over us.
I can guarantee you this: their attempts at government overreach will run into a brick wall as long as I'm Governor.
**[EXPRESS DONATE $36.50 NOW>>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d9dfc8b0235747dc8004ae827e6421c3&_e=FQRWKqcI0CLLtl9KbyDeLxKVnp9Ewzr29taXSzA3M_Ehg-VjCLTd1pvT8bNWhFtL5lRJkk5G-6_kpsxNeJ7XbQb_iSh3DwKTF5kEdHw0gHR5gxh35WcukosqzgyVRg0xdkN7s_jEDBJ-5QInjeV0jK2q6IFimUoCWC-XWMaqAF5Kl75dChdOAurzi8BoM6BITQpeTuBVggWSmgcVq9onDRnOFZmyvzi8FNq4_EoSIj5QoZ1h2Ll2fQUCLnAMHZePkBKRnJ43d8Yb5o3SKtMbHd48qIEH0ovV4TByllAQuUCbH1j7sFuHmopaxZQPV0iSJ6eFxmeTZQYeptsshyz1z7TC67FSMiNtbVsuN5kWUeRR-X6OLmSnB7IUo0-2aY-XDgqJwfhuwhgFB7od1vdhpA%3D%3D "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/the-battle-isnt-over-ren")**
[**EXPRESS DONATE $365 NOW >>>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d9dfc8b0235747dc8004ae827e6421c3&_e=FQRWKqcI0CLLtl9KbyDeLxKVnp9Ewzr29taXSzA3M_Ehg-VjCLTd1pvT8bNWhFtL5lRJkk5G-6_kpsxNeJ7XbQb_iSh3DwKTF5kEdHw0gHR5gxh35WcukosqzgyVRg0xdkN7s_jEDBJ-5QInjeV0jK2q6IFimUoCWC-XWMaqAF5ddNTNbAkQzCHVWnIDme__TQ6Cs_qhNf_6xmqznCBHv_6eCBJepyHFk7r2T35ZBrRf3kz0-CK2ZwgKLE0ajfvp25sj82So6zb21wWClchpCUhcfsUxZ9ial0HvA57WwuYV0EHHhkUEN2RwI39_aUvmSUrdzHpuacxGg8yU0cERR5fiYxyAW3e2tussi0qwm8TAaxlCHHdykmFu_nPIyXQQEnyChWnjT4bC8U-Z1BuGgQ%3D%3D)
We have 365 days until we hold an election that will define the trajectory of our state. Do we want Florida to continue serving as the envy of America, or do we want to fall into the hands of Democrats injecting government into every aspect of our lives?
Now is not the time to get comfortable and rest on our laurels. Floridians deserve a fighter who will have their back and take on Democrats, corporate media, Big Tech, and everyone else who wants to strip away their rights. I have proven that I have the courage to lead.
**[If you want to be on the side of freedom, would you consider chipping in $36.50, or $365 to help me in this ensuing fight?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d9dfc8b0235747dc8004ae827e6421c3&_e=FQRWKqcI0CLLtl9KbyDeLxKVnp9Ewzr29taXSzA3M_Ehg-VjCLTd1pvT8bNWhFtL5lRJkk5G-6_kpsxNeJ7XbQb_iSh3DwKTF5kEdHw0gHR5gxh35WcukosqzgyVRg0xdkN7s_jEDBJ-5QInjeV0jK2q6IFimUoCWC-XWMaqAF6QL8s-GdkykqVk50uhutzW8NOxRAi-5nL_of42Hs5_pMemAk6IST2JoizW9Y-nkpE4mbp752IihZLYKFBZV94UA5itfvmLFY7lYcBiqgIpiMhWWEqPgtnnBj756bZ2R3dvGRaX9abnZYf07rXgvJp_Cja1L_kCLgJchucq0VX4CzEXWO3fIivmy7bjzxykdvZgOyDpF4cerrsvL0oA2bqkmxWpQmWenb7Cn2Op-7c8CQ%3D%3D)**
Together, we will continue to make Florida THE best state in the nation.
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

clean_body: Friend -- With an all-out assault on our liberties taking place daily, Florida needs someone on the front lines who is willing to get in the fight. That's why I need your help to win re-election as Governor of Florida. We cannot rest a single day, or we risk yielding our freedom to Democrats who seek to impose government mandates far beyond anything we've seen before. COVID was only the beginning. Without strong fighters in the ring, the left will push the envelope even further. "" It's been my honor to stand up for Floridians in my time as Governor. I wake up every single day knowing what's on the line. My mission is to keep Florida free, and I'm proud to say we've done that. But Democrats never take a day off. They are constantly looking for ways to inject the government into our lives to gain more control over us. I can guarantee you this: their attempts at government overreach will run into a brick wall as long as I'm Governor. "" We have 365 days until we hold an election that will define the trajectory of our state. Do we want Florida to continue serving as the envy of America, or do we want to fall into the hands of Democrats injecting government into every aspect of our lives? Now is not the time to get comfortable and rest on our laurels. Floridians deserve a fighter who will have their back and take on Democrats, corporate media, Big Tech, and everyone else who wants to strip away their rights. I have proven that I have the courage to lead. Together, we will continue to make Florida THE best state in the nation. Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "DONATE NOW" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 610 S. Boulevard, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Thank you for protecting our freedoms!
body:
[](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cdklyjd-yddjllujiu-r/) Patriot,Today is Veterans Day, a special day devoted to honoring the brave men and women who served in our nation's military.I join all Americans today when I say that I am so grateful for everything our veterans have done for our great nation! Here in Wisconsin, over 7% of our adult population are veterans. Needless to say, many Wisconsinites have a friend or family member who has made sacrifices for our nation!Throughout their service, the men and women in our nation's great military have to make difficult sacrifices, like being separated from their loved ones for days or months at a time. [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cdklyjd-yddjllujiu-j/) I hope you will join me in sharing a heartfelt **THANK YOU** to our veterans and their families for their commitment to freedom and their sacrifices made along the way.Thank you,
Glenn [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cdklyjd-yddjllujiu-t/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress

name: Congressman Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Honoring Our Veterans Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
PeterI join all Americans and Wisconsinites today in gratitude for everything our veterans have done for this great nation.From deployments and months away from their families, to uprooting and relocating, to those who have made the ultimate sacrifice, **the men and women of our armed forces truly put our nation's interests ahead of their own.** For 27 years in our country's Army Reserve, I have had the good fortune to meet and work with so many of our country's heroes, and I hope you join with me today to honor their service and their sacrifice. In Congress, I am honored to offer my wholehearted service to our veterans with my voice and my vote.To all our nation's veterans: **THANK YOU.** I will never stop fighting for you and all you do for us. Thank you,Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdkldht-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdkldht-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdkldht-ahkdjtlkr-j/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdkldht-ahkdjtlkr-t/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Celebrating Our Veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, today we honor and thank all veterans past and present for their service to this country.
Hi Peter,**I want to sincerely thank each and every one of our veterans. They have risked their lives to keep us safe and serve our country. We are forever grateful for their service and indebted to them for their sacrifices.** Please take time today to thank all of the servicemen and women you know. Unfortunately, our veterans oftentimes don't receive the appreciation and respect they deserve.I will always remember, honor, and support our veterans. The well-being of our nation's veterans is a top priority for me in Congress.**To all veterans across southeast Wisconsin and the United States, thank you!** Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse is counting on you, Peter
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58746425:6An4RX2N5:m:1:3253819041:20E2D732DD97AFA7FEB8BEA965D79468:r)
---
Peter,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this, Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58746425:6An4RX2N5:m:1:3253819041:20E2D732DD97AFA7FEB8BEA965D79468:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58746425:6An4RX2N5:m:1:3253819041:20E2D732DD97AFA7FEB8BEA965D79468:r)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58746425:6An4RX2N5:m:1:3253819041:20E2D732DD97AFA7FEB8BEA965D79468:r)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58746425:6An4RX2N5:m:1:3253819041:20E2D732DD97AFA7FEB8BEA965D79468:r)

name: PACT - Parents Against Critical Theory
subject: DEFEATED BY PARENTS: Critical Race Theory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
The Department of Justice (DOJ) is coming after us.

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58748143:JKo_gX2NZ:m:1:3298722022:4E03C20F711DC93E8A9C1F6045642C4B:r)
---
Peter, **_[Glenn Youngkin's victory is PROOF that we are WINNING the fight against Critical Race Theory.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58748143:JKo_gX2NZ:m:1:3298722022:4E03C20F711DC93E8A9C1F6045642C4B:r) _** In the final weeks of his campaign, Youngkin made the race for Governor of Virginia about ONE THING: our children and their schools. Youngkin WON because he stood up to the teachers unions who are pushing Critical Race Theory and other progressive garbage on our kids. WE started that conversation, Peter. Without YOU and YOUR support, the race wouldn't have been focused on Critical Race Theory and Glenn Youngkin might have lost. This is just the first of MANY victories - please continue supporting Parents Against Critical Theory so we can "Loudonize" other parts of the country. [**_Please CONTRIBUTE NOW to help Parents Against Critical Theory expand the fight against Critical Race Theory from Virginia to EVERY state in the Nation. >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58748143:JKo_gX2NZ:m:1:3298722022:4E03C20F711DC93E8A9C1F6045642C4B:r) Parents Against Critical Theory was formed in Loudoun County, otherwise known as Ground Zero in the fight against Critical Race Theory. We educated parents on the dangers of Critical Race Theory, organized protests against the school board, and ultimately we've dealt a MAJOR BLOW to CRT in Loudoun County and the Commonwealth of Virginia. We call this process "to Loudounize." . [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58748143:JKo_gX2NZ:m:1:3298722022:4E03C20F711DC93E8A9C1F6045642C4B:r)
When parents are educated, equipped, and rallied to FIGHT BACK against Critical Race Theory in their local communities, that's "Loudounizing" In Loudoun County, we've built a framework to keep Critical Race Theory OUT of our children's schools. If you're interested in "Loudonizing" your community, please consider supporting Parents Against Critical Race Theory HERE:
[**SUPPORT PARENTS AGAINST CRITICAL THEORY
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58748143:JKo_gX2NZ:m:1:3298722022:4E03C20F711DC93E8A9C1F6045642C4B:r) Thank you again for your support! WE, Virginia parents, carried Glenn Youngkin to victory. Let's never forget the power parents have when we stand together in defense of our children. Sincerely, Parents Against Critical Theory | Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdhggrcc3f53qpjv1ojrmisuru2mlprrua641un0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti62o72c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zg72noe4vhvpkcc17rpe5n0v7t38j52cfpgo8pfg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti62o72c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjfub1reumbkk9hlktlk75jqud9pvtpki0mi3600_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti62o72c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: American Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8094%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bxVFgK%2bOcQl1EjIknffSNQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17368%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ByYBH%2fgyC5a%2fA0D4SgJPGA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17369%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zMcbkCkBSgsZs4%2fUExNunQ&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17360%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8rgVZvOp3SiF7t74UnYOJA&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8094%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bxVFgK%2bOcQl1EjIknffSNQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8094%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bxVFgK%2bOcQl1EjIknffSNQ&sysid=1)

Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ The Federalist Papers ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of “The Federalist Papers” today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Vernon Jones for Governor
subject: We're Taking Back Georgia!

body:
This Week On The Campaign Trail
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Vernon Jones for Georgia \- November 11th, 2021 -
---
| | |
---|---
|

Traveling Across Georgia

Last Saturday I went to Ellijay, GA for the 515: Power of Five event, featuring Pickens, Gilmer, Fannin, Union, and Towns counties. It was an honor to be among these Patriots who are working hard to save this state. The event & turnout was incredible. Thank you to the owners of White Path Creek Farms for hosting this event.

I also made stops at the Gwinnett Republican Women's Meeting and Habersham County GOP Meeting.

As always it was so wonderful to meet so many great Georgian Patriots!

|
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|

Another RINO Endorses Kemp

Georgia's Attorney General, Chris Carr, has endorsed Brian Kemp. AG Carr's endorsement of Kemp shows that Kemp does not have and never had any plans for an audit of the 2020 election results. AG Carr wrote an Amicus brief opposing the Texas election lawsuit last year.

The will of the people always comes first, and when I am governor, the People will be back in power.

Take Action:
The Georgia Constitution allows for governors to add subjects to special sessions before the session begins. I've been calling on Governor Kemp to amend his agenda for the Special Session that started on Nov. 3 to add an independent forensic audit of all 159 counties. This still has not happened. I ask you to join me. Please call the Governor's office and let him know you support this. 404.656.1776
I am calling on the members of the Georgia General Assembly to introduce legislation that would require a forensic audit of all 159 counties during the current Special Session. These legislatures have endorsed Kemp. Check and see if your legislature is listed. If they are, contact them and let them know you want them to support the audits. [See If Your Legislature Endorsed Kemp](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H5QpI2xJSEFO5JDvs5fXGdA2cFe6gzbdUTisHhmQt2VV0eDRN6gNiyP-Sr2qD4KO-Dv17h1Ix4Zh_6Lhx6cxe2PxzHqc_PPppCqmiSmBCxWi_Wy8eR4ijgUMkI9W88Plgy0DbBYTdYkShlG_Qic86JQQONk7clTr6tZB3VmKn1UT9zG_JHuIJ-MHZqQOr12rCk2sqh-BcOsEzPEBLWgOxKRedruf0POBIXjQoAah4OvhTGKD9rFlAgzmdLlnq-OsGoQv_q2FmKE=&c=rjfZCzjGtcZTyDFBXJWzo2ZK1-0N-jy3g78t8wLU8wOd6WkoZooU1Q==&ch=qB82VZVvpjevyb1-rtoMkknQgOEm5b-GFdwf53vrnDurwt8if1vvUQ==)

In the News
[Vernon Jones on "The Story with Martha MacCallum" - Dems given wake-up call by dismal election results](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H5QpI2xJSEFO5JDvs5fXGdA2cFe6gzbdUTisHhmQt2VV0eDRN6gNi4yn13G6dn14gLky6XWY3-KvBEboHfK5HLX-75WtAnCDKSpeEN8UbWLLexOQJn8PilYzk0cwqN7fyzUKY81ovghlVEX5yrk004qMXbIl4F-1Egp19WJRefoFgAJ0QrU1nvlZFQR1dwZo&c=rjfZCzjGtcZTyDFBXJWzo2ZK1-0N-jy3g78t8wLU8wOd6WkoZooU1Q==&ch=qB82VZVvpjevyb1-rtoMkknQgOEm5b-GFdwf53vrnDurwt8if1vvUQ==)
[Vernon Jones: Revolt coming from Americans shows Biden's failures](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H5QpI2xJSEFO5JDvs5fXGdA2cFe6gzbdUTisHhmQt2VV0eDRN6gNi4yn13G6dn14CM54U6iv0CsHXGOwG0pV__lv-hXBLuUFgIJLzgOZtgFxsxarJ3G9LzRHKuQrNPEw412e4AJoYEMuzx7fKhAMyUP0aRcQAmvaR5C4iOd19uTd0n39UfHvCw==&c=rjfZCzjGtcZTyDFBXJWzo2ZK1-0N-jy3g78t8wLU8wOd6WkoZooU1Q==&ch=qB82VZVvpjevyb1-rtoMkknQgOEm5b-GFdwf53vrnDurwt8if1vvUQ==)
---
Volunteer Opportunities
The Vernon Jones for Governor campaign is putting together county leadership teams and is recruiting volunteers to join the movement. If you would like to be part of your county's leadership team or are interested in volunteering, please email teamjones@jonesforgeorgia.com or call 404-459-4556.
Thank you to all the hard-working Patriots who have already signed up to volunteer!
---
| |
---|---
|

Fellow Patriots,

We have made incredible progress, but there is still much to come! You may have seen recently that 13 Republicans in the US House of Representatives voted for Biden's harmful infrastructure bill and ultimately bailed out Nancy Pelosi. Unfortunately, the Kemp administration in Georgia is no different from those sell-out Republicans.

I am running for governor of Georgia not just as a Republican, but as your friend. I know the (R) next to a name doesn't mean much these days. That is why I am planning to be the most accessible Governor the state of Georgia has ever had.

I want you to join me and Take Georgia Back.

Your friend,

Vernon Jones
Candidate for Governor
Meet Vernon Jones
Our campaign is fueled by grassroots support! Check out the opportunities below to meet Vernon Jones and support the Take Georgia Back movement! Next Stops:

subject: Let's deliver BIG WINS, Peter?

---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58746503:6c6nN_2FN:m:1:3253819041:FF0841A0F0B906D7A2CC57EEDCE1024D:r "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58746503:6c6nN_2FN:m:1:3253819041:FF0841A0F0B906D7A2CC57EEDCE1024D:r)
---

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again._ That's made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **_

That's why I am hoping you will _**[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58746503:6c6nN_2FN:m:1:3253819041:FF0841A0F0B906D7A2CC57EEDCE1024D:r "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First
conservatives.")**_ The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---

---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,

Mike Pompeo

I need your help if we are going to _**WIN BIG**_ for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

name: Lombardo for Nevada
subject: We need you
body:
Steve Sisolak and Nevada’s self-described Democratic Socialists have gone completely unchecked for far too long and it’s up to us to take back our state.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nMlV4TotVV3HTZNkildV7ddv-Mrj4I8zgIP-3NrQNbT9HnQQdcSHAFTEGOBtJvB3GiYJbkILzGUnIksBr3adqjNXppdozubYQ-BFg1q6mF6tEbXCjpMNSsLiqAckzDEK4WMDCveQJBrbh3UVofvqu0pm1mA4G0TNUYKDvEOFpxKUojmRWeDdVWNONgFArXHUTsx3B1dOjuQ=&c=_ec9HSUCdzAK2Wxt3egbOD4w5_wLMF2ddDyjlqw0I5dyh5pgJDGWjA==&ch=sVf-DvNZYCduFxo2VRHq-XdBVNOzqEy_8ehAcgohIHIZLIiB5luaFg==)
---
|
---
| | Peter,
Steve Sisolak and Nevada's self-described Democratic Socialists have gone completely unchecked for far too long and it's up to us to TAKE BACK OUR STATE.
Under dangerous Democratic single-party rule, the Nevada state government has shifted to the radical-left. And right now, we're stuck living with the consequences of their extreme agenda. Special favors for their donors, total control over our elections, and thanks to the out-of-control Democrats, even releasing criminals has become the norm.
In case you haven't seen, I'm launching a campaign to stop them and to TAKE BACK NEVADA in order to save the communities that I've served for over three decades in law enforcement.
My team and I need you in this fight - [will you support this campaign for Governor to save our state from Sisolak and the far-left?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nMlV4TotVV3HTZNkildV7ddv-Mrj4I8zgIP-3NrQNbT9HnQQdcSHAFTEGOBtJvB3GiYJbkILzGUnIksBr3adqjNXppdozubYQ-BFg1q6mF6tEbXCjpMNSsLiqAckzDEK4WMDCveQJBrbh3UVofvqu0pm1mA4G0TNUYKDvEOFpxKUojmRWeDdVWNONgFArXHUTsx3B1dOjuQ=&c=_ec9HSUCdzAK2Wxt3egbOD4w5_wLMF2ddDyjlqw0I5dyh5pgJDGWjA==&ch=sVf-DvNZYCduFxo2VRHq-XdBVNOzqEy_8ehAcgohIHIZLIiB5luaFg==)
I understand what makes our communities great and I've fought to keep them safe my entire career.
As your Governor, I'll make sure your rights, your safety, and your way of life are my priority!
That means putting in check the Democrats who strive to control our elections, target our rights... and even Defund our Police.
But I can't take on this fight alone - I need invested Americans by my side joining me in the mission to Take Back Nevada! Can I count on you?

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa Leftists Arrested
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, bec
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcmljfnbpaq9jrb945p471e1mk8ke6kniuipiv18_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd7okgs4ggi65ciosbjoh6nnao2uh2r360f6s2vg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zenn73pmkq97ogss577kaohcvijfis205kh6rscg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znh6c9oqgdjdj6p6dkar4ppl9jj7ef9buun666e8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsqi73cio5s2d0l54birftt39aaa76inrcelfh0o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqf1jsigl51ieltucq472cvjl7qh7slh49l4spjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs) | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z721f42ul68b941h3rnmr4koih1p5ivfmbjq9k40_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z98p7cfq1ff2f6kfb618r5io8cvs2knieqjvoa78_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhshca6bg0lu9ur5bcdpcs5rkugopseqgl93kbsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlpu512o18lvjvd6k6hovv4ei541qj01tbkvh928_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs)**

[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2b2q06pcr9mea3r08csppdeujbhh1un4sficdl0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cti61ob2chh2bs)

Peter,

I want to talk to you about our friend, [_**Abigail Spanberger.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/oLNDLysjQRzKnAIPIrSq7GaUTdexF5WgipMRQ7iqxIw=/_rpBu-slcB2CTVuLv05I5tl6mGrmgH-hqTzOUTTtp3U=) Abigail is a former CIA analyst in one of the toughest battleground districts in America, VA-07.

As a freshman member of Congress last year, Abigail was part of a small group of leaders who galvanized the House to begin the first round of impeachment proceedings against Donald Trump. She is a leader of strength and honor, and for that reason, the MAGA crazies are out in full force to vote her out.

We cannot let them do that. [_**We must re-elect Abigail Spanberger in VA-07!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/oLNDLysjQRzKnAIPIrSq7GaUTdexF5WgipMRQ7iqxIw=/_rpBu-slcB2CTVuLv05I5tl6mGrmgH-hqTzOUTTtp3U=)

[**_Will you split a donation between Taking the Hill PAC and Abigail 's campaign right now? Your early support is THE MOST IMPORTANT SUPPORT because it can be used to reach more voters, recruit more volunteers, and deliver more votes on Election Day._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oLNDLysjQRzKnAIPIrSq7GaUTdexF5WgipMRQ7iqxIw=/_rpBu-slcB2CTVuLv05I5tl6mGrmgH-hqTzOUTTtp3U=)

We know that Abigail's opponents will pull every dirty trick in the book to try to tear her down. But Abigail is tough. [_**And when you chip in to support her, together, we will have her back.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/oLNDLysjQRzKnAIPIrSq7GaUTdexF5WgipMRQ7iqxIw=/_rpBu-slcB2CTVuLv05I5tl6mGrmgH-hqTzOUTTtp3U=)

[_**Help Abigail win**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/oLNDLysjQRzKnAIPIrSq7GaUTdexF5WgipMRQ7iqxIw=/_rpBu-slcB2CTVuLv05I5tl6mGrmgH-hqTzOUTTtp3U=) and let's hold the House for honor, decency, and integrity. [_**Click here to split a donation today!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/oLNDLysjQRzKnAIPIrSq7GaUTdexF5WgipMRQ7iqxIw=/_rpBu-slcB2CTVuLv05I5tl6mGrmgH-hqTzOUTTtp3U=)

Yours in service,
Roger

_Roger Misso_
_Executive Director_
_Taking the Hill
[@RogerMissoCNY](https://act.myngp.com/el/oLNDLysjQRzKnAIPIrSq7GaUTdexF5WgipMRQ7iqxIw=/1Yzz4w9UYTIUMiag4OrX0-XmzkYIKA7qvPo4nI_wkwo=)_

name: Warren Farrell
subject: How to solve the boy crisis in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emergent Order Foundation
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749287:JKZ3T_2KN:m:1:3298722022:D05C3E0C27250F66A69CDF20B07F330F:r)

Dear Peter,

I am writing to call your attention to a global boy crisis, its primary cause, and the most important solution.

Globally, the boy crisis resides where dads do not reside. In the U.S. alone, dad-deprivation is the primary cause of boys experiencing a...:
* **Crisis of Education.** Boys are now only half as likely as girls to graduate from college. (Think of the implications for your daughter's selection of a husband; for U.S. national security...)

* **Crisis of Mental Health.** Boys in their twenties are five times as likely as girls to commit suicide. Dad-deprivation is the biggest predictor of suicide. Dad-deprived boys account for about 85% of mass shooters, prisoners, and the male ISIS recruits.

* **Crisis of Physical Health.** Boys' obesity is increasing; male life expectancy is decreasing--for three consecutive years.

* **Crisis of Social Health and Emotional Intelligence.** Dad-deprivation is twice as likely to lead to ADHD, as well as to bullying; and addiction to video games, to porn, and to a lack of empathy...

* **Crisis of Economic Success.** Dad-deprived boys are much more likely to drop out of high school, resulting in these boys' unemployment rate exceeding 20% in their early 20's.

In a world in which "The Future is Female;" in which there is a #MeToo monologue but no #MeToo dialogue; in which talking about the importance of dads is seen as critiquing single moms rather than supporting single moms and saving our children, it is rare to find someone with the courage to speak up for children becoming dad-enriched. John Papola has that courage.

When I spent multiple days with John and his team at the EO Foundation in Austin, I discovered in John a man with a wide intellectual range, enormous leadership capacity, and an inspired team ready to create a new YouTube channel called Dad Saves America.

[**Please click here or the image below to watch John Papola describe the mission of Emergent Order Foundation and the Dad Saves America initiative:**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749287:JKZ3T_2KN:m:1:3298722022:D05C3E0C27250F66A69CDF20B07F330F:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749287:JKZ3T_2KN:m:1:3298722022:D05C3E0C27250F66A69CDF20B07F330F:r)

Fortunately, John knows that to make the most important single effort to inspire new father warriors requires more than dreams. It requires dollars. The dollars of people who understand how vital both the family and fathers are to our children and our nation. [**When you contribute to the EO foundation I feel you will be supporting our country 's foundation.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749287:JKZ3T_2KN:m:1:3298722022:D05C3E0C27250F66A69CDF20B07F330F:r)

Dr. Warren Farrell
Co-Author (with John Gray), The Boy Crisis

Paid for by Emergent Order Foundation

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Ballot Initiatives are in Your Hands!
body:
2 Weekends Left to Sign
| | | |
---
|
---
November 9, 2021
Since I announced my campaign in July to be your next Governor of Massachusetts, I have heard time and again from voters on the campaign trail is that they feel our government, at every level, is not listening to them. Massive federal spending means that families are feeling the pinch as the cost of goods and gas keep rising. Moms and Dads feel that the school system is not listening to their input about what their kids are being taught. And parents are frightened about government overriding the health decisions they want to have for their own precious children.
But the biggest fear our citizens have, by far, is that our government is no longer providing secure elections. The most sacred right we have as Americans in a representative democracy - one person, one vote - is in jeopardy.
Fortunately, in Massachusetts, you have the opportunity to help change course immediately. In addition to the work being done in the campaign to become your next Governor, I am supporting three citizens' petitions on the November 2022 state ballot, all of which we are in the final 2 weeks of the signature-collection phase:
1. Require ID to Vote ([ID to Vote ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001evPw8MuSU6OGjSH7GsLbul6gA4H4RJyTglF8ZtrLPdPxAaI89ICMss0DBNpnsObOtT2V42jC85a1wkl5h49WSdZtLUm7Vj6jRJ8UjdBHhlZaRflYgwzlUBA7Rk6KlozJGU9IPIPbhosrgYMot_3NdQ==&c=g4xa3g5YqzXmKALzm7TL_4m1TBPWkvdxfzYVSgCxo7KdltJEoN-vIg==&ch=oFaEkxXwfGTx0NaB0oOSv3MQdQD4UYDgNii58WdB5lw5Y61eN588NA==)) 2. Reject the TCI Gas Tax ([Stop TCI Gas Tax ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001evPw8MuSU6OGjSH7GsLbul6gA4H4RJyTglF8ZtrLPdPxAaI89ICMss0DBNpnsObOMrgLT992QuSRiRMq5iKkkGp_EoNcpMqjViu1o4HJR3zHFRo-zMCQTjBY6jaUU8_qLzCnYGCTPQuIKT1OaK6FXQ==&c=g4xa3g5YqzXmKALzm7TL_4m1TBPWkvdxfzYVSgCxo7KdltJEoN-vIg==&ch=oFaEkxXwfGTx0NaB0oOSv3MQdQD4UYDgNii58WdB5lw5Y61eN588NA==)) 3. Provide health care to babies born alive. ([Newborn Protection ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001evPw8MuSU6OGjSH7GsLbul6gA4H4RJyTglF8ZtrLPdPxAaI89ICMss0DBNpnsObOnxpX4TZqLgLgfvtEnaPzGq74LNv1fQzRy5I5O_qJxtqgAJQ9FiwlwFW2eRuVyVOYWKY2SPo9tbRyvG9Z7JSCDVFowArfiybH&c=g4xa3g5YqzXmKALzm7TL_4m1TBPWkvdxfzYVSgCxo7KdltJEoN-vIg==&ch=oFaEkxXwfGTx0NaB0oOSv3MQdQD4UYDgNii58WdB5lw5Y61eN588NA==))
We only have two weekends left to get enough signatures on each question to qualify it for next year's ballot - The future is in YOUR HANDS! Please donate a few hours of your time to get involved and help! Not only can you sign the ballot initiatives, but you can also collect signatures of your friends and neighbors.
More information about how to take action is on each of the websites listed above, including how to download the petition forms. You can print, sign the and take them in directly to your Town Clerk. Every signature counts!
Thank you for caring about Massachusetts' hard working families as much as I do... Together, we can re-empower the individual and defend our God-given right to life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness!
---
|

---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
[Diehl for Massachusetts ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001evPw8MuSU6OGjSH7GsLbul6gA4H4RJyTglF8ZtrLPdPxAaI89ICMsoAhbjwVN48omWzMuRwdvd_Sctroj8_6vU_fFI-BBTMIhgZsZXWNoCeEtnGcECp2PyIl1XMAvdiYsxvZWPSEs_bbDDVal-3yeKWrDFFXVyIPN_UPw20qvBWsl5HApplYJg==&c=g4xa3g5YqzXmKALzm7TL_4m1TBPWkvdxfzYVSgCxo7KdltJEoN-vIg==&ch=oFaEkxXwfGTx0NaB0oOSv3MQdQD4UYDgNii58WdB5lw5Y61eN588NA==)
---
|

body:
Hi -- It's Sarah again.
Should I be worried? I have not received a reply from you. This is my _THIRD_ time reaching out.
We just need a couple more replies. [**Please, respond now and then I promise to stop flooding your inbox.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749443:6A1H6_2AN:m:1:3253819041:27356A2C6B2F84D3CF12A045D8282C40:r)

From: Sarah
Subject: Hi, you weren't responding so I thought I'd check in one more time_

Hi again,
I wasn't planning on doing this but I'm really hoping you'll respond if I try one last time...
**Nearly everyone on this list said they 're on Trump's team, not with the Liberals.** Now I have the task of contacting the last remaining hold outs -- _including you._
[**I was able to extend your deadline to respond for just 10 more minutes. Can you take a moment to answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749443:6A1H6_2AN:m:1:3253819041:27356A2C6B2F84D3CF12A045D8282C40:r)
_\-- Sarah_

From: Sarah
Subject: quick question for you_
Hey there,
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749443:6A1H6_2AN:m:1:3253819041:27356A2C6B2F84D3CF12A045D8282C40:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749443:6A1H6_2AN:m:1:3253819041:27356A2C6B2F84D3CF12A045D8282C40:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots. **
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749443:6A1H6_2AN:m:1:3253819041:27356A2C6B2F84D3CF12A045D8282C40:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

This isn't good.

While conservatives picked up momentum from our victories in Virginia and other states, Democrats have quietly been visiting their Big Money donors. They know they can pretty much get unlimited money from them as long as they play their game, and that's exactly what's happening right now.

Democrats are sitting on a stockpile of cash, just waiting to run ads that attack our conservative candidates and smear them to their friends and neighbors. Nancy Pelosi and her squad of anti-Semitic colleagues who control the House are being careful, publicly, not to make waves, but make no mistake --they're ready for this fight.

That's why we need you now more than ever. As they attack our values, our beliefs and our very way of life, we need to be ready to meet them and to rise above them with the truth. _**We need to be able to show them that we will protect our American values at all cost**_

_That 's why Mike Pompeo asked us to reserve you a spot in his Conservative Cavalry._ For just $5, you can _**[join RIGHT NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749864:JGRHp_2Nq:m:1:3299561967:7C06EBD43A41F7969DD1A9E15B939B91:r "join RIGHT NOW")**_ and receive exclusive news about our efforts to take back the House and the Senate, win control of state legislatures and push Republicans to victory at every level of government.

**You can be on the front lines fighting the good fight as a member of Mike Pompeo 's Conservative Cavalry. **

---

$5. For America. For freedom. For our values. Most of all, so that we can pass this country along to our children and grandchildren with the meaning and purpose that our Founding Fathers envisioned for us. Right now, that's not the future we're looking at, but with your help and your support, we can stop the Democrats from turning the American dream into a socialist nightmare.

Look: you can trust Mike Pompeo to get the job done. He's an Army veteran who served as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director. _**You know Mike, you know his record, and you know that he will never stop fighting for America.**_

We'll be meeting with Mike in the morning, and he'll be asking for updates -- _**[can we tell him that you joined his Conservative Cavalry and that he can count on you?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749863:JGRHp_2Nq:m:1:3299561967:7C06EBD43A41F7969DD1A9E15B939B91:r "can we tell him

Thank you for believing in America,

-Courtney w/ Team CAVPAC

name: Eddie Gallagher, Navy SEAL Chief (Ret.)
subject: This political prosecution of Kyle Rittenhouse must end
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58750650:6ikpL_2pN:m:1:3298722022:D120C75FEBC49028C21006582016224A:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. **

After nearly 20 years of decorated service as a Navy SEAL, I was arrested and charged with the murder of an ISIS terrorist in Iraq. I was facing not only life in prison, but an endless campaign of slander and misinformation from our corrupt media.

Thankfully my family fought back publicly and fearlessly, caught the attention of President Trump, and I was freed from the brig and allowed to properly prepare for trial. I was found not guilty and allowed to keep my trident, but our life was a living hell for a long time.

**Now, Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs and I refuse to sit back.** As I've watched his trial, it's become crystal clear that Kyle acted in self-defense.

**[I'm emailing you now because through FreeKyleUSA, Kyle's mother Wendy has been furiously working to raise money for his legal defense, and they urgently need our help. Will you make a donation right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58750650:6ikpL_2pN:m:1:3298722022:D120C75FEBC49028C21006582016224A:r)**
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58750650:6ikpL_2pN:m:1:3298722022:D120C75FEBC49028C21006582016224A:r)
|
---
More and more nowadays, if you're considered a political enemy of the powers-that-be, the rule book gets thrown out and anything goes.

The media, politicians, tech companies and other powerful interests band together to try and crush you financially and personally. The "narrative" takes precedence over the truth, and people's lives can be forever ruined.

**That is not the America that I dedicated my life to defend.**

It shouldn't have to be this way, but I know from my own experience that if enough people stand up and push back, justice can still prevail. And right now, justice means a "not guilty" verdict and Kyle Rittenhouse getting his life back.

**It can happen, but his legal defense is incredibly costly and he needs the support of millions of patriotic Americans across this country.**

**[I'm calling on you to help because believe it or not, your donation will make a difference. So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now, and let's pray that Kyle gets the justice he deserves.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58750650:6ikpL_2pN:m:1:3298722022:D120C75FEBC49028C21006582016224A:r)**

The truth, and our God-given right of self-defense still mean something in this country, and we have the power, today, to stand up for both.

Thank you for your time.

Steadfast,
Eddie Gallagher
Navy SEAL Special Operations Chief (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58750650:6ikpL_2pN:m:1:3298722022:D120C75FEBC49028C21006582016224A:r)

name: American Defense News
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7cgnrjt0l9nlb9lok1qh5voqssfpd53ccesqho8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqj4ctl61rj4cpnmupr1d1kepi6cp1hc6o68phm6dqb9crke2rm2tdm62qe6p3nmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3impj32s5jcgrr4tb66lgb4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6cdjm4pb3clgm49fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z343kbsg4qf7qavghmsa3h28iqodp9mn8ru9b5uo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cth6aor5c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdhab96kh79kl6980u8e4jkim0fetihnh41nl7j0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cth6aor5c5h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0lo40rth0on1ag7qevs2a8kvut5c1mgdijpp9jg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cth6aor5c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38552394/315973483/-2057546413?refcode=20211112_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGE0ZDdhMS1jNDQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwaWoa0Rpnh_0JbRdmbnDfOwsxH-bFUNERc3R9TfzbE=) Folks -- This is BIG. **_The Wall Street Journal_ just called us the “Democrats’ most important 2022 race.” ** It’s confirmed: control of the Senate will come down to Ohio. [**Can you split a donation between Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC and my campaign right now to help us flip Ohio blue and expand the Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38552395/315973484/2038802527?refcode=20211112_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGE0ZDdhMS1jNDQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwaWoa0Rpnh_0JbRdmbnDfOwsxH-bFUNERc3R9TfzbE=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38552396/315973485/-2057546413?refcode=20211112_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGE0ZDdhMS1jNDQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vwaWoa0Rpnh_0JbRdmbnDfOwsxH-bFUNERc3R9TfzbE=) Democratic control of the Senate, an agenda focused on working-class families, good-paying jobs, and sending a message that Trump’s failed policies have no place in this country -- it all comes down to what we do in Ohio.
