subject: the right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Now more than ever, protecting the right to vote is essential to our democracy. We need a strong Democratic majority to put our country first and keep fighting for voting rights.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38553107/315975230/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM4ZjY2Yi1jNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yP5e9W4YpvKf0Hv5zkwugemIZHOCT7IDlbjh_XHvR-c=&emci=e7047834-5742-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1138f66b-c543-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4568237)

| | **Fox News: Senate votes to block consideration of John Lewis Voting Rights Act ** It’s just shameful, Derek. When Democrats recently tried to move the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act forward in the Senate, Republicans stopped the bill from even being debated on the Senate floor. **Votes like this are exactly why we need to defend and expand our Senate majority in 2022.** Now more than ever, protecting the right to vote is essential to our democracy. We need a strong Democratic majority to put our country first and keep fighting for voting rights. [_**Will you join Mark Warner and Senate Dems in the fight to protect voting rights? Pitch in $5 or any amount to help keep the Senate blue and expand our Democratic majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38553109/315975293/1689506435?refcode=mw_em_211112_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM4ZjY2Yi1jNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yP5e9W4YpvKf0Hv5zkwugemIZHOCT7IDlbjh_XHvR-c=) Free and fair elections are the cornerstone of this country. We must do everything we can to ensure that everyone is able to exercise their right to vote in secure elections. But we can’t do it without you -- _because your support is our secret weapon to beat Mitch McConnell’s GOP._ That’s the only way we can continue to invest in infrastructure, health care, and jobs -- the kinds of investments needed to keep our pandemic recovery moving. Without a Democratic majority, that will all go away. [_**Mark is counting on you to help us win this fight, Derek. Stand up and help protect voting rights across the country. We are asking for $5 but any amount you can give will go a long way towards keeping the Senate blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38553110/315975301/1689506435?refcode=mw_em_211112_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM4ZjY2Yi1jNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yP5e9W4YpvKf0Hv5zkwugemIZHOCT7IDlbjh_XHvR-c=) Thank you for standing up, Team Warner
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38553112/315975312/1689506435?refcode=mw_em_211112_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTM4ZjY2Yi1jNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yP5e9W4YpvKf0Hv5zkwugemIZHOCT7IDlbjh_XHvR-c=)**

|
| | | Hey, it's Wesley Hunt. I'm a U.S. Army Captain who's enlisting in the fight to FIRE Nancy Pelosi and take back the House! **[Will you help me?]( "Will you help me?")**

Pelosi knows that as a proud black Republican whose family went from slavery to West Point in just five generations, I will fight tooth and nail to save the American Dream.

That's why she's doing everything in her power to beat me! She's committed to spending MILLIONS to hand this seat to a radical Democrat who'll do her bidding. She wants to flip this seat blue -- and I REFUSE to let her turn the great state of Texas into a socialist wasteland.

**[Can I count on you to help me fight back and DEFEND this seat from Nancy Pelosi's corrupt clutches with a 5x matched donation?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58750939:J3eTA_2Nn:m:1:3299561967:3A8E79CC00A687B87678750A0F51AFEC:r "Can I count on you

That's why I'm running for Congress in my home state of Texas to do what Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden and their Radical Leftist Democrats won't: put America FIRST.

name: Eddie Gallagher, Navy SEAL Chief (Ret.)
subject: This political prosecution of Kyle Rittenhouse must end
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749839:JDZwA_2FN:m:1:3253819041:BF1ADCE2CFB18175D57CC79E9D11FECE:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. **

After nearly 20 years of decorated service as a Navy SEAL, I was arrested and charged with the murder of an ISIS terrorist in Iraq. I was facing not only life in prison, but an endless campaign of slander and misinformation from our corrupt media.

Thankfully my family fought back publicly and fearlessly, caught the attention of President Trump, and I was freed from the brig and allowed to properly prepare for trial. I was found not guilty and allowed to keep my trident, but our life was a living hell for a long time.

**Now, Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs and I refuse to sit back.** As I've watched his trial, it's become crystal clear that Kyle acted in self-defense.

**[I'm emailing you now because through FreeKyleUSA, Kyle's mother Wendy has been furiously working to raise money for his legal defense, and they urgently need our help. Will you make a donation right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749839:JDZwA_2FN:m:1:3253819041:BF1ADCE2CFB18175D57CC79E9D11FECE:r)**
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749839:JDZwA_2FN:m:1:3253819041:BF1ADCE2CFB18175D57CC79E9D11FECE:r)
|
---
More and more nowadays, if you're considered a political enemy of the powers-that-be, the rule book gets thrown out and anything goes.

The media, politicians, tech companies and other powerful interests band together to try and crush you financially and personally. The "narrative" takes precedence over the truth, and people's lives can be forever ruined.

**That is not the America that I dedicated my life to defend.**

It shouldn't have to be this way, but I know from my own experience that if enough people stand up and push back, justice can still prevail. And right now, justice means a "not guilty" verdict and Kyle Rittenhouse getting his life back.

**It can happen, but his legal defense is incredibly costly and he needs the support of millions of patriotic Americans across this country.**

**[I'm calling on you to help because believe it or not, your donation will make a difference. So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now, and let's pray that Kyle gets the justice he deserves.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749839:JDZwA_2FN:m:1:3253819041:BF1ADCE2CFB18175D57CC79E9D11FECE:r)**

The truth, and our God-given right of self-defense still mean something in this country, and we have the power, today, to stand up for both.

Thank you for your time.

Steadfast,
Eddie Gallagher
Navy SEAL Special Operations Chief (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749839:JDZwA_2FN:m:1:3253819041:BF1ADCE2CFB18175D57CC79E9D11FECE:r)

And right now, justice means a "not guilty" verdict and Kyle Rittenhouse getting his life back. It can happen, but his legal defense is incredibly costly and he needs the support of millions of patriotic Americans across this country. The truth, and our God-given right of self-defense still mean something in this country, and we have the power, today, to stand up for both. Thank you for your time. Team -- We’re about to ask you to make a donation to support Democratic Senator Maggie Hassan. That’s because, no matter how you slice it, New Hampshire’s Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip to Republican control. Maggie only won her last race by 1,017 votes, and Mitch McConnell’s allies have already spent $4 MILLION to defeat her -- and the election is still a year away! **[If that’s all you need to know to donate (it would be enough for us too!), you can rush your contribution to reelect Maggie and protect the Senate majority right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38553753/315977699/-1803038125?refcode=e20211112_priorities&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzc0MjA4Ny1jNjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tv56JOKPM5viNQ5DN6afD_kcNSotbcpXhgjC7KfDtUA=)** If not, read on to learn the Republican party’s priorities for New Hampshire and the stakes of this race.

* Republicans are prioritizing tax breaks for the wealthy, helping the rich get richer at the expense of hardworking folks. Senator Hassan secured tax cuts for small businesses, helping New Hampshire families get ahead and stay ahead.

Maggie Hassan only won this seat by 1,017 votes. A strong surge in grassroots support is critical to reelecting her and protecting Democrats’ narrow 50-50 majority. **[$5 -- or anything you can give today -- will go a very long way toward holding this seat, and Maggie is relying on YOUR support. name: Bridie Farrell
subject: This is about you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US
body:
This campaign is about you, your views, and your aspirations. My job is to listen to you and try to make what you tell me into a reality here at home. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38555131/315983316/453073218?refcode=fl_email_su_welcome2_bf_new_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2Y3MzJjYy1jODQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DNU93TpcEh6CrT_IxF0IKuPpip-NGxWxdQ8OLTY1Y2g=)
---
Friend, First of all, thank you so much for the outpouring of support since I announced my campaign to represent Upstate New York’s 21st District in the U.S. House of Representatives! It’s truly been incredible. To put it up front, Elise Stefanik is using her time in D.C. to gain political power for herself and not for you. She has divided the country and taken us away from what we should be doing — working together to get things done for the American people and the resident’s of New York’s 21st District. I want to put that nonsense in the rear view mirror and focus on the real work that must be done to make our communities stronger, safer, and more prosperous for everyone. This campaign is about you, your views, and your aspirations. My job is to listen to you and try to make what you tell me into a reality here at home. I promise I will never stop listening and I will never stop competing for you, just as I did when I wore the red, white, and blue as a member of the U.S. National Speed Skating Team. You see, for me, it really doesn’t matter if an idea is Democratic or Republican, red or blue, right or left. If it is a good one, I want to hear it and I want to act on it. **So, tell me: what issues are top of mind for you right now? What’s keeping you up at night? What else do you want to see from the politicians in Washington?** **[Take my super quick survey to let me know. I’m really looking forward to hearing your voice as I continue to build my campaign for the North Country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38555132/315983317/-1293013632?refcode=fl_email_su_welcome2_bf_new_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2Y3MzJjYy1jODQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DNU93TpcEh6CrT_IxF0IKuPpip-NGxWxdQ8OLTY1Y2g=&emci=43ef9653-20ea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a3f732cc-c843-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15140248)** **** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38555133/315983318/-1293013632?refcode=fl_email_su_welcome2_bf_new_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2Y3MzJjYy1jODQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DNU93TpcEh6CrT_IxF0IKuPpip-NGxWxdQ8OLTY1Y2g=&emci=43ef9653-20ea-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a3f732cc-c843-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15140248)

She has divided the country and taken us away from what we should be doing — working together to get things done for the American people and the resident’s of New York’s 21st District. I want to put that nonsense in the rear view mirror and focus on the real work that must be done to make our communities stronger, safer, and more prosperous for everyone. This campaign is about you, your views, and your aspirations. My job is to listen to you and try to make what you tell me into a reality here at home. I promise I will never stop listening and I will never stop competing for you, just as I did when I wore the red, white, and blue as a member of the U.S. National Speed Skating Team. You see, for me, it really doesn’t matter if an idea is Democratic or Republican, red or blue, right or left. If it is a good one, I want to hear it and I want to act on it. So, tell me: what issues are top of mind for you right now? What’s keeping you up at night? What else do you want to see from the politicians in Washington? **** | Thanks for your input, Bridie | Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US Bridie Farrell for US PO Box 166 North River, NY 12856 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Lauren Ganapini
subject: FW: Sun shines brighter on The Big Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
Hi there,
Wanted to bump up Mike’s email from Monday with some important news: the Indiana Chamber of Commerce has now endorsed President Joe Biden’s Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal.
The Indiana Chamber says they’ve “been advocating for” this transformational investment for the state for “a long long time” -- and it was Democrats who delivered this brighter future for Hoosier families.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane_other=true&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane_other=true&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.]This means Indiana will see expanded broadband access, repaired roads and bridges, and cleaner and safer water for Hoosiers to enjoy.
Democrats like André Carson and Frank Mrvan made this possible. And as for the Indiana Republican Party? They view internet access, roads, bridges, and water as “socialism”.
The choice in next year’s 2022 elections couldn’t be more stark, but we’re going to need your help to get more Democrats elected across Indiana.
Join us to help deliver a brighter tomorrow for the state we call home. Chip in, and let’s get to work.
- Lauren
Executive Director, INDems
MONDAY’S EMAIL BELOW
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/Image%2011-8-21%20at%2012.28%20PM.jpg]Fellow Hoosier,
When President Joe Biden said he would deliver a better future for Hoosier families -- he meant it. When Biden said he would get things done by working across the aisle, he meant it.
And thanks to Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats like André Carson and Frank Mrvan, Indiana and our families will have brighter and better days ahead because of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal, a once-in-a-generation investment in Indiana’s infrastructure system.
We’re talking about investments to broadband that adds to the foundation already set by the American Rescue Plan. This means Indiana can repair its roads and bridges and reclaim our “Crossroads of America” reputation. And for the first time in a generation, we can revitalize our water infrastructure system and deliver safe and clean water across every community in the state.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane_other=true&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/projectrebuild?express_lane_other=true&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.]Democrats are getting this - and more - done for Hoosier families. In fact, this Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal will address the most-pressing issues facing voters AND will help us protect our counties and small towns from the unpredictability climate change has brought to the Hoosier State.
Voters were looking for leadership from their elected officials, and Democrats - and 32 Republicans not from Indiana - were willing to step up and deliver a better tomorrow for our families and nation. This is what happens when honest leaders agree to transformational ideas in a bipartisan way.
And listen: Democrats didn’t get everything we wanted. Nor did the Republicans who supported the bill. But that’s how compromise and bipartisanship works. We put some points on the scoreboard for Hoosier families.
But here’s the deal: Democrats are up against an Indiana Republican Party whose agenda rests on culture wars and misinformation rather than solutions, like the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal. Republicans like Todd Young, Jackie Walorski, and Larry Bucshon didn’t just vote “NO” on clean water, roads and bridges, and broadband -- they had the guts to call it “socialism” too.
You heard that right. The very issues Indiana Republicans claim to care about on the campaign trail they now view as “socialism”.
They know better. But, Indiana Democrats have been willing to go it alone and will continue to be on offense until we’re able to bring balance back to our government. We’re going to work overtime and crisscross Indiana nonstop to make sure Hoosiers like you know Democrats are about delivering solutions to your problems, not creating new ones.
Democrats’ 92-county strategy is the right move. There’s no substitute for a face to face conversation. It’s common sense and until every Hoosier has the opportunity at a better future, we will not stop traveling around the state we love to call home.
Join us in this fight. Chip in whatever you can now to help us gear up for the battle that’s ahead of us. And most importantly, support Democratic candidates at the ballot box next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/indems?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1]
This is a transformational moment for Hoosiers, for Indiana, and for our country. But, we need you now more than ever.
Sincerely,
Mike Schmuhl
Chairman

Indiana Democratic Party
115 W Washington
INDLPS, IN 46202
United States
Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: We must keep fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzoxBDWJYbTNJ94CRvNv6UqScT1yR17qUm_efx-lMk4=/hYwPtczyMyFK9rL3CvPD8riBIkvb9Fh9HGh_QXRrVPA=)
---
Friend, While the result of last week's election were not what we were hoping for, we as Democrats should be proud of the progress we've made over the past four years, from abolishing the death penalty to Medicaid Expansion. None of this would have been possible without your support of our efforts. Our fight to regain control of the House of Delegates, re-elect Congresswomen Wexton, Luria, and Spanberger in 2022, and protect our narrow majority in the Senate in 2023 starts now, and I will leave it all on the field to make sure we are able to protect and build on the progress we've made. [**Please help us secure our Democratic progress today by contributing $20 or more to The Way Ahead 's Future Fund today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wzoxBDWJYbTNJ94CRvNv6UqScT1yR17qUm_efx-lMk4=/Lt7YhE2dnasCqnPNc0s852K-y9QtG3HeWh98iCx244M=) As a State Senator, I saw the lengths Republicans went through to restrict voting rights and a women's access to reproductive healthcare. We can't afford to let Republicans in the General Assembly turn back the clocks again. My commitment to protecting our Democratic progress in Virginia is steadfast, and I hope you will keep fighting with me. Take care, Ralph Northam

name: Roger Marshall
subject: Our heroes shouldn’t be treated like felons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/8f2f3aa60d9befa8/129a154bf7118bb1c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
# **Friend — Our nation’s heroes should not be dishonorably discharged for refusing a vaccine. PERIOD.**

---
But Joe Biden disagrees. He’s trying to use the full weight of the federal government to mandate vaccines and treat military members who refuse it like felons. I’m doing everything in my power to stop it. Will you help us? [**SIGN on as a Citizen Co-Sponsor here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/8f2f3aa60d9befa8/2b59bc10806692e6c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

---
I’m a physician and a veteran who believes the vaccines have saved lives. But I also know that vaccination is a personal choice between you and your doctor. And NO veteran should be treated like a felon for refusing a vaccine. [**My bill would stop Biden’s tyranny in its tracks. If you’re with us on this, then I need you to join the fight to get it done. SIGN your name now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/8f2f3aa60d9befa8/98fed2056b5982ffc3d6b838967d376c/37973)

body:
As of 9:00 AM, we DO NOT have a response from you. So I'm touching base one last time...
Hi there --

Ben believes we can build on this success by continuing to invest in green technology and climate resiliency, which will create tens of thousands of high-quality jobs just like these.
Creating more jobs in the clean energy sector will allow Missourians to support their families while building a better world for our kids. That’s what innovation and public policy should be all about.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Should schools teach students financial literacy?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
I’d like to pose a question to you: should schools teach students financial literacy? My answer is a resounding yes.
Research conducted by Walden University tells us that a staggering 4 out of 7 Americans are financially illiterate. As the State’s Chief Fiscal Officer, I’ve seen firsthand how a lack of financial literacy -- including knowing how to balance a budget, build good credit, identify fraud, and invest your money -- can have significant, and even devastating consequences for fellow citizens. This reality is especially evident for marginalized and disadvantaged communities.
Pew Research Center tells us that people in poverty who have received education in financial literacy are more likely to get out of poverty, which is why we need to consider financial literacy training as an essential part of our toolkit in the effort to lift more of our communities into the quality of life that they deserve. That’s why as part of my larger plan for education as Governor, I’ll make sure schools equip our students with the practical skills like financial literacy that they need to thrive in a modern economy.
I’d love to hear your personal thoughts about this topic. If you have a moment, will you take my quick survey to let me know more about your thoughts on teaching our students real-world skills like financial literacy? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/czj3Y7LVS0COax-nRlSBag2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?amount=20.22&refcode=em111021]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648

clean_body: [ Peter, I’d like to pose a question to you: should schools teach students financial literacy? My answer is a resounding yes. Research conducted by Walden University tells us that a staggering 4 out of 7 Americans are financially illiterate. As the State’s Chief Fiscal Officer, I’ve seen firsthand how a lack of financial literacy -- including knowing how to balance a budget, build good credit, identify fraud, and invest your money -- can have significant, and even devastating consequences for fellow citizens. This reality is especially evident for marginalized and disadvantaged communities. Pew Research Center tells us that people in poverty who have received education in financial literacy are more likely to get out of poverty, which is why we need to consider financial literacy training as an essential part of our toolkit in the effort to lift more of our communities into the quality of life that they deserve. That’s why as part of my larger plan for education as Governor, I’ll make sure schools equip our students with the practical skills like financial literacy that they need to thrive in a modern economy. I’d love to hear your personal thoughts about this topic. If you have a moment, will you take my quick survey to let me know more about your thoughts on teaching our students real-world skills like financial literacy? [] Thank you, [] DONATE [ Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer Friends of Peter Franchot P.O. disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:

Hey Fellow Conservative,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-2ua0g-1kkgd-4qqlpo6/)

I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.

Thanks in advance for your quick response.
\-- Olivia

name: Letitia James
subject: This is a huge moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560130/316003655/324296880?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjdjZjg0NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsaWcy7cY1H2LVK8W3WqD4G3jge4tyYOsekRGev0RZA=)
---
Peter, I just announced my candidacy for governor of New York.

This is just the beginning of my campaign to fight for equality and progress for the everyday working families of this great state – and it's critical that I have you on my side.
I'll never back down from a fight that will help everyday people, no matter how large or small – and I'll do whatever it takes to protect the voiceless and defend the vulnerable from this country's most powerful interests.

**But this may just be my biggest fight yet – and I can't go at it alone. I need the top fearless fighters on my team to get this campaign off to an incredible start. That means you, Peter.**
[**Will you activate your Founding Donor status by making a contribution of $5, $25 or more before midnight tonight? We're still 4,221 members short of our 10,000 Founding Donors goal, and I need you by my side as I fight for true equality for all New Yorkers. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560131/316003656/1687198019?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk198-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjdjZjg0NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsaWcy7cY1H2LVK8W3WqD4G3jge4tyYOsekRGev0RZA=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560133/316003657/1687198019?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk198-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjdjZjg0NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsaWcy7cY1H2LVK8W3WqD4G3jge4tyYOsekRGev0RZA=)
I'll always fight tooth and nail to make meaningful progress for all. That means suing Big Pharma for fueling the opioid crisis. Holding this country's most powerful interests – like Trump and the NRA – firmly accountable. Creating a health care system that puts patients over profits. And launching an aggressive plan to tackle climate change. And I vow to use my office as a public servant to continue standing on the front lines for equality, because I believe that is the change New York needs.
But this campaign is going to be a marathon, Peter, and we need to hit our goals every step of the way – starting with this one. Won't you take that first step with me?
[**Rush a donation of $5, $25 or more right now to help me continue fighting to secure equality for those who need it most. A gift of any amount can make all the difference in our fight for progress. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560134/316003658/1687198019?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk198-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjdjZjg0NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsaWcy7cY1H2LVK8W3WqD4G3jge4tyYOsekRGev0RZA=)

Thanks so much for being on my side. I couldn't be more grateful for your support.

Letitia James

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: reaching out personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi Peter, it's Abby. I'm reaching out about my campaign against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) – and today, I'm asking you to make your very first contribution by donating just $5. I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why.
You see, I have every intention of defeating Sen. Chuck Grassley – and right now, he's never been more vulnerable: **Only 27% of likely Iowa voters say they want to reelect him to an eighth term. **
But Republicans know just as well as you and I do that Sen. Grassley is on thin ice with Iowans. That's why Donald Trump flew to Iowa to endorse him at a MAGA rally just a few weeks ago. Now, the GOP establishment is rallying against us – and their Senate campaign arm is sitting on a $27 million war chest dedicated to defeating Democrats like me and taking back the Senate.
**None of that scares me – I know we can win. But I also know that flipping Iowa blue is going to take a powerful grassroots movement.**** **[**So, Peter, I've got to ask: Can you make your first grassroots contribution of $5
right now to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560139/316003782/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjdjZjg0NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4E542zQaoslEjWsFrZxiFD6k4sWs_mn7XYQ2rzwi7Rk=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560140/316003785/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjdjZjg0NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4E542zQaoslEjWsFrZxiFD6k4sWs_mn7XYQ2rzwi7Rk=)
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560141/316003790/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjdjZjg0NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4E542zQaoslEjWsFrZxiFD6k4sWs_mn7XYQ2rzwi7Rk=)
---
As a young woman in public service, I can't count the number of times I've been underestimated or counted out. But I've never been one to back down from a challenge, and I know the power of hard work: I won in a primary against men double my age, flipped a House seat blue and became the youngest woman to pass legislation through the House.
**At the end of the day, that's what flipping this seat blue and protecting our Senate control is going to take: hard work. Lots of it, too.**
The work ahead to defeat Grassley won't be easy, but I know that with a movement of committed grassroots supporters like you, we can – and will – win. **[So please, Peter, can you commit to this movement by donating $5 before my midnight fundraising goal tonight? Every donation puts us one step closer to flipping Iowa blue and protecting our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560142/316003795/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjdjZjg0NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4E542zQaoslEjWsFrZxiFD6k4sWs_mn7XYQ2rzwi7Rk=) **
Thank you for standing with me and doing all that you do.
With deep gratitude,

Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560143/316003797/496662621?refcode=jtk378-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjdjZjg0NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4E542zQaoslEjWsFrZxiFD6k4sWs_mn7XYQ2rzwi7Rk=&emci=0fd9b1bd-c93d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=127cf844-d243-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13784334#!).

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, it's Abby. I'm reaching out about my campaign against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) – and today, I'm asking you to make your very first contribution by donating just $5. I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why. You see, I have every intention of defeating Sen. Chuck Grassley – and right now, he's never been more vulnerable: Only 27% of likely Iowa voters say they want to reelect him to an eighth term. But Republicans know just as well as you and I do that Sen. Grassley is on thin ice with Iowans. That's why Donald Trump flew to Iowa to endorse him at a MAGA rally just a few weeks ago. Now, the GOP establishment is rallying against us – and their Senate campaign arm is sitting on a $27 million war chest dedicated to defeating Democrats like me and taking back the Senate. None of that scares me – I know we can win. But I also know that flipping Iowa blue is going to take a powerful grassroots movement. = = | | = As a young woman in public service, I can't count the number of times I've been underestimated or counted out. But I've never been one to back down from a challenge, and I know the power of hard work: I won in a primary against men double my age, flipped a House seat blue and became the youngest woman to pass legislation through the House. At the end of the day, that's what flipping this seat blue and protecting our Senate control is going to take: hard work. Lots of it, too. The work ahead to defeat Grassley won't be easy, but I know that with a movement of committed grassroots supporters like you, we can – and will – win. = Thank you for standing with me and doing all that you do. With deep gratitude, Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

Team, _Roe v. Wade_ was a historic U.S. Supreme Court case that legalized abortion in 1973. But 48 years later, we’re still fighting for reproductive freedom. Last month, I told you about the extreme 6-week abortion ban passed in Texas, which puts a bounty on anyone (doctors, nurses, friends, family, even Uber drivers) who helps a person receive an abortion after six weeks — _a point at which many people don’t even know they’re pregnant._ **Now, the Supreme Court is hearing a case to determine whether that ban is legal or not, and it can completely undo _Roe v. Wade_ and threaten safe, legal access to abortion as we know it.** Reproductive choice is something that should be solely between a patient and their doctor, period. Yet too often, Republicans (like my opponent Yvette Herrell) are introducing extreme bans like the one in Texas to control people’s bodies and make safe abortion less accessible. [**We have to fight back now. Join me in opposing the Texas ban and calling on Congress to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law ASAP so that we don’t go back to the days of dangerous back-alley abortions.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560173/316004008/-1871929014?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211112scotus_GV_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTE5OWU2NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjVEepS51xcfl45HyHyiZlVqtaGZvl_iZJRtQGdVSPE=&emci=ae0aa15e-d243-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=be199e64-d243-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4482565) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38560174/316004009/-1871929014?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211112scotus_GV_full_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTE5OWU2NC1kMjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjVEepS51xcfl45HyHyiZlVqtaGZvl_iZJRtQGdVSPE=&emci=ae0aa15e-d243-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=be199e64-d243-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4482565)

My opponent voted against making _Roe v. Wade_ law — when I’m elected to replace her in Congress next year, know that I’ll always vote to protect choice.
— Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: Steve Bannon, and now, Michael Flynn
disclaimer_text: paid for by the twice-impeached, corrupt former occupant of the White House
body:
Friend: I had to make sure you didn't miss my earlier message about the House voting to hold Steve Bannon, a top ally and former strategist of Donald Trump, in contempt of Congress. Since that vote, the dominoes have continued to fall in the aftermath of the former president's attacks on our democracy: *Just this week, the House Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack on the United States Capitol issued subpoenas for former Trump officials and allies – including disgraced former National Security Advisor Michael Flynn.*

>From current Republican members of Congress to top former officials like Steve Bannon and Michael Flynn, we are inching closer and closer to full truth and accountability when it comes to the Trump-induced attack on our Capitol on Jan. 6.

But let me be clear, Friend: The Republican Party is consolidating around the former president and his corrupt allies. And as they try to protect him, they are relying on the assumption that Americans like you are not smart enough to follow the evidence and will look the other way.

I know you're not about to let Trump – and anybody involved in the Jan. 6 attack – off the hook. This team believes in truth and accountability, and I need your help in securing it. So please, keep speaking out. *Add your name if you believe criminal charges should be considered for Donald Trump and the members of his administration and Congress who aided Jan. 6 insurrectionists.*

https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1103-su-nd

Thank you,

Dick

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Richard Blumenthal
Date: Thu, Oct 28, 2021
Subject: Re: Steve Bannon

Friend, there have been massive developments in the investigation into the Jan. 6 insurrection: The House has officially voted to hold Steve Bannon – former chief strategist to Donald Trump – in contempt of Congress.

The longtime Trump ally and purported architect of the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol has thus far refused to testify before the committee or hand over documents that could uncover the full truth behind the deadly insurrection incited by the former president. Now, in a bipartisan vote, the House has paved the way for Attorney General Merrick Garland to prosecute Bannon on criminal charges.

Bannon's contempt of Congress is just the tip of the iceberg when it comes to the Republican Party's involvement in the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol. A bombshell new report also reveals that multiple Republican members of Congress were "intimately involved in planning both Trump's efforts to overturn his election loss and the Jan. 6 events that turned violent."

The names of Trump's alleged co-conspirators will likely not surprise you: Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Mo Brooks, Madison Cawthorn, and Lauren Boebert, among others. Clearly, the soul of the Republican Party has been bought and paid for by the twice-impeached, corrupt former occupant of the White House. Soulless or not, anyone involved in the attack on our Capitol – an attack on our democracy itself – must be held accountable, from Donald Trump to Steve Bannon to any member of Congress.

Friend, the plain truth is this: The Republican Party is counting on Americans like you to look the other way. They are counting on you not to speak out so they can sweep all these wrongdoings under the rug. But I know you're not about to let that happen, which is why in light of even more revelations, I need your help to hold Steve Bannon, Donald Trump, and Republican members of Congress accountable.

Before midnight tonight, add your name to speak out at this critical moment: Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, members of his administration, and members of Congress who aided Jan. 6 insurrectionists? Click if you agree – we need grassroots Democrats to speak out by the thousands.

https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1103-su-nd

Donald Trump and his associates' dangerous and anti-democratic behavior can't simply become a page in a history book. Severe actions require severe consequences. It's up to us to ensure accountability. Thank you again for taking action.

Dick

clean_body: Friend: I had to make sure you didn't miss my earlier message about the House voting to hold Steve Bannon, a top ally and former strategist of Donald Trump, in contempt of Congress. Since that vote, the dominoes have continued to fall in the aftermath of the former president's attacks on our democracy: Just this week, the House Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack on the United States Capitol issued subpoenas for former Trump officials and allies – including disgraced former National Security Advisor Michael Flynn. From current Republican members of Congress to top former officials like Steve Bannon and Michael Flynn, we are inching closer and closer to full truth and accountability when it comes to the Trump-induced attack on our Capitol on Jan. 6. But let me be clear, Friend: The Republican Party is consolidating around the former president and his corrupt allies. And as they try to protect him, they are relying on the assumption that Americans like you are not smart enough to follow the evidence and will look the other way. I know you're not about to let Trump – and anybody involved in the Jan. 6 attack – off the hook. This team believes in truth and accountability, and I need your help in securing it. So please, keep speaking out. Add your name if you believe criminal charges should be considered for Donald Trump and the members of his administration and Congress who aided Jan. 6 insurrectionists. Thank you, Dick ---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Richard Blumenthal Date: Thu, Oct 28, 2021 Subject: Re: Steve Bannon Friend, there have been massive developments in the investigation into the Jan. 6 insurrection: The House has officially voted to hold Steve Bannon – former chief strategist to Donald Trump – in contempt of Congress. The longtime Trump ally and purported architect of the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol has thus far refused to testify before the committee or hand over documents that could uncover the full truth behind the deadly insurrection incited by the former president. Now, in a bipartisan vote, the House has paved the way for Attorney General Merrick Garland to prosecute Bannon on criminal charges. Bannon's contempt of Congress is just the tip of the iceberg when it comes to the Republican Party's involvement in the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol. A bombshell new report also reveals that multiple Republican members of Congress were "intimately involved in planning both Trump's efforts to overturn his election loss and the Jan. 6 events that turned violent." The names of Trump's alleged co-conspirators will likely not surprise you: Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Mo Brooks, Madison Cawthorn, and Lauren Boebert, among others. Clearly, the soul of the Republican Party has been bought and paid for by the twice-impeached, corrupt former occupant of the White House. Soulless or not, anyone involved in the attack on our Capitol – an attack on our democracy itself – must be held accountable, from Donald Trump to Steve Bannon to any member of Congress. Friend, the plain truth is this: The Republican Party is counting on Americans like you to look the other way. They are counting on you not to speak out so they can sweep all these wrongdoings under the rug. But I know you're not about to let that happen, which is why in light of even more revelations, I need your help to hold Steve Bannon, Donald Trump, and Republican members of Congress accountable. Before midnight tonight, add your name to speak out at this critical moment: Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump, members of his administration, and members of Congress who aided Jan. 6 insurrectionists? Click if you agree – we need grassroots Democrats to speak out by the thousands. Donald Trump and his associates' dangerous and anti-democratic behavior can't simply become a page in a history book. Severe actions require severe consequences. It's up to us to ensure accountability. Thank you again for taking action. Dick Contribute - --

body:
The Virginia Governor Election was a referendum on CRT.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE2LWE2ZDAyZGNhYWE5ODQ4YWVhYjRmMDY5YjA2Yzc5ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9zY290dC1tLXBhY3QtcGFyZW50cy1hZ2FpbnN0LWNyaXRpY2FsLXRoZW9yeS0zNGVkMGY2Ny1kN2JmLTQ2YTQtOTZmMi1kOWMyY2Q4YTEwMjkvcGFjdF9hZV9tbV9sb3Vkb3VuaXplXzExMTEyMT9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BRV9GRk8xMTEyMjAyMQ&K=bqEBeWjy6fZ384bA9nv_iQ)Fellow Conservative, [**Glenn Youngkin’s victory is PROOF that we are WINNING the fight against Critical Race Theory.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE2LWE2ZDAyZGNhYWE5ODQ4YWVhYjRmMDY5YjA2Yzc5ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9zY290dC1tLXBhY3QtcGFyZW50cy1hZ2FpbnN0LWNyaXRpY2FsLXRoZW9yeS0zNGVkMGY2Ny1kN2JmLTQ2YTQtOTZmMi1kOWMyY2Q4YTEwMjkvcGFjdF9hZV9tbV9sb3Vkb3VuaXplXzExMTEyMT9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BRV9GRk8xMTEyMjAyMQ&K=3ZmUWjObDofCP8Wp4sSLWQ) In the final weeks of his campaign, Youngkin made the race for Governor of Virginia about ONE THING: our children and their schools. Youngkin WON because he stood up to the teachers’’ unions who are pushing Critical Race Theory and other progressive garbage on our kids. WE started that conversation, Fellow Conservative. Without YOU and YOUR support, the race wouldn’t have been focused on Critical Race Theory and Glenn Youngkin might have lost. This is just the first of MANY victories – please continue supporting Parents Against Critical Theory so we can “Loudonize” other parts of the country. [**Please CONTRIBUTE NOW to help Parents Against Critical Theory expand the fight against Critical Race Theory from Virginia to EVERY state in the Nation. >>**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE2LWE2ZDAyZGNhYWE5ODQ4YWVhYjRmMDY5YjA2Yzc5ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9zY290dC1tLXBhY3QtcGFyZW50cy1hZ2FpbnN0LWNyaXRpY2FsLXRoZW9yeS0zNGVkMGY2Ny1kN2JmLTQ2YTQtOTZmMi1kOWMyY2Q4YTEwMjkvcGFjdF9hZV9tbV9sb3Vkb3VuaXplXzExMTEyMT9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BRV9GRk8xMTEyMjAyMQ&K=hs4bGtlxjZLWbOD4f6eXdA) Parents Against Critical Theory was formed in Loudoun County, otherwise known as Ground Zero in the fight against Critical Race Theory. We educated parents on the dangers of Critical Race Theory, organized protests against the school board, and ultimately we’ve dealt a MAJOR BLOW to CRT in Loudoun County and the Commonwealth of Virginia. We call this process “to Loudounize.” [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE2LWE2ZDAyZGNhYWE5ODQ4YWVhYjRmMDY5YjA2Yzc5ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9zY290dC1tLXBhY3QtcGFyZW50cy1hZ2FpbnN0LWNyaXRpY2FsLXRoZW9yeS0zNGVkMGY2Ny1kN2JmLTQ2YTQtOTZmMi1kOWMyY2Q4YTEwMjkvcGFjdF9hZV9tbV9sb3Vkb3VuaXplXzExMTEyMT9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BRV9GRk8xMTEyMjAyMQ&K=3Vv-hnbWCWmi6LYyEr8FRQ)When parents are educated, equipped, and rallied to FIGHT BACK against Critical Race Theory in their local communities, that’s “Loudounizing” In Loudoun County, we’ve built a framework to keep Critical Race Theory OUT of our children’s schools. If you’re interested in “Loudonizing” your community, please consider supporting Parents Against Critical Race Theory HERE: [SUPPORT PARENTS AGAINST CRITICAL THEORY](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/6/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjIxMzE2LWE2ZDAyZGNhYWE5ODQ4YWVhYjRmMDY5YjA2Yzc5ZDY0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMTI2MDY0NDI4Mg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9zY290dC1tLXBhY3QtcGFyZW50cy1hZ2FpbnN0LWNyaXRpY2FsLXRoZW9yeS0zNGVkMGY2Ny1kN2JmLTQ2YTQtOTZmMi1kOWMyY2Q4YTEwMjkvcGFjdF9hZV9tbV9sb3Vkb3VuaXplXzExMTEyMT9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BRV9GRk8xMTEyMjAyMQ&K=54ze_KoxN0iLe4vcPcFKMQ)Thank you again for your support! WE, Virginia parents, carried Glenn Youngkin to victory. Let’s never forget the power parents have when we stand together in defense of our children. Sincerely, Parents Against Critical Theory

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I will never be silenced for doing my job, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749792:J96Bl_2kN:m:1:3253819041:C33C4EC497756932370460C19D32AF48:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749792:J96Bl_2kN:m:1:3253819041:C33C4EC497756932370460C19D32AF48:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749792:J96Bl_2kN:m:1:3253819041:C33C4EC497756932370460C19D32AF48:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749792:J96Bl_2kN:m:1:3253819041:C33C4EC497756932370460C19D32AF48:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749792:J96Bl_2kN:m:1:3253819041:C33C4EC497756932370460C19D32AF48:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749792:J96Bl_2kN:m:1:3253819041:C33C4EC497756932370460C19D32AF48:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749792:J96Bl_2kN:m:1:3253819041:C33C4EC497756932370460C19D32AF48:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749792:J96Bl_2kN:m:1:3253819041:C33C4EC497756932370460C19D32AF48:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749792:J96Bl_2kN:m:1:3253819041:C33C4EC497756932370460C19D32AF48:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58749792:J96Bl_2kN:m:1:3253819041:C33C4EC497756932370460C19D32AF48:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

Shontel Brown

As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Hey friends,
Let’s take a little trip through the FEC filings of Scott Franklin’s 2020 election campaign.
During his campaign, Franklin received _more than $400,000_ in support from “Wingman PAC.” Two things about this:
1. This is a _perfect_ example of the serious problem we have in this country with money in politics. PACs like this—literally called single-candidate super PACs—allow corporations, shady interest groups, and super wealthy individuals to give far, far beyond the legal limit of $2,900 per individual.
2. Guess who personally contributed $77,000 to Wingman PAC (plus $2,000 directly to the campaign)1 to prop up the insurrectionist, anti-worker, anti-choice guy that’s our current Congressman? **None other than fellow insurrectionist, anti-worker, anti-choice Florida Congressman Matt Gaetz.**

[**As if Franklin’s own voting record wasn’t bad enough, this just further goes to show why we cannot let him spend another term in Congress. Donate to help me defeat him — just imagine each dollar you donate as another door hitting Franklin on his way out of the Capitol building.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38564546/316016741/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211112gaetzfranklin_EG_openers_SLB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY0OWMxZi1kYTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMrxUVHQEpgAmdIEAn5lodyg0XRdc9AvZLPrgES4pZU=)
(Franklin _also_ voted against stripping extremist Rep. Marjorie Taylor-Greene of her committee assignments after she called for members of Congress to be assassinated, and I’m putting this in a parenthetical because it doesn’t fit into the horrible-politicians-from-my-home-state, but it does go to show what kind of guy Scott Franklin is!)
Even worse, he apparently takes pride in his friendship with Gaetz, going so far as to 1) shamelessly tweet about it and 2) make a really lazy pun about Wingman PAC. Yeesh.

[**Chip in a few dollars to help me flip Florida’s 15th District blue, and get the “wingmen” (🤢) out of Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38564554/316016749/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211112gaetzfranklin_EG_openers_SLB_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY0OWMxZi1kYTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cMrxUVHQEpgAmdIEAn5lodyg0XRdc9AvZLPrgES4pZU=)

name: John Kovacs
subject: I’ll Put Working Nevadans First, Fellow Conservative.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN KOVACS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Help me take back our country in 2022. Learn more.>>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/3be0d747bfcaa106/eeaf31402dc84295c3d6b838967d376c/37373)
---
Fellow Conservative, I’ve spent my life in the private sector building a successful construction business. I know what it means to create jobs and make the economy hum. I learned many important economic lessons over the years. And I’ll use this experience to help relieve the financial pressures facing Nevadans. **Democrat Susie Lee, on the other hand, has never created a job and seems more interested in rubber-stamping Joe Biden’s left-wing policies, which are causing the aforementioned economic hardship in Southern Nevada**. That’s why I’m asking for your help to defeat Susie Lee in 2022, take back the House, and block Biden’s far-left agenda. Will you donate now to support my America First campaign?
---
[**CONTRIBUTE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/3be0d747bfcaa106/e3d1a98a538c4f69c3d6b838967d376c/37373)
---
Fellow Conservative, after spending three decades in the construction industry, I know the struggles our small businessmen and employees are facing. And I’ll fight every day to get the federal government off their back. So please **[contribute whatever you can](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/3be0d747bfcaa106/b7982b594e2b0a20c3d6b838967d376c/37373)** to help me win this race and take back our country next year. THANK YOU for your support!
-John Kovacs

Over the last two weeks, **_world leaders came together at the United Nations Climate Change Conference (COP26) to renew their commitment to solving the climate crisis._**

More than 100 nations pledged to cut methane emissions, fund initiatives for green energy products, end deforestation and more. But we need more _direct action to solve our climate crisis_ , and progressive leaders can help drive the change we desperately need.

NextGen PAC is working to elect progressive leaders who will go above and beyond to save our planet. body:

My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Andres Pico endorses Erik Aadland
body:
| | | |
---
| (Nov. 10, 2021)
U.S. Senate Candidate Erik Aadland's campaign announces the endorsement of Colorado State Representative Andres (Andy) Pico, from Colorado Springs.
Pico represents District 16, that includes part of El Paso County, and has been a long-time leader in policymaking. He is a former Colorado Springs City Council member and was the past chair of both the Colorado Springs Utilities and Pikes Peak Area Council of Governments board of directors.
A fiscal conservative with a background in utility policy and a concern for energy management, Pico said Aadland had his full support.
"As we head into winter, I am very concerned about the skyrocketing cost of energy, and how people will suffer just to heat their homes. Across the nation and in Colorado we are facing an Energy Crisis this winter due to the short-sighted policies of the Biden and Polis regimes." said Pico. "Erik understands energy and the importance of both affordability and reliability. While Democrats have pie-in-the-sky plans to burden Coloradans--and Americans--with paying for a Green New Deal that doesn't and will never work, Erik will find solutions to not only protect our natural resources but make our country energy independent once again."
In addition to making energy safe, reliable, inexpensive, and powered by free-market principles, Aadland and Pico share other values. Both are strong voices for reviving the economy and job recovery; restoring law and order to our neighborhoods; preserving Second Amendment rights; and school choice, among others.
"I'm grateful to have the endorsement from someone who has fought long and hard for the people of Colorado Springs and El Paso County," said Aadland. "Representative Pico has long put people at the heart of issues, and I'm honored to have his support."
---
| |
---
| For more information, contact [Chris Rourke ](mailto:chrisrourke@aaldandforcolorado.com)(419)733-4302

name: Team Heinrich
subject: A two-generation approach to lifting families out of poverty (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Sign the petition >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38566191/316023695/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211112_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzVjMWEyMi1lMDQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etBxSH8MXSSuddCTeIXDmAZYseb-p9ksoF80x4joFtg=&emci=b95c1a22-e043-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=bc5c1a22-e043-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, with the _Build Back Better Act_ , we have the opportunity to address New Mexico and our country’s health care worker shortage and lift low-income families out of poverty at the same time. That’s why Martin has fought hard to include his _Pathways to Health Careers Act_ in the Build Back Better framework. This policy will build on the successful Health Profession Opportunity Grant to help families secure good-paying careers in the health care industry — providing child care, transportation, and career coaching. The _Pathways to Health Careers Act_ puts an emphasis on people who need support the most in rural and Tribal communities — as well as people in all 50 states. It also builds on Martin’s two-generation approach to ending poverty: supporting parents and children at the same time. **Please, join Martin in calling on the Senate to include the _Pathways to Health Careers Act_ in the Build Back Better framework. It’s the best way to train more highly qualified health care workers and address generational poverty.** **[**Add your name to show the widespread support for moving this legislation forward:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38566192/316023696/-84862330?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211112_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzVjMWEyMi1lMDQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etBxSH8MXSSuddCTeIXDmAZYseb-p9ksoF80x4joFtg=&emci=b95c1a22-e043-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=bc5c1a22-e043-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38566193/316023697/-84862330?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211112_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzVjMWEyMi1lMDQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etBxSH8MXSSuddCTeIXDmAZYseb-p9ksoF80x4joFtg=&emci=b95c1a22-e043-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=bc5c1a22-e043-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: $1,000,000 to stop Twitter Censorship
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752339:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58752340:JKU1G_26N:m:1:3298722022:4FA54365DF83EB30E601D30D3DC704D4:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: 120 Years in the making
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59131325:WLCcIyHNl:m:1:2247059263:5195AD070094DC3D7D296C1D85F76217:r)
---
Peter,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I'm helping to change that narrative. I'm not a **"coconut"** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I'm certainly not a **"self-hating Latino,"** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I'm running for Congress in Texas' 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I'm running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn't get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I'm a fighter - I never give up. So, I'm running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59131325:WLCcIyHNl:m:1:2247059263:5195AD070094DC3D7D296C1D85F76217:r)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59131325:WLCcIyHNl:m:1:2247059263:5195AD070094DC3D7D296C1D85F76217:r)
I've been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the "Year of the Republican Woman" when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don't have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59131325:WLCcIyHNl:m:1:2247059263:5195AD070094DC3D7D296C1D85F76217:r)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59131325:WLCcIyHNl:m:1:2247059263:5195AD070094DC3D7D296C1D85F76217:r)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, "being Democrat, it's just what you do."

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents' generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can't do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that's why I'm asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you're a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you're not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can't expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59131325:WLCcIyHNl:m:1:2247059263:5195AD070094DC3D7D296C1D85F76217:r)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_"If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now."_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59131325:WLCcIyHNl:m:1:2247059263:5195AD070094DC3D7D296C1D85F76217:r)

| Paid for by Monica for Congress
---
