name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- November 12, 2021 ****-** Hoosier Democrats just delivered big time once again for Indiana. Last Friday, President Joe Biden’s Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal (BID) passed the U.S. House of Representatives and will be signed into law on Monday. This legislation marks the largest federal investment in infrastructure in more than a decade and will ensure a better future for Hoosier families. This comes as Democrats’ American Rescue Plan has already delivered $250 million to Indiana for broadband expansion, $5.8 billion for Indiana local governments, and over $2 billion to fully fund our public schools. Let’s look at a few highlights from the Democrats’ latest game-changing investment in Indiana:
* $7 billion to revitalize roads and bridges in Indiana’s 92 counties
* $680 million to improve public transportation systems for Indiana’s cities
* $100 million to expand broadband internet access
* $751 million to bring safe, clean drinking water to all Hoosiers
* $20 million to fight extreme weather events across Indiana
* $100 million to expand Indiana’s electric vehicle charging network

More details on the bipartisan bill’s impact can be found by [clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38571558/316051259/-722644037?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWM5Y2YwZC1mNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vSxIb57KDMjZXMEbAL3FOH8wafcaVERjQoCd4I9SC4=&emci=0fd3ee62-c343-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f5c9cf0d-f543-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535). Indiana Democrats are already on the road letting Hoosiers know how they’ve been delivering for our state. As we continue our “[Small Town, Indiana](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38571559/316051260/1276187964?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWM5Y2YwZC1mNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vSxIb57KDMjZXMEbAL3FOH8wafcaVERjQoCd4I9SC4=&emci=0fd3ee62-c343-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f5c9cf0d-f543-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535)'' tour, we want to celebrate with you this historic investment in our roads and bridges, water systems, and, ultimately, our families. Is infrastructure investment socialism? Yes, according to the entire Indiana Republican Party. Even as bipartisan groups like the Indiana Chamber of Commerce and the National Governors Association endorsed President Biden’s transformational infrastructure bill, every Indiana Republican - including Todd Young, Victoria Spartz, and Jackie Walorski - voted “NO” on investments towards fixing Indiana’s roads and bridges, supplying clean and safe water, and expanding broadband access. Using the INGOP’s logic, the 13 Republican House Members and 19 Republican U.S. Senators (including Sen. Mitch McConnell) who voted for the bipartisan bill are “socialists”, as well as Governor Holcomb’s [READI program](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38571560/316051261/-1180238315?FFF.11.05.21.=FFF.11.05.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWM5Y2YwZC1mNTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7vSxIb57KDMjZXMEbAL3FOH8wafcaVERjQoCd4I9SC4=&emci=0fd3ee62-c343-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=f5c9cf0d-f543-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535). This form of dangerous partisanship is preventing Indiana from having a government that works for the people. The Indiana Republican Party, however, has been happy to talk about infrastructure when meeting with voters. In fact, politicians like Todd Young, Mike Braun, and Victoria Spartz have too often campaigned on issues like broadband during political events. Their “NO” on the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal is another example on how the INGOP would rather put their extreme partisanship ahead of a better tomorrow for Hoosiers.

Let’s review the scorecard on who kept their infrastructure campaign promises: (R) Senator Todd Young ❌
(R) Senator Mike Braun ❌
(D) Representative Frank Mrvan ✅
(R) Representative Jackie Walorski ❌
(R) Representative Jim Banks ❌
(R) Representative Jim Baird ❌
(R) Representative Victoria Spartz ❌
(R) Representative Greg Pence ❌
(D) Representative André Carson ✅
(R) Representative Larry Bucshon ❌
(R) Representative Trey Hollingsworth ❌ A bombshell report this week found that Mike Braun broke federal campaign finance laws and cheated his way to a win during the 2018 U.S. Senate elections. Like the rest of the Indiana Republican Party, Braun is showing Hoosiers they do not respect Hoosier values. They would rather cheat the system and use misinformation to scare voters in order to win elections. Please see the full response by INDems Chairman Mike Schmuhl: _“It’s clear from the reporting that came out this morning that Mike Braun broke the law and stole a United States Senate seat in 2018. Today, Hoosiers need to ask themselves a sobering question: Do we have an illegitimately elected U.S. senator? Braun used $8.5 million of ‘apparent prohibited loans’ to fuel his campaign – an amount of money that made his campaign much more competitive. Hoosiers deserve answers and the Indiana Democratic Party is calling on all jurisdictions to investigate potential criminality related to Braun’s campaign, businesses, or personal finances. The Department of Justice and the United States Attorney for the Southern District of Indiana should determine whether federal laws were broken. The Indiana Attorney General also should look into any wrongdoing with state law, particularly those related to tax records._ _This is a sad day for the integrity of our elections in the Hoosier State. In January of this year, Mike Braun was ready to overturn our democracy by voting not to certify the presidential election results. It took an insurrection to change his mind. As it turns out, though, he likely rigged an election earlier, where he allegedly broke federal election law and cheated his way to his so-called victory. _ _I hope Hoosiers across Indiana of every political viewpoint will join us as we demand answers – and justice – in the weeks and months ahead. This is a critical time for our state and country, and Indiana can’t have as one of its senators someone who doesn’t deserve to be representing us.”_

The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.

* * *
#### Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

* * *
#### Intern Duties
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

* * *
#### Qualifications
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

* * *
#### Start/End Dates and Schedule
Applications for the Spring of 2022 are now being accepted until December 10, 2021. We are not currently accepting applications for the Summer of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 – 30 hours per week. Schedule flexibility is a possibility. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities also are a possibility.
* * *
#### How to Apply
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org.

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- November 12, 2021 - Hoosier Democrats just delivered big time once again for Indiana. Last Friday, President Joe Biden’s Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal (BID) passed the U.S. House of Representatives and will be signed into law on Monday. This legislation marks the largest federal investment in infrastructure in more than a decade and will ensure a better future for Hoosier families. This comes as Democrats’ American Rescue Plan has already delivered $250 million to Indiana for broadband expansion, $5.8 billion for Indiana local governments, and over $2 billion to fully fund our public schools. Let’s look at a few highlights from the Democrats’ latest game-changing investment in Indiana: $7 billion to revitalize roads and bridges in Indiana’s 92 counties $680 million to improve public transportation systems for Indiana’s cities $100 million to expand broadband internet access $751 million to bring safe, clean drinking water to all Hoosiers $20 million to fight extreme weather events across Indiana $100 million to expand Indiana’s electric vehicle charging network More details on the bipartisan bill’s impact can be found by . Indiana Democrats are already on the road letting Hoosiers know how they’ve been delivering for our state. As we continue our “'' tour, we want to celebrate with you this historic investment in our roads and bridges, water systems, and, ultimately, our families. Is infrastructure investment socialism? Yes, according to the entire Indiana Republican Party. Even as bipartisan groups like the Indiana Chamber of Commerce and the National Governors Association endorsed President Biden’s transformational infrastructure bill, every Indiana Republican - including Todd Young, Victoria Spartz, and Jackie Walorski - voted “NO” on investments towards fixing Indiana’s roads and bridges, supplying clean and safe water, and expanding broadband access. Using the INGOP’s logic, the 13 Republican House Members and 19 Republican U.S. Senators (including Sen. Mitch McConnell) who voted for the bipartisan bill are “socialists”, as well as Governor Holcomb’s . This form of dangerous partisanship is preventing Indiana from having a government that works for the people. The Indiana Republican Party, however, has been happy to talk about infrastructure when meeting with voters. In fact, politicians like Todd Young, Mike Braun, and Victoria Spartz have too often campaigned on issues like broadband during political events. Their “NO” on the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal is another example on how the INGOP would rather put their extreme partisanship ahead of a better tomorrow for Hoosiers. Let’s review the scorecard on who kept their infrastructure campaign promises: (R) Senator Todd Young ❌ (R) Senator Mike Braun ❌ (D) Representative Frank Mrvan ✅ (R) Representative Jackie Walorski ❌ (R) Representative Jim Banks ❌ (R) Representative Jim Baird ❌ (R) Representative Victoria Spartz ❌ (R) Representative Greg Pence ❌ (D) Representative André Carson ✅ (R) Representative Larry Bucshon ❌ (R) Representative Trey Hollingsworth ❌ A bombshell report this week found that Mike Braun broke federal campaign finance laws and cheated his way to a win during the 2018 U.S. Senate elections. Like the rest of the Indiana Republican Party, Braun is showing Hoosiers they do not respect Hoosier values. They would rather cheat the system and use misinformation to scare voters in order to win elections. Please see the full response by INDems Chairman Mike Schmuhl: “It’s clear from the reporting that came out this morning that Mike Braun broke the law and stole a United States Senate seat in 2018. Today, Hoosiers need to ask themselves a sobering question: Do we have an illegitimately elected U.S. senator? Braun used $8.5 million of ‘apparent prohibited loans’ to fuel his campaign – an amount of money that made his campaign much more competitive. Hoosiers deserve answers and the Indiana Democratic Party is calling on all jurisdictions to investigate potential criminality related to Braun’s campaign, businesses, or personal finances. The Department of Justice and the United States Attorney for the Southern District of Indiana should determine whether federal laws were broken. The Indiana Attorney General also should look into any wrongdoing with state law, particularly those related to tax records. This is a sad day for the integrity of our elections in the Hoosier State. In January of this year, Mike Braun was ready to overturn our democracy by voting not to certify the presidential election results. It took an insurrection to change his mind. As it turns out, though, he likely rigged an election earlier, where he allegedly broke federal election law and cheated his way to his so-called victory. I hope Hoosiers across Indiana of every political viewpoint will join us as we demand answers – and justice – in the weeks and months ahead. This is a critical time for our state and country, and Indiana can’t have as one of its senators someone who doesn’t deserve to be representing us.” \- Annual Holiday Party - Get Your Tickets Here: = \- Spring Interns 2022 - The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Runaway Inflation Is A Travesty
body:
Biden’s spending is reckless and abusive.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uD94AGiOIWrirJakOS7ZmQaDPXsDO4ZiGJiqF7MZzB_oJ4_4w8JVz6pDLODVfirqeDAeyB697rbcIIOVd8-M6lysVP2L56mBdLvOOe4LRky6HaG_3Ym3QZdbEjHrgP-qlKw1nP542GmYXGRn6o-di_1SrDjBWN9S&c=90fL3BuVSzQXtAXdSHox6mwM3WR8LpC4KV4GunXgfKUSD5XWiNncmg==&ch=pCFen5_HEXJPjB2mpteegeM7fZX-oPlHvlwG92qYL1fgIEYcDJAnjg==)
---
|
---
|
# Your hard-earned money should keep its value
---
I'm sure you've noticed that everything is getting more expensive. Unfortunately, today's inflation is a completely avoidable, self-inflicted wound. It's entirely due to the economic illiteracy and persistent overreach of the Biden administration and the Democrat-controlled Congress--yet another of the contrived crises that have been their hallmark since taking power. To be clear, rising prices for consumer goods are more than an inconvenience. Many of our fellow citizens will face financial hardship as necessities become more expensive. And the problems run deeper. To say that goods cost more is to say that dollars are losing their value. Over time the erosion of purchasing power and savings serves as a hidden tax that disproportionately affects the less well-off. Our ballooning national debt, and the devaluation of the dollar that necessarily follows, is effectively a wealth transfer from those who can ill afford it to those who have the most direct access to the money created. "Free" benefits trickle down, but they are trivial prizes in a losing game. Unrestrained deficit spending will destroy our economic potential and condemn our children to servitude under debt incurred to benefit only a select few. The only way to stop the bleeding is to vote out these inept practitioners of big government and replace them with servant leaders who will responsibly steward our resources.
As your next Colorado Senator, I pledge to be one of those leaders. It's my honor to earn your support.

clean_body: Biden’s spending is reckless and abusive. | | | | == | | Your hard-earned money should keep its value I'm sure you've noticed that everything is getting more expensive. Unfortunately, today's inflation is a completely avoidable, self-inflicted wound. It's entirely due to the economic illiteracy and persistent overreach of the Biden administration and the Democrat-controlled Congress--yet another of the contrived crises that have been their hallmark since taking power. To be clear, rising prices for consumer goods are more than an inconvenience. Many of our fellow citizens will face financial hardship as necessities become more expensive. And the problems run deeper. To say that goods cost more is to say that dollars are losing their value. Over time the erosion of purchasing power and savings serves as a hidden tax that disproportionately affects the less well-off. Our ballooning national debt, and the devaluation of the dollar that necessarily follows, is effectively a wealth transfer from those who can ill afford it to those who have the most direct access to the money created. "Free" benefits trickle down, but they are trivial prizes in a losing game. Unrestrained deficit spending will destroy our economic potential and condemn our children to servitude under debt incurred to benefit only a select few. The only way to stop the bleeding is to vote out these inept practitioners of big government and replace them with servant leaders who will responsibly steward our resources. As your next Colorado Senator, I pledge to be one of those leaders. It's my honor to earn your support. | | | | | == | | | | == | You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker opposing irresponsible fiscal policy that steals from the fruits of your labo. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you,your children and the future of our country. | | == | Together we can stand against the destructive economic policies of a heartless Biden administration. I need your support today | | | == PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Senate | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

From the failed withdrawal from Afghanistan, to a record amount of illegal immigrants crossing our Southern border, sky-rocketing gas prices, and a major supply chain shortage, Joe Biden has shown the full effects of his socialist policies. Under President Trump’s leadership, we were respected on the world stage, had a BOOMING economy with record low unemployment rates, gas was more than HALF the price of what it is now, and we had a SECURE Southern border with record LOW border crossings. Fellow Conservative, I have one question for you: Do you miss President Trump? YES NO We can’t let Biden and the Radical Left get away with destroying our country any longer. >"> Complete the poll now and help continue building the Red Wave for 2022 and 2024: >>> Thank you, Jim Banks, Chairman House Conservatives Fund Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. name: Holly HQ
subject: Our Biggest Milestone Yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, many Americans predicted another loss for the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill when controversy stirred within the Democratic Party on Friday.
But our hope was not totally lost .
We saw 215 Democrats and 13 Republicans step up for their constituents and support a bill that 66% of America wants. The Biden Administration has shown what can happen when we reach across the aisle and work together for the benefit of our Nation. That's why after decades of promises, it is finally infrastructure week .
Marjorie Taylor Greene voted against this historic legislation, one that would directly impact Northwest Georgians. This bill includes funding for essential roads and bridges as well as high speed broadband, public transit, and bold climate policy. This is the biggest economic bill to pass in our history, and GA-14 will finally have access to things we have been begging for.
We're one step closer to Building Back Better. And we're one step closer to working together for the benefit of all Americans.
Help us continue this forward progress,
Team Holly.

We saw 215 Democrats and 13 Republicans step up for their constituents and support a bill that 66% of America wants. The Biden Administration has shown what can happen when we reach across the aisle and work together for the benefit of our Nation. name: Michael
subject: Did You See Jake's Email Yesterday?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_jake_s_email&n=1)
---
Did you see the email our president, Jake Duesenberg, sent yesterday on Veteran's Day? Please take a look below... Peter, What is this country becoming? We've fought wars over the ideas that are growing mainstream amongst our Political Elite. Many of you don't know, but I served 12 years in the Army as an infantry officer. I did two tours of duty overseas and at one point, sat in the chair of a tyrant, who Veterans before me overtook and defeated. At 12 years I realized the battle for American liberty wasn't on the battlefield of Iraq, instead it was against the Political Elite who were shredding our Constitution and destroying our dollar. So I got involved in politics. In 2005, then Master Sergeant Tim Walz, was tapped to lead soldiers on the 1st Brigade, 34th Infantry Division's deployment to Iraq. Before the unit mobilized, Walz saw an opportunity to join the ranks of the Political Elite in Washington D.C., so he retired, dodged the deployment, and ran for Congress.
## Walz abandoned troops for a conquest in political power.
In 2020, Walz the traitor, showed his true colors. He unilaterally declared an emergency, put COVID patients in nursing homes, locked Minnesotans in their houses, shut down businesses and eventually mandated masks. He took on the same kind of powers of tyrants who our Veterans have fought against. **Now Walz joins the ranks of the Political Elite who are trampling on the health freedom of Americans - and even our children. Forced vaccinations are an unAmerican ideal. We are witnessing an unprecedented attack on our liberties.** It's getting so bad, that in Queensland, Australia, unvaccinated citizens are being denied health care and restricted from going to bars, restaurants, and other public venues. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/unvaccinated_in_queensland_denied_hospital_care?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_jake_s_email&n=2) But don't think this erosion of liberty only happens across the ocean from us. Denial of service is happening in our own country from New York to California due to government dictates. **And if we had not Ended Walz' Emergency Powers in June, this may have been our fate as well.** But the battle is not over. Traitors to the Constitution like Tim Walz are not done trampling on our rights. If he sees an opportunity to gain more power at the mercy of our liberties, he'll take it. That's why Action 4 Liberty is so important. My team of young liberty professionals and patriotic volunteers are the defenders of liberty in Minnesota. And I could not be more honored to lead this team! **Jake, I want to make an appeal to you on this Veteran's Day. We are losing this country that was fought on many battlefronts by our veterans. Because of traitors like Tim Walz and his buddies in the Political Class, we are constantly needing to defend liberty.** I need your help to keep pressuring the Political Elite and hold Walz accountable. They want us to go away. They want us to fail. But we will not give up on our mission to protect liberty. **Please support my team, which includes Ryan, a Navy Veteran - they are fighting every day for your freedoms against the Political Class who want to destroy this country.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_jake_s_email&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_jake_s_email&n=3)
---
The results of Virginia's election are huge. Patriots are waking up to the tyrannical overtaking of our country and our schools. They are poised and ready to hold the Political Elite accountable.
Minnesota needs a major course correction like Virginia. Walz must be held accountable for what he did. And his desire to continue to erode our liberties and health freedom must be STOPPED!
You have a say in this whole battle. By supporting my team, you can fund the resistance to the Political Elite and Tim Walz!
**But I have to be blunt with you. We have had to exhaust our resources fighting against Walz and the Political Class this year and we may not be able to continue this mission without your support.**
If we can keep these young liberty professionals on board, fighting in the trenches, the Political Elite will not beat us. Please help us out.
[**Make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to support our operations so we can STOP Tim Walz' attacks on our freedoms!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_jake_s_email&n=4)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Freedom Email · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_jake_s_email&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_jake_s_email&n=6), software for leaders.

name: MorganHarper.org
subject: “Working-class hero” or multi-millionaire tech funded fabricator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
J.D. Vance is reluctant to share his finances for a reason
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211112-390-footer-ak&t=2&akid=390%2E90090%2Ed5rttK)
Our Republican opponent J.D. Vance is making headlines for all the wrong reasons:
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14388?t=3&akid=390%2E90090%2Ed5rttK)
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14388?t=4&akid=390%2E90090%2Ed5rttK)
J.D. Vance works hard to portray himself as a “working-class hero” who bucks the elite institutions of the nation and rejects establishment Republicans for taking money from Big Tech:
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14388?t=5&akid=390%2E90090%2Ed5rttK)
J.D. Vance is dragging his feet to disclose his finances because he doesn’t want Ohioans to see him for what he really is — a venture capitalist, startup Republican who is in fact bankrolled by Big Tech and DOES NOT embody any of his so-called values.
[**_If you’re tired of politicians who don’t live the values they portray to their constituents please join us and donate $5 to our campaign today. You can trust Morgan because she’s lived her values and has NEVER flip-flopped._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14388?t=6&akid=390%2E90090%2Ed5rttK)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14394?refcode=em20211112-390&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=390%2E90090%2Ed5rttK)**
**J.D. Vance has jumped from start-up to start-up eventually founding his own venture-capital firm in Ohio.** Investors in his $100 million fund include the billionaire tech mogul Peter Thiel.
J.D. Vance has received $10 million dollars for his campaign from Peter Thiel, and he is funding a pro-Vance super PAC. **They also**** _just hosted_****an intimate dinner for a staggering $10,800 a ticket.**
_Doesn’t exactly scream working-class, or salt of the earth now does it..._
J.D. Vance likes to pretend like he’s different from other corporate politicians when really **he is the exact same**. He can’t relate to the vast majority of Ohioans, and he makes his money through Big Tech and corporate funds.
[**_Let’s show J.D. Vance that his hate and lies have no place in Ohio. We’re ready for a new type of bold, progressive representation_****. Are you? If you are, please donate $5 to help fuel our campaign today.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/14388?t=26&akid=390%2E90090%2Ed5rttK)

name: Conor Lamb
subject: Friend, I won't let them get away with attacking you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38572576/316055588/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmM0YjgzOC1mYjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2ZtqWTWnNnpOgN3xfawX1w1In9cr0SjlyzvUwq1QXY=)

Friend --

With the Democratic primary heating up, some of the political insiders in the race have decided to start attacking me, you, and everything we're fighting for in this election.

I'm not worried about their attacks on me and my family -- I've heard it all before, and I can take it.

Negative attacks are just what politicians and political insiders do these days. But I won't let them get away with attacking and undermining the grassroots support of Democratic activists, brothers and sisters in labor, and working families who have joined this campaign.

You've all done so much already. You are the reason Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and Sean Parnell lose sleep at night. You are the people I think about every day in Congress.

But we can't let up.

**[And we can't let all of our hard work be undermined by misleading attacks. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The fight of my career...
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
When I was a young attorney, I had the privilege of representing the United States as an Assistant U.S. Attorney in Los Angeles. It was a thrill to go into the courtroom each day, and introduce myself as appearing “on behalf of the United States.” One of my most high-profile cases involved an FBI agent who was charged with spying on the United States on behalf of the Soviet Union. It was a classic “sex for secrets” case involving a Soviet asset named, of course, Svetlana. The FBI agent, Richard Miller, was convicted. Little did I know at the time, but I would see the same Russian tradecraft that targets Americans who are greedy and prone to extramarital affairs employed when an unscrupulous New York businessman became president of the United States. Nor could I have imagined that one day, the greatest threat to our democracy would come from within. Protecting our democracy has become the core of my work in Congress. And that fight isn’t over. Not by a long shot. In fact, it’s only just begun. Republicans across the country are wreaking havoc on our norms, our voting rights, and our democracy. And their attacks are purposeful. This isn’t hyperbole. It’s real. Voter suppression is their mission – and they are succeeding. Passing bills to suppress the vote in Texas, Florida, Georgia, and so many other places. And they are also preparing to overturn a presidential election if it again doesn’t go their way. **Today, as we face this existential threat to our democracy, I’m asking for your support. If you can, please consider pitching in $3, $5, or anything meaningful to my campaign. I refuse to back down from fights to protect our democracy – I never have, and I never will.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38572581/316055621/-751938712?express_lane=true&amount=3&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20211112_PM1_V2_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTBiMTRlZC1mYTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tSw5xlHlmSRSPd9WpvP7jUMPVe52awwWscrF0qo86TI=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Fraud: 25,000 dead on voter rolls
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Audit Michigan |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7bce3ec5c4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
While I am enraged at the never-ending stories of voter fraud arising around the nation, [I am nonetheless proud that I have been central to launching this nation-wide movement for Election Integrity! ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=56b0d77406&e=44b8c466b0)

**Patriots around the country are looking, and finding, more evidence of voter fraud. All eyes need to be open and we need to stay on high-alert!**

Look at what just happened in Michigan.

Just Wednesday, a lawsuit was filed against the Michigan Secretary of State revealed more that more than 25,000 dead Americans were left on the voter rolls!

**This was discovered after cross referencing voter rolls with commercially available databases. Tens of thousands of names were left on the books post-mortem.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b50c716546&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Moreover, the Public Interest Legal Foundation, the plaintiff’s law firm, uncovered that there were at least 334 registered to vote _after they had died_._

**There’s a reason we have laws, folks. Simple laws, when broken, can have disastrous consequences.**

The National Voter Registration Act of 1993 clearly states:

_“Conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove the names [of deceased voters]._

We are far beyond the times where some things just don’t need to be said. _This was said, was broken, and now we have President Biden._

**This lawsuit represents an important strike against the thieves who stole the 2020 election and an important milestone for the Election Integrity movement.**

_The Federalist_ reports:

_In its 20-page complaint, the PILF detailed efforts it had made beginning in the run-up to the 2020 election to ensure Michigan voter rolls did not include deceased individuals. After obtaining data from the state in early 2020 and then hiring a data analysis expert who cross-checked the data against commercial databases and information obtained from the Social Security Administration, the PILF determined the current Michigan rolls included approximately tens of thousands of individuals who appeared deceased._

_After providing that information to the Michigan secretary of state, the PILF re-ran the data at several junctions to determine if Benson had addressed the problem, but 94 percent of the individuals identified remain on the official rolls. Yet when the PILF sought to inspect the state’s records under the provisions of the National Voter Registration Act, Michigan’s secretary of state refused them access._

_Further investigation by the PILF revealed evidence indicating 334 individuals had registered to vote after their deaths. “Without further inquiry,” the nonprofit’s claim says, “there is no way to know for certain whether these post-death registrations are the result of identity theft, data input error, or for some other reasons.”_

**While it is necessary that this lawsuit bear fruit to bring to justice those who have wronged American Democracy, it is by no means sufficient.**

My plan as the Conservative, pro-Trump, Election Integrity candidate for Secretary of State of Arizona is to not only hunt down and investigate past fraud, but to prevent future fraud.

**This is why there are two critical pieces of my campaign.**
1. **We MUST Audit Pima county. There is substantial evidence of fraud in Arizona’s second largest county, and we cannot allow this crime to remain uninvestigated. _Help us Audit Pima!_**
2. **We MUST secure future elections.** **I have pioneered and developed in conjunction with third party developers a highly secure, currency grade, authentication process for ballots. This will guarantee that future elections are secure. [_Join my Arizona Ballot Integrity Project!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=dee3721436&e=44b8c466b0)**

---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=137bbaf2bf&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Through this two pronged approach of punishing past crimes against American Democracy and taking every measure possible to lock down and protect future elections, this will make Arizona the safest state in the Union for American elections.

**I have been a businessman and a process engineer, and I know that it is not enough to identify the problem. We must bring a solution. And that is what I am doing in my campaign for Arizona Secretary of State.**

[**Can you help me make Arizona the safest place in America for Democracy?**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=19a9b977b4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5335a20791&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=038243d0c6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=db85dcb6c6&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6c375a02a9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6c375a02a9).
---

Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d9e627da19534290be7ca3c15d9ad086&_e=ieLAjU-aTkTa-72K9ZQgjSNtRbZaDjiwlxY-KFTeeLg72_o6oiCGx6G1_StIykGyTUT1xXB-GDqe3CbChbJH9WDtj4Ui-JWHg1UQ-3Tdt4_f1t6jSTYXMu_qX8BNieG9b7pB1q5ysfss7xIfVbWF4xbKD-5eMFe8XAgu8t2RtuPbOxlCfrxStbFjvmMlKmqCi6nSGbeKoLA72U6QLqq4hGWeRIoz8ak9gLb_1e89x2zeQ8XoRCwzLuGQPwg-W1zESLUquD-LUW-rvlIsJCRVeUTMrX0YW0wd6VHDfWVpJb7FJh8wOvPjqdxrozMSMxLMlR2PX_Pe7zmwHJpvJpkQr4NHESz8wL6mBU3L222UjQyEE3Ko-PmEEhVhu3BhNZ1rv5Y30r3Q9pXbkMp-B0bwdO8NT8So8NtfWtTiNTzJfNtgI5NS7bTDhNdXUPcSwkpN6rIsdQS71tRXwHQG8kYlETSJgAGx_40wQahch9alWXY0eQrgiDm7f1NxHpcA-NwiLpWk3BY1C5uVyZ3KTuO_Fw%3D%3D)

Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d9e627da19534290be7ca3c15d9ad086&_e=ieLAjU-aTkTa-72K9ZQgjSNtRbZaDjiwlxY-KFTeeLg72_o6oiCGx6G1_StIykGyTUT1xXB-GDqe3CbChbJH9WDtj4Ui-JWHg1UQ-3Tdt4_f1t6jSTYXMu_qX8BNieG9b7pB1q5ysfss7xIfVbWF4xbKD-5eMFe8XAgu8t2RtuPbOxlCfrxStbFjvmMlKmqCi6nSGbeKoLA72U6QLqq4hGWeRIoz8ak9gLb_1e89x2zeQ8XoRCwzLuGQPwg-W1zESLUquD-LUW-rvlIsJCRVeUTMrX0YW0wd6VHDfWVpJb4bydnK_Mb50VAJxLaNvBhY23N8ZXQkCu_ICBmOcdbM88eV6YXHdPNJuQc2XfYqtAMdxjoheDgctCIEqxF9QpKwvpTYa2548X_zvfZaZH7wyGdnJ_tAfKwfGN0zL6k7fik_FIvomZPR3ijrjs3ZW8X-VAr5D3x2BDfhlxlSG83dVRlGSEDTjfO7_Eh49VVkwHnrHf4SzE3e75Co7kfIZW6Kx7Mo66lGIMJYzS8RL_rqew%3D%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d9e627da19534290be7ca3c15d9ad086&_e=ieLAjU-aTkTa-72K9ZQgjSNtRbZaDjiwlxY-KFTeeLg72_o6oiCGx6G1_StIykGyTUT1xXB-GDqe3CbChbJH9WDtj4Ui-JWHg1UQ-3Tdt4_f1t6jSTYXMu_qX8BNieG9b7pB1q5ysfss7xIfVbWF4xbKD-5eMFe8XAgu8t2RtuPbOxlCfrxStbFjvmMlKmqCi6nSGbeKoLA72U6QLqq4hGWeRIoz8ak9gLb_1e89x2zeQ8XoRCwzLuGQPwg-W1zESLUquD-LUW-rvlIsJCRVeUTMrX0YW0wd6VHDfWVpJb6zzy74mc8FADn70eMpQRW0CKSvC9C1yc2Qp5tw3uin9hRAqRfe9-I5hy6iIKYo68FqtgdqOKz1ZKvw-vhjyJUrpvCqCH6M_sw3-C-MpIgBFWL4-VVltiHFN2jwkkAd6kjEkA9ClA_k3v5Kw7vQafC8mGpS8qigjTdcJy8URrvh7a6wBaADSqeNUkYp_-vH4V4cDYzVq9I5ejLT29bkv2O8-MY7mrrL24knhyxIbB7PlQ%3D%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d9e627da19534290be7ca3c15d9ad086&_e=ieLAjU-aTkTa-72K9ZQgjSNtRbZaDjiwlxY-KFTeeLg72_o6oiCGx6G1_StIykGyTUT1xXB-GDqe3CbChbJH9WDtj4Ui-JWHg1UQ-3Tdt4_f1t6jSTYXMu_qX8BNieG9b7pB1q5ysfss7xIfVbWF4xbKD-5eMFe8XAgu8t2RtuPbOxlCfrxStbFjvmMlKmqCi6nSGbeKoLA72U6QLqq4hGWeRIoz8ak9gLb_1e89x2zeQ8XoRCwzLuGQPwg-W1zESLUquD-LUW-rvlIsJCRVeUTMrX0YW0wd6VHDfWVpJb455iIqF-_9EvYx2Rwjv2lhzouLKwPZIAOqKsEGMR9j952ViGWIWk41HwmGrWV5px8cInPMrsaVHwBDWPqLF1oAS8vB-lOEmTcqAfTJy0MLCXqYnKgTLpt60X-9x5XwZbxpZu8wkZMd9ULzTupR4FE8kaxaDSrXJ6Wj5fgJK96EqiaCq5aEO1YHYXdkUx7QkPmxZP1z5V40M34JWHKRyX-qnyuGszqxcsvYCsatvQbx3A%3D%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d9e627da19534290be7ca3c15d9ad086&_e=ieLAjU-aTkTa-72K9ZQgjSNtRbZaDjiwlxY-KFTeeLg72_o6oiCGx6G1_StIykGyTUT1xXB-GDqe3CbChbJH9WDtj4Ui-JWHg1UQ-3Tdt4_f1t6jSTYXMu_qX8BNieG9b7pB1q5ysfss7xIfVbWF4xbKD-5eMFe8XAgu8t2RtuPbOxlCfrxStbFjvmMlKmqCi6nSGbeKoLA72U6QLqq4hGWeRIoz8ak9gLb_1e89x2zeQ8XoRCwzLuGQPwg-W1zESLUquD-LUW-rvlIsJCRVeUTMrX0YW0wd6VHDfWVpJb6uaoOwF0vbfBpTm8lWEhC46r-FEsQ2vs8NCazbUoB7y_uOLPBARqgDoUQS8JKydJAbYEsqmJEnb8xvJ7rczFotNqSWPgPdS4QGJ0TpmUhEXd-3Hxe6B-bH0Z-EP53Kz0UCcKT8kq-dWKxbiNOiFKr6FjtJuXlqKNWIs9rebL819Kw827vpk8j9wNueJ6gVYjKYHj1_1JB760URtFQ0Z3vDWW5osHuorcCHacrcERCSdA%3D%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d9e627da19534290be7ca3c15d9ad086&_e=ieLAjU-aTkTa-72K9ZQgjSNtRbZaDjiwlxY-KFTeeLg72_o6oiCGx6G1_StIykGyTUT1xXB-GDqe3CbChbJH9WDtj4Ui-JWHg1UQ-3Tdt4_f1t6jSTYXMu_qX8BNieG9b7pB1q5ysfss7xIfVbWF4xbKD-5eMFe8XAgu8t2RtuPbOxlCfrxStbFjvmMlKmqCi6nSGbeKoLA72U6QLqq4hGWeRIoz8ak9gLb_1e89x2zeQ8XoRCwzLuGQPwg-W1zESLUquD-LUW-rvlIsJCRVeUTMrX0YW0wd6VHDfWVpJb7u5a2NpoP2heAgWdrbpUuD0KMBd_PSWb69yXG4Xjivs4FUs-v2qJxe6PYSiz2YVPlkt9uniQLr7KKTZ4O865CB_Kk8t7R9Q0iFiq7DPPXss3WiM6_h5pYDMQb8HovV_bzee1ebUvga4tIzpZfMkjF57MVBp_AnsckRcEyfgRN90dfk9OPAUbingg84btbzoGFYEzEJQ0LEsYz9k0vgou-6unpa5bt5NEngpG0piEQvbg%3D%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | Fellow patriot, Not too long ago, Latinos were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Latino,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, a proud Latina Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

clean_body: We cannot let this stand! | | | Peter, As you read this email, Joe Biden is planning to pay THOUSANDS of illegal immigrants $450,000 each. Yes, you read that right. Inflation is through the roof right now, and millions of Americans are struggling to make ends meet. Rather than fix the issues everyday Americans are facing, Biden is preparing to give $1 billion in taxpayer money to those who entered our country illegally. Peter, we MUST stand together to stop this outrageous plan and make sure Biden’s unchecked power in Washington ends next year. So please, RIGHT NOW to help us win a Republican majority next November. Thanks for your support, Mark Walker | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- id:2021-11-10-22:31:02:302t | | Paid for by Walker4NC | |

name: Ted Budd
subject: Disrespecting The American People
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Joe Biden is Failing Us

| [](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=5b4a3d8670af4e68965cf6a3b954ad87&_e=3BmzBVgUBhodr5OrQJfZh7YCXiWm1jzanL05eEPT2AT5YPKzR-wCwWs9UBcjSuNaDkM3NpWn5WM3Hj-xCygV1K4s5UBbuRYbdwTxSnPXDFc-9gin2TZgwrQsL_SNgoZ6HjwdJLvXHNJo7-8eSvB_7QuQe-laIWi6Zo_C-iyLzAzG4UfM1kRYpwJoXB4b2jAth0kCK6GiF-SgtnK-qUnG1bOiM7Q8qy30hfj4cAcQ85G3OT63FUbztTyVCmzEz8dpmZCmcrTaf22dn145yOlx9J9S9_YqjC9pOQ6GnQdrUeeHgaGJlBYURjWtvhtiDwM3B5lP1P-oZJ-2w6J_4AY1m_8J6YYCPk_FM9v0v7FtBBl8TVuMzBTXAhH4O6lEfbYQ6_X6HkbVEBljCauKaGaEx17NGrFZKrbQYsTxrFee1wz8l_yLfH7Yweg-9WmsYJVl9YvIzxt5Y1rtnEkimctDBqNJ5wK7T0LyABt_H5J0ek96_vCI_vPjOXIU8_mTv64Eg4OMIBK9wVpbedQXRroGwyXPW9hATOtwnQoJvNA2nmE%3D) TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA
* * *
---
Friend,
**_Joe Biden wants to pay illegal immigrants for entering this country._**

**You read that correctly.** He wants to reward them for illegally entering our country and encourage them to stay here illegally.

Can you believe that? To be honest, I can. After watching his border crisis grow worse for months, he clearly does not care about border security.

name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: I'm reaching out to ask you to make a contribution in support of my reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I need your help.
#
Peter:
**[I’m reaching out today to ask you to split a contribution, of any amount you can afford, between my campaign and Senator Dick Durbin’s.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38573554/316059629/340666825?refcode=dd_em_211112_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY2MjgxOS1mZTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmFWrjcFZgjBcRFlXyBCZ9lW8ggDUKvji3yfM81wLV4=)**
But first, let me take a minute to tell you about why I ran for Senate in the first place.
When I was a kid, the company my dad worked for was sold. He lost his job and my family was eventually forced onto public assistance. My brother and I relied on reduced-price meals at our public school and we used food stamps to put dinner on the table -- until they ran out. It was tough, and we probably wouldn’t have made it through without government support.
Those experiences shaped the person I am today, and motivated me to speak up on behalf of families like my own who need a little help to get by. And also to speak out against Republicans who want to slash critical safety net programs that families depend on.
**Now, as a U.S. Senator, I know I can do more to ensure we’re making good decisions in Washington that make life better and easier for working families.**
I will continue to be an advocate for our working families in Washington -- but in order to do that, I need your help to win my reelection campaign. So, Peter:
**[Can I count on you to split a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, between my campaign and Senator Dick Durbin’s today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38573555/316059630/340666825?refcode=dd_em_211112_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY2MjgxOS1mZTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmFWrjcFZgjBcRFlXyBCZ9lW8ggDUKvji3yfM81wLV4=)**
Thank you for your support,

Tammy Duckworth

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38573556/316059631/340666825?refcode=dd_em_211112_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY2MjgxOS1mZTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmFWrjcFZgjBcRFlXyBCZ9lW8ggDUKvji3yfM81wLV4=)**
_ _
_ _
_ _

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

Should you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a92c8d90-d143-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/bdf62819-fe43-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY2MjgxOS1mZTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmFWrjcFZgjBcRFlXyBCZ9lW8ggDUKvji3yfM81wLV4=&id=104421239) . Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38573557/316059632/1680752020?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY2MjgxOS1mZTQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmFWrjcFZgjBcRFlXyBCZ9lW8ggDUKvji3yfM81wLV4=)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re gerrymandering me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8000%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9zDT%2bSVABzoGWutS9Qt%2fIg&sysid=1)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17316%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Dpin75wdx%2b0%2bcGFAc9oqQ&sysid=1)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17317%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IgydUdbaEECKUAyaCzaHHw&sysid=1)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office - I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17318%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wz6XMYuof2%2fy%2bklRbIQ4Tw&sysid=1)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17319%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QEjCz6QoQyGcuZlgGCxZmA&sysid=1)

**[Your donation,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17310%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PQJZCuN2kNdLFRnif8MSTQ&sysid=1)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17311%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lw08TpWjZOpvVLJJYjwUdQ&sysid=1)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17319%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QEjCz6QoQyGcuZlgGCxZmA&sysid=1)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17312%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2qCNH61RFBbuVLCiwyXQiA&sysid=1)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17313%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QWl8YRziAdn44%2fTqcVfM2A&sysid=1)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17319%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QEjCz6QoQyGcuZlgGCxZmA&sysid=1)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8000%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9zDT%2bSVABzoGWutS9Qt%2fIg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8000%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=9zDT%2bSVABzoGWutS9Qt%2fIg&sysid=1)

name: John King Jr.
subject: the biggest test
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
I was given a second chance and now I’m running for governor of Maryland.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38573733/316060777/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211112-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmE5YzdiMC1mZjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnIootPVyQWvqda1S4KOKTvBOFhR-CqNHMF0Jk_x7rQ=)
---
| I’ll be honest, Peter: nothing in my life has come easy.

Both of my parents passed away by the time I was twelve, and like many kids who have experienced trauma, I struggled as a teenager and was kicked out of school.

While many people could have given up on me, phenomenal public school educators saw my potential and saved my life. They inspired me to become a teacher myself— and eventually, to become President Obama’s Secretary of Education.

I was given a second chance and now I’m running for governor of Maryland to ensure others get the same opportunity to succeed, [_**but I can’t do it without your support.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38573734/316060778/-923212789?refcode=BLU-KING-20211112-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmE5YzdiMC1mZjQzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnIootPVyQWvqda1S4KOKTvBOFhR-CqNHMF0Jk_x7rQ=)

I knew when I got into this race that it wouldn’t be easy, and now our campaign is just two months away from our biggest test so far. **On January 12, our campaign will file our fundraising numbers with the Maryland Board of Elections —** and our campaign has set an **ambitious goal to raise $300,000 through online donations** ahead of this major public deadline. [_**Will you please pitch in today to make sure we hit this ambitious $300,000 goal? clean_body: I was given a second chance and now I’m running for governor of Maryland. | = | I’ll be honest, Peter: nothing in my life has come easy. Both of my parents passed away by the time I was twelve, and like many kids who have experienced trauma, I struggled as a teenager and was kicked out of school. While many people could have given up on me, phenomenal public school educators saw my potential and saved my life. They inspired me to become a teacher myself— and eventually, to become President Obama’s Secretary of Education. I was given a second chance and now I’m running for governor of Maryland to ensure others get the same opportunity to succeed, = I knew when I got into this race that it wouldn’t be easy, and now our campaign is just two months away from our biggest test so far. On January 12, our campaign will file our fundraising numbers with the Maryland Board of Elections — and our campaign has set an ambitious goal to raise $300,000 through online donations ahead of this major public deadline. = | = The strength of fundraising numbers on that January report will be a direct reflection of the strength of this campaign, and with so much at stake after what we saw in Virginia, it’s crucial that our campaign has the resources to flip Maryland blue in 2022. This goal may seem bold, but that’s the kind of governor I intend to be. As we recover from this pandemic, it isn't the time for half measures. name: Alex Stovall
subject: I’m a black conservative and I’m being attacked
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS**
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753179:JWUs7_2No:m:1:3253819041:E3111D0C7FC2EC961D1214274C91176E:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Alex Stovall and **I 'm a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress** in Arizona's 9th Congressional District. **I 'm the left's worst nightmare and let me explain why...**

I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. **I 've experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs _cripple_ the black community and how we've been exploited ONLY for our votes.**

Enough is enough. [**I 'm SHOCKING the left by running as a Republican, speaking out and I need your URGENT help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753179:JWUs7_2No:m:1:3253819041:E3111D0C7FC2EC961D1214274C91176E:r) **Black conservatives running for public office** _are being attacked by the Democrats_ and _I 'm in their crosshairs._

[** Help Elect The YOUNGEST Black Conservative
To The House of Representatives » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753179:JWUs7_2No:m:1:3253819041:E3111D0C7FC2EC961D1214274C91176E:r)
The Left isn't shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - **the leader of the Democrat Party** - who said, **" You ain't black"** if you don't vote Democrat.

_This is more than just upsetting._ The Democrats love to talk about how it's the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn't imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President.

You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I'm a doer. I'm a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor's degree in Theology and master's in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. **Despite my childhood, I persevered.** No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it.

I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it's why I'm asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn't popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - **I need to raise $250,000 in the next month.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753179:JWUs7_2No:m:1:3253819041:E3111D0C7FC2EC961D1214274C91176E:r)

[** Help Alex Hit His $250,000 Goal » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753179:JWUs7_2No:m:1:3253819041:E3111D0C7FC2EC961D1214274C91176E:r)
The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it's time the truth came out. The left's socialist government programs are crippling our communities and [**I need your help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753179:JWUs7_2No:m:1:3253819041:E3111D0C7FC2EC961D1214274C91176E:r)

Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left's oppression of our communities.

I can WIN this race, but **I must raise $250,000 in the next month.**

The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - [**can I count on you to support my efforts?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753179:JWUs7_2No:m:1:3253819041:E3111D0C7FC2EC961D1214274C91176E:r)

For Freedom,
Alex Stovall

clean_body: | Peter, My name is Alex Stovall and I 'm a twenty-six-year-old black conservative running for Congress in Arizona's 9th Congressional District. I 'm the left's worst nightmare and let me explain why... I grew up on government assistance and moved over 50 times in Arizona alone. I 've experienced firsthand how the Democrats socialist programs cripple the black community and how we've been exploited ONLY for our votes. Enough is enough. Black conservatives running for public office are being attacked by the Democrats and I 'm in their crosshairs. The Left isn't shy in pandering and guilt-shaming the black community into voting Democrat. Remember Joe Biden - the leader of the Democrat Party - who said, " You ain't black" if you don't vote Democrat. This is more than just upsetting. The Democrats love to talk about how it's the Republicans who are racist - yet I couldn't imagine a better example of racism than of the words spoken by our Democrat President. You see, unlike the Democrats and my liberal opponent - Greg Stanton - I'm a doer. I'm a veteran who served overseas, earned a bachelor's degree in Theology and master's in Divinity from Grand Caynon University. Despite my childhood, I persevered. No big socialist handouts: I sought opportunity and took advantage of it. I want to give Americans that same opportunity and it's why I'm asking for your support today. Being black and conservative isn't popular and in order to have a chance in this race and a chance to help Republicans WIN BACK the House majority - I need to raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats have been exploiting the black community and it's time the truth came out. The left's socialist government programs are crippling our communities and Nothing crazy needs to happen to make real, positive change. We need to elect Republican leaders - like myself - who will help enact conservative policies that will STOP the left's oppression of our communities. I can WIN this race, but I must raise $250,000 in the next month. The Democrats are attacking me for being a black conservative - For Freedom, Alex Stovall Get the latest by following me on social media. | | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ALEX FOR CONGRESS Use of military rank, insignia, photographs or descriptions of military service on this website does not constitute endorsement by the federal government, U.S. Department of Defense or Department of Homeland Security. body:

| Peter,
---
| With the hateful spread of Critical Race Theory in America's schools - and the Biden Administration's decision to have the FBI go after parents who speak out against it \- having the ability to choose the right education pathway for our children is more important now than ever.
It's one of many reasons why Kathy Barnette has made Parental Choice a TOP PRIORITY in her Senate campaign!
The Left is actively going after the rights of parents and handing more power to the Teachers Unions and government bureaucrats in D.C. Pennsylvania and America need a fighter who will treat this issue with the seriousness that it deserves. [Will you support Kathy in the fight for parental choice?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CxR6JpOWDZUKx9VUM2NNrq3EewrUQaMgWosiUMOkpeRUDL0h72oe5fpDYd16CdwVkM-eJw9LwPRpyRYY68l2ZFvvy5ouY5UXwSWsFRNsMnRV9Zfbkh7FY2R1YbW0dxTAAHZoqdX42EK9CD1yeiejjV2_x82OERy8r00ZcTM9PDkWDuqj2L9l_MDo3anv1WRmW4kHxz7l7lEbHQNBKOqKYA==&c=JDTTXSQwo94Aw4yEoDVsS4QX7Z8OfALc1LPJyE2zPXgeE9dvQR7tJw==&ch=cLg8xKeUME-xql4i2h6gGCxynz1ruFV8cvfz0yQ0k2ZlN3-mRkUByA==)

But currently, in America, our woke education system is stepping on the rights of parents.
Don't let kids be barred from a successful future - and force them to be subject to the Leftist race propaganda - all because of the Socialist Democrats' lust for control.
[Support Kathy's fight for Parental Choice instead!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CxR6JpOWDZUKx9VUM2NNrq3EewrUQaMgWosiUMOkpeRUDL0h72oe5fpDYd16CdwVkM-eJw9LwPRpyRYY68l2ZFvvy5ouY5UXwSWsFRNsMnRV9Zfbkh7FY2R1YbW0dxTAAHZoqdX42EK9CD1yeiejjV2_x82OERy8r00ZcTM9PDkWDuqj2L9l_MDo3anv1WRmW4kHxz7l7lEbHQNBKOqKYA==&c=JDTTXSQwo94Aw4yEoDVsS4QX7Z8OfALc1LPJyE2zPXgeE9dvQR7tJw==&ch=cLg8xKeUME-xql4i2h6gGCxynz1ruFV8cvfz0yQ0k2ZlN3-mRkUByA==)

body:
The years of neglect have not gone unnoticed. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s8MXcKcKQ1HDQjYrUTI6t6SVokXjLMKhv-z9NF1NE5rGlgY2IV3NNnLHiR1TGiei4Pz3vAyDF47RKN-hAYwXpmB3MRDaoulnbZW5QpZEx5UYOalSGvunayeyVHKK53QOljJblHZyHwfQWJWUJ5zFa1dNx6mffUHRoJ_i1bakx7aWlLg1Cq-Eo19fq5HNaGWKtvRnvhhAYVkTNUewsSKCGAbovPweTlUv_xZ1DEPJkLwM/3gy/igJ78xsWQ---HgqeS3H51Q/h0/niqFUM13yY52DqiRZ98qbLjPndBCjRukMrvHiIRu-Bs) Dear Team, The NY Times published an article last week titled,****[On Chicago’s West Side, Urgent Needs Collide With Washington Compromises](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGlyFEPfIQqTPhAJ7ICxnKF49PIlRNztTBKHF49g5rqK_P6Ji-ShZRsnnjmd2e6P9MzYTf1oVy7dHqjtZkbVQDdn9Agn1ff02MgR20tpNQUq5CSGEEZyJ_9YoZiFtosHKU6hdg2QmQwYrd5yXwxyA1zIbV2X_chLIv9l7YAg7VC1qYGvudGpNzsz5meab8NM70UcjhuageybBtpcnJt91lf7so5G2rrlO4sABBmUMkjgTLytWzkLZ7sMzx-dm-9zZqXmr1s2pHSe3RzVBp2HpyTbdN-RGg5FL27YP3w-hw1FnPMeiKrFwU3PX2NiEqAic2U1f44NdovjEyFLK7N3GciaPKwFyGnPkVmKAue4I6PV/3gy/igJ78xsWQ---HgqeS3H51Q/h1/IzSLPbbYSVuDmFArUK7v616pawKZBP2VlNLPfTppQM4). Team, this is our story. For communities like ours, the need exceeds anything they are spending now, and our priorities are always the first to get cut in a spending bill. But the years of neglect have not gone unnoticed. **[I'm running for Congress to finally deliver for the West Side. Donate $15 to help me build the campaign I need in order to get there.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfSRV2dDo7jOSHwaDOGwhhy1y-wsd3_2jbBSFz8GM1NdbpWfge2AnMYxV1B3Bge5dfvDhZsIkZhIcRdc5usoQiOZu9_YjikbgSwDoL-hEzDycz23wX1vsvgBXuka-EkHasUqjO6oBPIe7pc6F3p3lSXmOiF82STtBZVjWH6myq5jMOhA5IcB6Tm1e0GZDY_Q4yu9tDym8RLX2MQzSPCASmp8IObOZY_RI2zvEugbmVOfe1yX5THz81WDh7d8qCmCqJJAduPZBS5FP0rdhw8lknqGomfw6XXsfTLcvhddgw04U/3gy/igJ78xsWQ---HgqeS3H51Q/h2/lCgjhjlJozFkr7rcvWXOtuvql4KyR67AZGKyvO-5_Ts)** [Donate now](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfSRV2dDo7jOSHwaDOGwhhy5uPPOC5ymdtJt0RA2jttlQrRCfG_a3MScPvOMSthzggyn9PxrshO_mPlCXb-AsL9TDZ9LK5i6DglWAl5dzGc-mvD9ntXPSwvJrIc-I3XTnkhpLUGk6UCMQsPgcNdU-mwsBGS613nRHzNqrn_NW7ibBr1bL_vKdf40NTzvRrtP19NtRVLontsxWolBpy6OQS5euH-6uec935xlGWyjK8a_JN30L5k1fO0qk7CYWVltRbagHB_ZLZ2QlZ_tZJGCMhiKhJ6RFnfpOJfGhcTXtdWhI/3gy/igJ78xsWQ---HgqeS3H51Q/h3/9RZGhBds1zNIahtKQBIDtXvjpLsB40vj7OIRleL8xCs) It is hard changing patterns that have been in place for longer than I’ve been alive. name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re trying to draw me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhmmsj9aeahi8bufv9bcamr64rdpi7sggo5aeo30_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj465om6c5mcir3fc9imdrr8s3je5hr2tdlegqj8crksdjb6p73c5in9c3m6go6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbcphheiqrcdtmc1j72c5ic8r749fg)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqaom5mmo7jihlh4jpjcvl218tume9hiiefl8lo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjthhnhl9re08m71hpoappmt7i09gn82ooc1cvsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zko20rues0ni9ccahph71llkd8nntbn1hbme301g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsj2cf4rhhic8net5bc4i3en4l7u0cuf20q1ekf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdc3dd2f5incg67hht5rbrl0i6ijnc6vug4i9q08_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqd0n7gq1lat0dlf90j61tve6pdp1dfjj35qb57o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znv06bio3362keb3ji9qhjle2igmvvvackcf2of0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgoi132r0a7titdp03sfrfcsb4c7sqv6lmt4gor0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4d2r2tkgoj4i2osc4pfbfstmlor4qph52ks8b7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8aqg4ahf4ntnu7qpo0iha732duibc2b0r6pkht8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctimco30sdh2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

clean_body: Loudon County, VA resident Jon Tigges is an inspiring example for every American patriot. The Epoch Time ran a profile piece on Jon this week, and it's a must-read heading into the weekend. From the article: "His experience taught him that 'being afraid of a virus or some bully politician or administrator is ridiculous. We have nothing to fear. If you’re doing the right thing for the right reason, truth wins in the end,' he said."
