name: Patty Murray
subject: Let’s make Daylight Saving Time permanent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Two years ago, Washington state voted to make Daylight Saving Time permanent.
#
This is urgent, Peter:
Two years ago, Washington state voted to make Daylight Saving Time permanent.
But last Sunday, we were forced to change our clocks yet again. _**Well, enough is enough.**_
**[It’s time to make Daylight Saving Time permanent and put a stop to the constant time changes. Sign the petition right now if you want Congress to take this step forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574064/316062141/528423682?ms=pm_em_211112_1&refcode=pm_em_211112_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI4NzcxYy0wMjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LguSZdrtS7JzoiTkxC3iTYS09rB3Nj7k2ErrEdEKr_E=&emci=1f28771c-0244-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2228771c-0244-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13116610)**
I’m leading the fight in the U.S. Senate because Americans want more sunshine and less depression. This is a bipartisan issue that we should all be able to get behind and support.
Making Daylight Saving Time permanent and ending the unnecessary clock changes twice a year is not only the overwhelming will of the people of Washington state, it would help improve the safety, health, and wellbeing of our families, and boost our economy. Let’s get this done.
**[Add your name now if you’re with me and call on Congress to make DST permanent.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574065/316062142/528423682?ms=pm_em_211112_1&refcode=pm_em_211112_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI4NzcxYy0wMjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LguSZdrtS7JzoiTkxC3iTYS09rB3Nj7k2ErrEdEKr_E=&emci=1f28771c-0244-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2228771c-0244-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty

**[Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574066/316062143/528423682?ms=pm_em_211112_1&refcode=pm_em_211112_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI4NzcxYy0wMjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LguSZdrtS7JzoiTkxC3iTYS09rB3Nj7k2ErrEdEKr_E=&emci=1f28771c-0244-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2228771c-0244-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13116610)**

| | And according to Leigh... ”My goal was to ignite change by reengaging the American public to its power as an educated voter. The hope was to increase people’s knowledge with the least amount of partisanship. To enlighten as many people as possible about as much as possible in short, easy to digest segments.”[Source [http://www.politicsgirl.com/what-is-this-1](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/79NqH_Et8/c?w=Ze8AyNCZn0j6j94Y947qXyc3Cyi-dWItTFPPhc63WZ4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy5wb2xpdGljc2dpcmwuY29tL3doYXQtaXMtdGhpcy0xIiwiciI6ImU0ZTQwNTY0LTUzNGMtNGRmMC1jYmM2LTAwYzMwNjNjNWE3YyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)] She takes big complex issues; like legislative bills, campaigns and social justices movements, and drills down to the core of the subject matter, all in a video form that is easy to watch and understand on social media platforms. She is in a word, brilliant. Okay, that’s not the only word that describes her but it does fit. After months of research, vetting myself personally and my campaign (including my position on issues) and after personal communications with me, she graciously quote tweeted me and gave her endorsement. To say that I was flattered is an understatement. Her understanding of the intricacies of U.S. politics is enlightening, inspiring and invigorating. Knowing that there is someone this involved in not only understanding the issues herself but also sharing it in the hopes that one more voter makes an informed decision on a ballot, with a political donation or in choosing to be directly involved in an election campaign. This is the type of engagement we should want in politics today. Not just following in the footsteps of our parents. Not just registering to vote as a Democrat or Republican and then voting by party. We need to be "in the know" on the actual issues, whether it’s a candidate’s position or a state referendum on a new project. We must be fully immersed to make an informed decision. This doesn’t mean we have to read every bit of writing available on the subject. Very few have that kind of time. So, right here at our fingertips is a reliable source, in the form of a person you can watch, who will present the most relevant facts, in the least partisan method possible. We must be informed. We must be engaged. We must be active. This biggest enemy to our democratic republic is apathy for politics and elections. By making informed decisions and participating, we are saying we value our system enough to vote, donate and communicate. We have to take this seriously because if we don’t, a minority of voters will control the system. While we don’t always agree, we should accept that a majority at least speaks louder about what we want than a minority does. So that’s it. A simple, yet very large, thank you to Leigh.

If you don’t know of her or , you should- you are missing a lot of great content! | | | | Leigh started her platform and social media identity in 2015. “as a response to the underwhelming [sic] American involvement in the 2014 midterms, Politics Girl was created as a way to make American politics more accessible to its citizens." | | | | | And according to Leigh... ”My goal was to ignite change by reengaging the American public to its power as an educated voter. The hope was to increase people’s knowledge with the least amount of partisanship. To enlighten as many people as possible about as much as possible in short, easy to digest segments.”] She takes big complex issues; like legislative bills, campaigns and social justices movements, and drills down to the core of the subject matter, all in a video form that is easy to watch and understand on social media platforms. She is in a word, brilliant. Okay, that’s not the only word that describes her but it does fit. After months of research, vetting myself personally and my campaign (including my position on issues) and after personal communications with me, she graciously quote tweeted me and gave her endorsement. To say that I was flattered is an understatement. Her understanding of the intricacies of U.S. politics is enlightening, inspiring and invigorating. Knowing that there is someone this involved in not only understanding the issues herself but also sharing it in the hopes that one more voter makes an informed decision on a ballot, with a political donation or in choosing to be directly involved in an election campaign. This is the type of engagement we should want in politics today. Not just following in the footsteps of our parents. Not just registering to vote as a Democrat or Republican and then voting by party. We need to be "in the know" on the actual issues, whether it’s a candidate’s position or a state referendum on a new project. We must be fully immersed to make an informed decision. This doesn’t mean we have to read every bit of writing available on the subject. Very few have that kind of time. So, right here at our fingertips is a reliable source, in the form of a person you can watch, who will present the most relevant facts, in the least partisan method possible. We must be informed. We must be engaged. We must be active. This biggest enemy to our democratic republic is apathy for politics and elections. By making informed decisions and participating, we are saying we value our system enough to vote, donate and communicate. We have to take this seriously because if we don’t, a minority of voters will control the system. While we don’t always agree, we should accept that a majority at least speaks louder about what we want than a minority does. So that’s it. A simple, yet very large, thank you to Leigh. | | | | | I want to represent WA-03 to: Defend your rights as and families. Aim for the , written into law. Protect a with protected reproductive care, written into law. Securing our EDUCATION FOR ALL system with the teaching of facts, good or bad. Protecting THE RIGHTS OF LGBTQ+ persons, the same as everyone deserves. | | If a friend forwarded you this email, don't miss the next! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please .**

This is a special opportunity for Doug to speak with you directly about the biggest issues facing our state. name: Lauren Micek-Vargas
subject: My husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I told him I'd be the one to ask this time.

|
---

| | I know it’s usually my husband Tony asking you for money.

But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us. [**_So, yes -- I’m about to ask for $10 before midnight. Let me explain why. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574428/316064312/1129282168?refcode=20211112_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWZiMDQwMi0wNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkUZahbiILpUGrXZNkzAmtgf2SaYMmZgA9hm5zOr9cs=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574430/316064314/1129282168?refcode=20211112_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWZiMDQwMi0wNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkUZahbiILpUGrXZNkzAmtgf2SaYMmZgA9hm5zOr9cs=) I know Tony can flip this seat for Democrats:

**[One of the things I admire most about Tony is that when he believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574432/316064316/1129282168?refcode=20211112_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWZiMDQwMi0wNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkUZahbiILpUGrXZNkzAmtgf2SaYMmZgA9hm5zOr9cs=)**

When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds.

When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding.

When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law.

And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief:

[**Tony stepped up to unseat him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574434/316064318/1129282168?refcode=20211112_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWZiMDQwMi0wNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkUZahbiILpUGrXZNkzAmtgf2SaYMmZgA9hm5zOr9cs=) [**_Everyday folks deserve a fighting chance, but my husband’s opponent doesn’t have the interests of our community at heart. Tony is determined to win this race, but it won’t be easy -- or cheap. Don Bacon already has a $260,000 fundraising lead. That’s why Tony needs to raise another $10,775 before midnight, and why I said I’d ask you today on his behalf. Will you chip in $10 to help him close this gap? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574435/316064320/1129282168?refcode=20211112_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWZiMDQwMi0wNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkUZahbiILpUGrXZNkzAmtgf2SaYMmZgA9hm5zOr9cs=) Now you know a bit about Tony’s amazing track record.

But I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for him.

It’s personal.

It’s rooted in his experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds.

It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him.

And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca.

[**I know you work hard for your money, and I wish I didn’t have to ask.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574437/316064321/1129282168?refcode=20211112_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWZiMDQwMi0wNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkUZahbiILpUGrXZNkzAmtgf2SaYMmZgA9hm5zOr9cs=)

But if Tony misses his $10,775 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign.

And it will be that much harder for him to flip this important seat for Democrats. [**_So I’m asking one last time: If you believe in Tony like I do, will you chip in $10 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574439/316064323/1129282168?refcode=20211112_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWZiMDQwMi0wNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkUZahbiILpUGrXZNkzAmtgf2SaYMmZgA9hm5zOr9cs=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574441/316064325/1129282168?refcode=20211112_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWZiMDQwMi0wNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LkUZahbiILpUGrXZNkzAmtgf2SaYMmZgA9hm5zOr9cs=)

clean_body: I told him I'd be the one to ask this time. | | | I know it’s usually my husband Tony asking you for money. But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us. = = I know Tony can flip this seat for Democrats: = When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds. When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding. When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law. And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief: = = Now you know a bit about Tony’s amazing track record. But I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for him. It’s personal. It’s rooted in his experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds. It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him. And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca. = But if Tony misses his $10,775 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign. And it will be that much harder for him to flip this important seat for Democrats. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m so proud of Tony. I hope you are too. Thanks for supporting my husband, Lauren (and Ava and Luca!) | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. body:
This is not how democracy should look like.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574648/316065363/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211112SenateIntelReport_VR_DM_90DO_4_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGY2ZjhmYi0wNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CsCkj1yaqK03cwVIIKCBP66wEC5tx0XmHutTS6xvIhg=)
Maggie faced so many threats during the 2020 election that she had to leave her own home for several weeks. This is not normal. Maggie’s priority as Secretary of State is to protect our New Mexican democracy, which means not only ensuring access to the ballot box is as easy as 1,2,3, but fighting for tough new ethics laws and campaign reforms.
Election officials should be protected from threats because a threat to an election official is a threat to our democracy. subject: Gray wolves hunted to the brink of extinction
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Sign the petition: Protect gray wolves from extinction >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc04fa08d-d006-42db-b418-8543a7d02eba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ee8f172-6571-4ecc-bd2c-8f1f33b9dc46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Gray wolves once roamed the entire North American continent, but overhunting and habitat loss pushed them to the edge of extinction. For years, the Endangered Species Act protected gray wolves and allowed their numbers to recover. But the Trump administration removed those protections last year, putting them in danger once again. Gray wolves are being hunted to the brink of extinction. Without any protections under the Endangered Species Act, the odds are stacked against these majestic creatures. The Biden administration has not taken action to restore protections for gray wolves, despite widespread support and calls from hundreds of Tribal nations. We don’t have any time to waste -- we need Interior Secretary Deb Haaland to issue emergency protection for gray wolves under the Endangered Species Act before it’s too late. [Sign the petition to Secretary Haaland: Reinstate protections for gray wolves under the Endangered Species Act now!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8e820ef-23cf-40b5-a697-e650ab10ef74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

[We need your help to protect Josh's seat at all costs - can you rush in a donation right now to help us fight back against Republican gerrymandering?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bXy23h2-MSTqQoxfLtatg0gdxOjaQNA16LFQqswNSzo=/gu17JudcpomnTmcYN0MtDPQGbTfyKqIFjWpYDDfDdPM=?refcode=E12402-20211112-NewMap-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bXy23h2-MSTqQoxfLtatg0gdxOjaQNA16LFQqswNSzo=/gu17JudcpomnTmcYN0MtDPQGbTfyKqIFjWpYDDfDdPM=?refcode=E12402-20211112-NewMap-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20) The California Redistricting Commission just released a new draft map that puts CA-10 as a Trump +10 district. This means Josh's seat will be the toughest seat in the state to defend. And it means the GOP will be pouring millions of dollars into this race. We knew we had to prepare for the worst, but to be honest, Peter - we didn't expect it to be this bad. But we've overcome the odds with flying colors before, and we know we can do it again. We'll need to scale up our campaign quickly before the final drafts are released next month - this means hiring more organizers, reaching out to more voters, recalibrating our strategy, and doing everything we can to keep California's 10th district blue and beat our opponent no matter how extremist they are. An expert on California redistricting said that Democrats would be "lucky" to emerge from the 2022 election with the 42 seats they now hold. We're not counting on luck - we're going to roll up our sleeves and get to work. [But we can't do this without our grassroots army - can you rush a donation of any amount right now to help us keep Josh's seat?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bXy23h2-MSTqQoxfLtatg0gdxOjaQNA16LFQqswNSzo=/gu17JudcpomnTmcYN0MtDPQGbTfyKqIFjWpYDDfDdPM=?refcode=E12402-20211112-NewMap-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=20) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/bXy23h2-MSTqQoxfLtatg0gdxOjaQNA16LFQqswNSzo=/gu17JudcpomnTmcYN0MtDPQGbTfyKqIFjWpYDDfDdPM=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12402-20211112-NewMap-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

As of today, Dr. Martin has visited 83 counties. That means we’ve got only 12 more stops to go in our mission to bring Dr. Martin face-to-face with communities in every corner of Tennessee.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574922/316066501/-882839672?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211112counties_MFTweb_active_SLB_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E3OTU3NS0wNjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gK9JvITp3QWsSyI8HgCCvpas5-NwFrMN6xRXGZixaLA=)

This 95 County Tour is all about bringing power back to the people. For far too long, our elected leaders — especially Gov. Bill Lee — have pushed aside the needs of real Tennesseans. Families like yours and mine have been completely abandoned in favor of lies, culture wars, and conspiracy theories.
Dr. Martin is a bridge-builder, and he knows that every partnership begins with a conversation. **That’s why he’s out on the road when he’s not working in the ICU** — to have as many conversations with Tennesseans as he possibly can, conversations that are the beginnings of bridges between our communities and our elected leaders.
If we’re going to make Tennessee a place where everyone thrives — no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or how you’re raised — our leaders have got to start listening to people again. **This tour will set the tone for the rest of this campaign.**
[**So, can you pitch in a few dollars to cover costs like gas on the final stretch of the tour? Because we’re running a grassroots, small-dollar campaign, anything helps us cover day-to-day expenses.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38574925/316066504/-1311083504?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211112counties_MFTweb_active_SLB_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E3OTU3NS0wNjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gK9JvITp3QWsSyI8HgCCvpas5-NwFrMN6xRXGZixaLA=)

clean_body: | | = We’re officially in the final stretch of our 95 County Tour, Peter! As of today, Dr. Martin has visited 83 counties. That means we’ve got only 12 more stops to go in our mission to bring Dr. Martin face-to-face with communities in every corner of Tennessee. = = = This 95 County Tour is all about bringing power back to the people. For far too long, our elected leaders — especially Gov. Bill Lee — have pushed aside the needs of real Tennesseans. Families like yours and mine have been completely abandoned in favor of lies, culture wars, and conspiracy theories. Dr. Martin is a bridge-builder, and he knows that every partnership begins with a conversation. That’s why he’s out on the road when he’s not working in the ICU — to have as many conversations with Tennesseans as he possibly can, conversations that are the beginnings of bridges between our communities and our elected leaders. If we’re going to make Tennessee a place where everyone thrives — no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or how you’re raised — our leaders have got to start listening to people again. This tour will set the tone for the rest of this campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks, Team Martin | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6586%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=JcB59Vc4%2bas2cX6qefzgrg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67934%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GdTi5lSfX%2bKWd7FrKmwgog&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67945%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iI9OunzPAfrQg7Zuwh239Q&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67946%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RfTGvrGET%2ftmeFBLvLUiVA&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Friend,
Lisa Murkowski just launched an ad here in Alaska and it is filled with _**hypocrisy.**_
Not only is she branding herself as an advocate for Alaska who will stand up to anyone who threatens our way of life, but she’s also calling herself “effective” and “independent-minded”.
Can you believe that? **The reality is, when Alaska needs her most,**__**she stays silent.**__**** Her campaign is flooded with dark money and out-of-state special interests who want to completely destroy Alaska’s energy economy and our way of life.

clean_body: | | | | She’s a puppet for the Insiders and Biden Friend, Lisa Murkowski just launched an ad here in Alaska and it is filled with hypocrisy. Not only is she branding herself as an advocate for Alaska who will stand up to anyone who threatens our way of life, but she’s also calling herself “effective” and “independent-minded”. Can you believe that? The reality is, when Alaska needs her most,she stays silent.** Her campaign is flooded with dark money and out-of-state special interests who want to completely destroy Alaska’s energy economy and our way of life. Independent-minded?She’s a puppet for the DC Insiders and has become Joe Biden’s Chief Enabling Officer! I need YOUR help more than ever to take Alaska’s Senate seat back. Murkowski has failed the people of Alaska. It’s time to have strong,conservative leadershipin the Senate again.** I will always lead with an Alaska and America First agenda. While Liberal Lisa is backed by the Swamp, I am fully ENDORSED by President Trump and the Alaska Republican Party! It’s going to take every single one of us to beat Liberal Lisa and the DC Insiders. Thanks, Kelly | | | | =

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zktdlkr2rviujl78mq26kh609p9jggokh46dm9vg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim6oj4c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5v5p1no75pl9h1b2f1u4t83hk6bp08ap3djs6r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim6oj4c9h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zq8itqdi44rrm2tf4pc796lrgqnc4otqacmb4ll8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim6oj4c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: BREAKING: new GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
He’s the wrong prescription for Pennsylvania.
#
BREAKING: A new GOP candidate is preparing to enter the race for U.S. Senate — and he’s a former advisor to Donald Trump. 🙄
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37227?refcode=em20211112-3436&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3436%2E434096%2E3jKOPX)
Derek, this potential new Republican opponent doesn’t even seem to live in Pennsylvania, but that’s just the tip of the iceberg.
He pushed disinformation about COVID-19 + and highlighted vaccine deniers on his TV show. **Oh, and he’s Trump’s favorite doctor.** A guy like this is completely unqualified to represent the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate.
And, according to reports, he has over $100 million in personal wealth that he could drop on this Senate race at any time.
**Derek, we already had a failed reality TV president in Donald Trump. The last thing we need now is a reality TV Senator.** Not when our Democratic majority is on the line, and not when CNN ranks PA as the #1 Most Likely to Flip seat in 2022.
[**_Can you help John Fetterman fight back by making a campaign contribution of $5 or more today? Your direct support helps our campaign reach all 67 counties and win every last vote in Pennsylvania._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37227?refcode=em20211112-3436&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3436%2E434096%2E3jKOPX)

subject: Nancy: I DON’T CARE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753266:JrlJ3_2kN:m:1:3253819041:28469704A8AC2D28131FDB54CB8B24D8:r "Headline") Peter: I will never allow Nancy Pelosi to tell me what to do. I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753266:JrlJ3_2kN:m:1:3253819041:28469704A8AC2D28131FDB54CB8B24D8:r "Nancy")**_Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track.[If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753266:JrlJ3_2kN:m:1:3253819041:28469704A8AC2D28131FDB54CB8B24D8:r "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to
take actions that make her FURIOUS.")_** I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. **[I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753266:JrlJ3_2kN:m:1:3253819041:28469704A8AC2D28131FDB54CB8B24D8:r "I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict
your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.")** They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753266:JrlJ3_2kN:m:1:3253819041:28469704A8AC2D28131FDB54CB8B24D8:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753266:JrlJ3_2kN:m:1:3253819041:28469704A8AC2D28131FDB54CB8B24D8:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Only with your input can we work to build on the Nov. 2nd wins and launch a targeted strategy to elect conservative Republicans at every level of government in 2022. name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re gerrymandering me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6589%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Xk482Qqw%2bDEcI7uWg%2fwyZA&sysid=1)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67949%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ojeyF5G%2b8c4VhECGCLuwdQ&sysid=1)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67940%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tykFUA0uyYvuf49KGindnA&sysid=1)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office - I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67941%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qeysC1AQuh8tbnOa3I1pgg&sysid=1)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67942%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xMtEc9Dqgjw0epg4AdH1Vw&sysid=1)

**[Your donation,](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67943%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2baPsr69iHlP2HDcczsRh9g&sysid=1)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67944%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mj0%2f93oPrUuwoPhV1cZLzg&sysid=1)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67942%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xMtEc9Dqgjw0epg4AdH1Vw&sysid=1)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67055%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MasrMi6adie0aj1pReihzQ&sysid=1)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67056%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z98gcHxXDJTnpDO0VsIZNQ&sysid=1)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67942%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xMtEc9Dqgjw0epg4AdH1Vw&sysid=1)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: ICYMI: The Squad took a stand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we didn’t
want you to miss what happened last week. Justice Democrats in Congress
were the only ones to stand up to the Democratic Party and put their full
support behind progressive policies like climate action and Medicare
expansion.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83326?refcode=em20211112-20459&t=1002&akid=20459%2E1203867%2E-7CK2K ]Now, the Democratic establishment will target Cori, Jamaal, and the
Squad even more intensely for primary challenges next year. Can you chip
in $3 to show our support for the Squad and that we have
their back?

Check out our email below to get a full download of what happened!

- Team JD

-----Forwarded Message-----
Date: Wednesday, Nov. 10, 2021, 6:56 p.m.
From: JusticeDemocrats.com
Subject: The Squad took a stand

Peter,

Last week, the Democratic caucus joined Republicans to pass an
infrastructure bill AND risk the future of comprehensive climate action,
universal pre-K, paid leave, and Medicare expansion. Cori Bush, Jamaal
Bowman, and the Squad refused to cave and stayed true to their commitment
to protecting investments for working people.

Corporate Democrats spent months negotiating with the President and House
leadership on the framework of the Build Back Better reconciliation bill,
and then cut out popular, progressive policy proposals. Democrats just
lost their one real bargaining chip, by succumbing to Republicans and
passing the infrastructure bill without the Build Back Better Act.

Cori, Jamaal, Ayanna, AOC, Ilhan, and Rashida know this — which is why
they courageously voted against House leadership and the rest of the
Democratic caucus. Now, we need to show the establishment that we have
Jamaal, Cori, and the Squad’s back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83326?refcode=em20211112-20459&t=1022&akid=20459%2E1203867%2E-7CK2K ]We know corporate Democrats will target the Squad this election cycle
for their courageous vote against the corporate-backed infrastructure
bill. Can you rush a contribution to show the Squad that we have their
back?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83326?refcode=em20211112-20459&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20459%2E1203867%2E-7CK2K ]Contribute $3

Vote after vote, the Squad has shown that they won’t play political games
and cave to corporate Democrats or obstructionists like Joe Manchin and
Kyrsten Sinema.

Cori, Jamaal, and the Squad took a risk by taking a stand, and now risk
being primaried by corporate Democrats backed by Republicans. We’ve seen
this happen before to AOC, Ilhan, and Rashida — and need to make sure that
their courage doesn’t come at a cost.

We must step up to show that we support Cori, Jamaal, and the Squad’s
votes, and their continued fight for the people. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83326?refcode=em20211112-20459&t=1024&akid=20459%2E1203867%2E-7CK2K ]Can you chip in
$3 so we have the resources to protect the Squad? We need
to ensure we keep Cori, Jamaal, and the Squad in Congress AND expand our
JD coalition.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83326?refcode=em20211112-20459&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=20459%2E1203867%2E-7CK2K ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=20459%2E1203867%2E-7CK2K ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=20459%2E1203867%2E-7CK2K ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211112-20459-footer&t=1028&refcode2=20459_1203867_-7CK2K&akid=20459%2E1203867%2E-7CK2K

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=20459%2E1203867%2E-7CK2K

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Mo Brooks
subject: BREAKING: RINO Senator Tries To Crown His Replacement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
This is truly amazing.

| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shelby_fundraising_email&n=1)
---

| Peter, This is truly amazing. President Trump and I spend a great deal of time talking about the Swamp in DC, establishment politicians, and RINO corruption but usually their games are hidden in back rooms. Very rarely is someone bold enough to put their maneuvering out in the light for the whole world to see. However, that is exactly what retiring RINO Senator Richard Shelby has done with his move to provide Katie Britt with 5 million dollars in campaign funds. [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RnH4SqGa7l8DbUVgHGIJXsSQOq-a0--jxbszJpoGsjUoT1OS8HWr_DI4Y4M6uQYvFA&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shelby_fundraising_email&n=2) Senator Shelby is truly trying to buy a Senate seat for his picked replacement despite what the Alabamians want for their state. Every legitimate poll that has been done shows that I maintain a strong lead over every competitor. It is abundantly clear that secure borders, America first policies, and common sense Conservative values are what the people of Alabama want. However, Shelby is trying to play kingmaker and extend his lineage beyond its natural lifespan. ** Friend,** The other day, Paul Gosar posted a video with a disturbing and violent message directed toward President Biden and AOC. It’s incredible that I have to say this: I strongly condemn the brazen and inappropriate message. We can and must do better. My campaign has been clear about our goal from the start: **We want to bring integrity, accountability, and transparency back to the Attorney General's office.** Bad actors like Paul Gosar stain our democracy and make public service harder for us all. It’s simple -- We must win to defeat this hatred and bring a better and safer vision to Arizona.** I cannot do this alone: I need your help to make sure we can share our vision with all of Arizona. [Please contribute today so we don’t fall behind](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38576129/316071722/382972307?refcode=20211112_Gosar&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTY1NWEwYy0wZDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCtdmefXCAhSIFMvrTIwfRs8M9ubl-6JOD0h3ZiJJ5w=). My team will report our progress to me later today.** When we win, I will proudly be Arizona’s first Latino Attorney General. We’re going to do it together. This campaign is people-powered - I’m glad you’re a part of it. In community, \-- Diego

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again. RINOs and special interests in
_Sponsored message_
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcv3noe4k8gqpvtd89tqbna2eqpggicm4u8b7ke0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim1o36chh2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zllcolr8pj0a8ejaecu2dnfsaa4osoc2on8jlr8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim1o36chh2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zadiq79tob3mf7671eknte0t3i4fi7ss7vldinlo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim1o36chh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhqd2v3v9p0ftrfind0cmdik1pr6jcmuhdsnqrg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim1o36chh2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze6stgcvu61k1k8fkmffemjhlk6c17l9n8mfhcoo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim1o36chh2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgsgkto3v48c4b4obijcd66vplgtoddjs7j0dqk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim1o36chh2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqbq502k9pgai7u2oj0l1dd40t66r3mm62vi8tm8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim1o36chh2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcnjhvhrsccidkjujq0vimost4jcusmpt0pij968_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim1o36chh2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zed9ahlqu4o6ftttio93j7gvr63t7dm5o2s4agk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim1o36chh2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp6td66uq1eh36ja7sp7ie6puhnb1fr3p5g49h2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3ctim1o36chh2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points. The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down. No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built. Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by: Forcing critical race theory into our schools. Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts. Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY. That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that ** You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country. I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people! For Liberty, Jim | | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Grandparents deserve more Social Security

body:
| | | [**SIGN ON: Expand Social Security benefits, and preserve them for generations to come. Support the Social Security 2100 Act!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qeag_aSZstKyjLb6VBGuVF3SMDHkaThH8POfdheLdek6gH-Mp_1AKu0szkY5nvNCqk6SWvuQ8qo6XnWKg3p2km0P0rbHRvrSJkOvgICsHFkB6FqCAYuOPW81u3TsNWEVSH5aYHdgfO8f8bIHnPZXPrrm4y0DFhqL5QX3sQm3F5yNp5VS6cadV60YjqGoew5xvXVjeoJAVu1JPOaRWRsZSoO00dbvQVVucBSFEv7H12fJ6XOTjyF1iToNz3bDQKXXVC87wFk1n3NOfqfMJyqrkJUNNF2Ezpb6v2ZkT3xls1_NEkYDYyoJlgLX8U-e7-u9-yKUP51wdRwmda5z1gJ4Nqg_7REsjK7pKNcqDanYh24FkcrrX6hIPBubyFGX7LleBlhQ_XRmc-ThZRnTQXClPHVxHhOjd010Nq1oHg130fInkxMcpVGRriZeQFdluZiSPbQkTxh71upobQOuc6MSKlyh9uxDMrrJUkYpjzQKz3zSZ0L115qYXdg-IEWOClm7NOm4S7BT0iargJ-9iMG1YEI0Ez0Skcu2wdHRJqt5s03L0/3gy/KLZw13saRWip9Y26arX6oQ/h0/67kNFN5WFoLV60-a8bI9p4s_9-fYq7ueUc9vkZa-0jU) I was raised by my grandparents on the South Shore of Long Island. I grew up below the poverty line and my grandparents often struggled to put a hot meal on the table for my sisters and I. Anything that was more than a basic necessity was a luxury. In 50 years, the proportion of children raised by their grandparents has doubled, and the 2.6 million grandparent-led families face higher rates of poverty.
**That’s why I support the Social Security 2100 Act, which will boost benefits for _all_ older Americans for the first time in 50 years.** It’ll also increase access to benefits for children who live with relatives, and children whose parents have passed away.
**[Stand with me and sign the petition: support the Social Security 2100 Act now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qeag_aSZstKyjLb6VBGuVF3SMDHkaThH8POfdheLdek6gH-Mp_1AKu0szkY5nvNCqk6SWvuQ8qo6XnWKg3p2km0P0rbHRvrSJkOvgICsHFkB6FqCAYuOPW81u3TsNWEVSH5aYHdgfO8f8bIHnPZXPrrm4y0DFhqL5QX3sQm3F5yNp5VS6cadV60YjqGoew5xvXVjeoJAVu1JPOaRWRsZSoO00dbvQVVucBSFEv7H12fJ6XOTjyF1iToNz3bDQKXXVC87wFk1n3NOfqfMJyqrkJUNNF2Ezpb6v2ZkT3xls1_NEkYDYyoJlgLX8U-e7-u9-yEL80aoy9msVsdcF2fp5weLQz9AdcjyFLrAUAU9gm9vDz1-D7UzxzfuOUfakcM_jo7nc65et3jbfy2vyP2junr3d8owj0mfO2FCLduVR5BD0stXOVnG8x50TNy4aFBgh4ylYgWLYK6kNp72WzRZU0cK84HXEsh6Rz51ySZ8vDguLiH5sGOOQNmeAlH19AWSFNv-tc6lbRW0GJ8nwxp43paasZlu7aXss6Ux0xmcUMoqA/3gy/KLZw13saRWip9Y26arX6oQ/h1/Fse01AipQQxTeudYMXWo3WHw88g06xqq_5Qxc5L-1Ag)**
While billionaires rake in record wealth and pay Social Security taxes on only a _fraction_ of their income, millions of families like the one I grew up in struggle to make ends meet.
And, as a working mom, I know that taking time off of work to care for children or relatives means smaller Social Security benefits, which are based on pre-retirement income.
The Social Security 2100 Act will ensure the wealthy pay their fair share, preserving Social Security for generations to come. And, it’ll provide caregiver credits, so that no American is left behind.
**In the richest nation in the world, seniors deserve to retire with dignity, and children deserve to grow up without experiencing poverty.**
******[Stand with me and sign the petition: support the Social Security 2100 Act now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qeag_aSZstKyjLb6VBGuVF3SMDHkaThH8POfdheLdek6gH-Mp_1AKu0szkY5nvNCqk6SWvuQ8qo6XnWKg3p2km0P0rbHRvrSJkOvgICsHFkB6FqCAYuOPW81u3TsNWEVSH5aYHdgfO8f8bIHnPZXPrrm4y0DFhqL5QX3sQm3F5yNp5VS6cadV60YjqGoew5xvXVjeoJAVu1JPOaRWRsZSoO00dbvQVVucBSFEv7H12fJ6XOTjyF1iToNz3bDQKXXVC87wFk1n3NOfqfMJyqrkJUNNF2Ezpb6v2ZkT3xls1_NEkYDYyoJlgLX8U-e7-u9-y-G9L-j9xlZSxhzO8Z7PqcBNay9Rmgj6E46Gl5bxFwA1rZC6cdk-qzygfWqQyV-yfKMbz1QQlhYs7hwHgiynTrm8Y6p3psnPei9KEclQ1dsCeGJ19khNJZz5gSAMbOsImFeLlDEwgDisIuWxJnMFSSW-6NtgmGCDCeN6--Is6E_om8VDY_geUDYmB972r_7c_NwT8Pvh2DWPs3BVMfRJ-XiMpKTXRaNXqlYOKiDC7Vn0/3gy/KLZw13saRWip9Y26arX6oQ/h2/nf0b6llKvrBOiaXmqbbBtZSW2vsz9c5AuEqQRTWuwKM)**
Thanks for standing up.
\-- Melanie D’Arrigo

name: Jay Inslee
subject: My takeaways from COP26
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Let's meet this moment with imagination and optimism

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/34WRSNeWakQj/eGVJaUVUY0V5NFFsbTlZaExHSUw1ZEpZNE1lU2xRK1BSZXVIVEUwUk0yeTA0eHJZSEdoTU5rV0ZMdkE2SzJoUUdvbTMwZ1pMQThuQU1tc1o2K0MzVUtTNzRjM1g4Y2ptU1FwZGk0Szd4UnM9S0/QU9pQ1F1ZkYzNW9LS3FvUGZPR2dGUHNZUTE1UC8wTUEyeUpzeFdzMXd4MD0S1) Friend -- I was honored to attend the United Nations Climate Change Conference (COP26) in Glasgow these last few days. Now, I wanted to report back to you on my experience there. **My biggest takeaway is that Washington state continues to lead the charge to address the climate crisis, but we are not alone.** At COP26, I led a coalition of 68 state, regional, and city governments committed to halving emissions by 2030 and getting to net-zero by mid-century. What we do in these next five years will determine the fate of our species. The stakes couldn't be higher. So I was proud to stand with this coalition representing 470 million people committed to taking aggressive action together. [_**Will you stand with us? Chip in $10 right now, so we can strengthen the movement to meet this make-or-break moment with imagination and optimism.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/mPwjhRKYr~BK/eGVJaUVUY0V5NFFsbTlZaExHSUw1ZEpZNE1lU2xRK1BSZXVIVEUwUk0yeTA0eHJZSEdoTU5rV0ZMdkE2SzJoUUdvbTMwZ1pMQThuQU1tc1o2K0MzVUtTNzRjM1g4Y2ptU1FwZGk0Szd4UnM9S0/QU9pQ1F1ZkYzNW9LS3FvUGZPR2dGUHNZUTE1UC8wTUEyeUpzeFdzMXd4MD0S1) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/x4r9S26W9aJ3/eGVJaUVUY0V5NFFsbTlZaExHSUw1ZEpZNE1lU2xRK1BSZXVIVEUwUk0yeTA0eHJZSEdoTU5rV0ZMdkE2SzJoUUdvbTMwZ1pMQThuQU1tc1o2K0MzVUtTNzRjM1g4Y2ptU1FwZGk0Szd4UnM9S0/QU9pQ1F1ZkYzNW9LS3FvUGZPR2dGUHNZUTE1UC8wTUEyeUpzeFdzMXd4MD0S1)
---
| | [$10 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/yr7KJR20baBp/eGVJaUVUY0V5NFFsbTlZaExHSUw1ZEpZNE1lU2xRK1BSZXVIVEUwUk0yeTA0eHJZSEdoTU5rV0ZMdkE2SzJoUUdvbTMwZ1pMQThuQU1tc1o2K0MzVUtTNzRjM1g4Y2ptU1FwZGk0Szd4UnM9S0/QU9pQ1F1ZkYzNW9LS3FvUGZPR2dGUHNZUTE1UC8wTUEyeUpzeFdzMXd4MD0S1)
---
| [$25 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/_a-dsDaLWXFN/eGVJaUVUY0V5NFFsbTlZaExHSUw1ZEpZNE1lU2xRK1BSZXVIVEUwUk0yeTA0eHJZSEdoTU5rV0ZMdkE2SzJoUUdvbTMwZ1pMQThuQU1tc1o2K0MzVUtTNzRjM1g4Y2ptU1FwZGk0Szd4UnM9S0/QU9pQ1F1ZkYzNW9LS3FvUGZPR2dGUHNZUTE1UC8wTUEyeUpzeFdzMXd4MD0S1)
---
| | [$50 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSdjeg4fA/eGVJaUVUY0V5NFFsbTlZaExHSUw1ZEpZNE1lU2xRK1BSZXVIVEUwUk0yeTA0eHJZSEdoTU5rV0ZMdkE2SzJoUUdvbTMwZ1pMQThuQU1tc1o2K0MzVUtTNzRjM1g4Y2ptU1FwZGk0Szd4UnM9S0/QU9pQ1F1ZkYzNW9LS3FvUGZPR2dGUHNZUTE1UC8wTUEyeUpzeFdzMXd4MD0S1)
---
| [$100 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/9bq3h0zPqkJb/eGVJaUVUY0V5NFFsbTlZaExHSUw1ZEpZNE1lU2xRK1BSZXVIVEUwUk0yeTA0eHJZSEdoTU5rV0ZMdkE2SzJoUUdvbTMwZ1pMQThuQU1tc1o2K0MzVUtTNzRjM1g4Y2ptU1FwZGk0Szd4UnM9S0/QU9pQ1F1ZkYzNW9LS3FvUGZPR2dGUHNZUTE1UC8wTUEyeUpzeFdzMXd4MD0S1)
---
| | [OTHER ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/2WP-M_39ayF~/eGVJaUVUY0V5NFFsbTlZaExHSUw1ZEpZNE1lU2xRK1BSZXVIVEUwUk0yeTA0eHJZSEdoTU5rV0ZMdkE2SzJoUUdvbTMwZ1pMQThuQU1tc1o2K0MzVUtTNzRjM1g4Y2ptU1FwZGk0Szd4UnM9S0/QU9pQ1F1ZkYzNW9LS3FvUGZPR2dGUHNZUTE1UC8wTUEyeUpzeFdzMXd4MD0S1)

It is nearly impossible to overstate the depth of the crisis we're facing. It's a looming disaster movie come-to-life, and we are beginning to see previews of it as we watch our forests burn, and witness countless cities devastated by floods and historic heatwaves.
At this point, our nation must pick up the mantle and lead the world in creating an innovative, transformative clean-energy economy -- or risk being left behind. But regardless of what happens in the other Washington, Washington State will continue to be bold while fighting this growing crisis.
I was proud to announce over the weekend that Washington public fleets will soon be fully electrified. Additionally, I joined leaders from the Pacific Coast Collaborative to launch the Low Carbon Construction Task Force, which will create good jobs while fighting climate change.
While we certainly have left work to do, I am leaving Glasgow feeling heartened and inspired. We're in this together, and I know that together we will meet this moment.
[_**Chip in $10 today, so we can continue to power our fight for climate action together.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/mPwjhRKYr~BK/eGVJaUVUY0V5NFFsbTlZaExHSUw1ZEpZNE1lU2xRK1BSZXVIVEUwUk0yeTA0eHJZSEdoTU5rV0ZMdkE2SzJoUUdvbTMwZ1pMQThuQU1tc1o2K0MzVUtTNzRjM1g4Y2ptU1FwZGk0Szd4UnM9S0/QU9pQ1F1ZkYzNW9LS3FvUGZPR2dGUHNZUTE1UC8wTUEyeUpzeFdzMXd4MD0S1)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/WeGZfawXYNTz/eGVJaUVUY0V5NFFsbTlZaExHSUw1ZEpZNE1lU2xRK1BSZXVIVEUwUk0yeTA0eHJZSEdoTU5rV0ZMdkE2SzJoUUdvbTMwZ1pMQThuQU1tc1o2K0MzVUtTNzRjM1g4Y2ptU1FwZGk0Szd4UnM9S0/QU9pQ1F1ZkYzNW9LS3FvUGZPR2dGUHNZUTE1UC8wTUEyeUpzeFdzMXd4MD0S1)

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Who do you think is going to win?

body:

Peter,

This week marks one year until the 2022 midterm elections that will decide whether we’re able to maintain our position as s center-right nation, or whether we’ll embrace the far-Left policies of the Biden Administration.

It goes without saying that I’m a proponent of conservatism in the United States – and if the results of last Tuesday’s election in Virginia were any sign – I’m not alone.

Last week, a political spectator far smarter than me laid it out in these terms --- and I’m paraphrasing: if Republicans nationwide outperformed 2020 numbers at the same level Virginia candidates did last week -- +12.3 pts – _**Republicans would pick up 51 seats in the House of representatives**_.

**[I want to know what you think: Are you expecting the House to flip Republican next year?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fab2cc2f41f243649eacb766c45d6281&_e=9Snh3Pys2I4uK6knDa1fRGtCZ9saNZJAfRkRmBvIux2_YMusAHQsH35obfAKPJToiJAtMhEObTWXUrDm7TTU8wQyKDyxmkKuLM8dIzCqSVhoUqlk7M1A3vGqiZxUsmidiW-y5zoOc1gJVVnvUgKSOaPFMzRe-OYmKRTBUTK0_YewC0Q_AJhok4n2dABXHmCAAqyZgm1D_W_jer7ySJs8nHGa2_eTE6rLHuPFFAeyFX7-f_hV233n2VsGoNz49lgtwr3kvdPcxT0Cw91LGTodjQnMIAAD_ySVBd3KxcmwPi_oQOkcQoW1IjqhIxnXTSSN5-9YGY2Pv2l049Z-zmaSFZ3byDLCs8o3L9vVdQWdaSKaJmIykaskMMNVrykBvSM3ZIFdNoPSkn946BcKBMmorSsz2ZnjH13GeLp0WsTraKA86trjwYzJJW_zz2IS55fEg2rduCdi3_Fhw2jvJzEyICU0_QbNacaJtFS_g6QDrIMSzx3Ll68RGaw4jQVFLl0OQBo3iSLP_1y3IPHQqMT5yJceo0p2Q1PFH2BAm0cpOBdobHBY7YQAAUfARgsjoYFPSWSN7qLAWtJbYlOMkESG7hNZ3NhiCI3BkAEvcTQ_UtI%3D)**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fab2cc2f41f243649eacb766c45d6281&_e=9Snh3Pys2I4uK6knDa1fRGtCZ9saNZJAfRkRmBvIux2_YMusAHQsH35obfAKPJToiJAtMhEObTWXUrDm7TTU8wQyKDyxmkKuLM8dIzCqSVhoUqlk7M1A3vGqiZxUsmidiW-y5zoOc1gJVVnvUgKSOaPFMzRe-OYmKRTBUTK0_YewC0Q_AJhok4n2dABXHmCAAqyZgm1D_W_jer7ySJs8nHGa2_eTE6rLHuPFFAeyFX7-f_hV233n2VsGoNz49lgtwr3kvdPcxT0Cw91LGTodjQnMIAAD_ySVBd3KxcmwPi_oQOkcQoW1IjqhIxnXTSSN5-9YGY2Pv2l049Z-zmaSFZ3byDLCs8o3L9vVdQWdaSKaJmIykaskMMNVrykBvSM3ZIFdNoPSkn946BcKBMmorSg9ePDbKGIsFud4BYtmD_q2-RFMRQte2DTgFtLQGv-2MVCbXTILzp1Z9uOUl8oftMKDP8HNaEzkHlicKzrEjgDGfjVPTx-P4gcj4xZd2BJXgRC67usG8YwKgcscAumsPCjJLakmv8DMm73ceppUrB0iNUoJq8IWcRhO9EXxt-_Lj76seSeAwNy4RcY4sUo6VU-FH5hRD_lxejSujzycV4E%3D)

It’s important to keep in mind that we are still one year out from Election Day; President Biden’s poll numbers may recover – however unlikely that may be – so, **we need to remember this palpable feeling of excitement we’re all feeling right now as we head into the midterms**.

I’m looking forward to reading your survey responses!

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

[**DO YOU THINK WE'LL WIN THE HOUSE?
LET ME KNOW -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fab2cc2f41f243649eacb766c45d6281&_e=9Snh3Pys2I4uK6knDa1fRGtCZ9saNZJAfRkRmBvIux2_YMusAHQsH35obfAKPJToiJAtMhEObTWXUrDm7TTU8wQyKDyxmkKuLM8dIzCqSVhoUqlk7M1A3vGqiZxUsmidiW-y5zoOc1gJVVnvUgKSOaPFMzRe-OYmKRTBUTK0_YewC0Q_AJhok4n2dABXHmCAAqyZgm1D_W_jer7ySJs8nHGa2_eTE6rLHuPFFAeyFX7-f_hV233n2VsGoNz49lgtwr3kvdPcxT0Cw91LGTodjQnMIAAD_ySVBd3KxcmwPi_oQOkcQoW1IjqhIxnXTSSN5-9YGY2Pv2l049Z-zmaSFZ3byDLCs8o3L9vVdQWdaSKaJmIykaskMMNVrykBvSM3ZIFdNoPSkn946BcKBMmorVVJssJbHS3KXO-sy6APHfDZ9AXLQaG7eK8bk1-Xhp56W0dq7s5Fn-EtkJpk3ujQ8HsllAWM2gFLhufzAt3eSDX6rOYQ5wmGOScMVbm-hzLO-wTl3fsRmsgjsAbTVbaF8Qy__9XWmFNdaabtD8vWh744zYti76iFrWAkpxz4xOZpWRG5NIHJMxHb_vHw7OHrVwv4xwsSdduM30CUX8DavzE%3D)

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Thank you for joining the fight for Ohio’s future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
I am so grateful that you’re with me in this fight for a fairer, stronger Ohio.
Thank you for joining my team, friend,
I am so grateful that you’re with me in this fight for a fairer, stronger Ohio.
**[I’m running for governor because it’s time for a little Dayton toughness in Columbus. Watch this video to learn more, then pitch in to help me take back the Ohio Governor’s seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38576705/316073995/-481488817?refcode=em_welcome_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjE0ZWRiMS0xMTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3YyBIEu5y8Xr_7i9dJiAJQTmE__kfDwJaqVXSz5-8U=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38576706/316073996/-481488817?refcode=em_welcome_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjE0ZWRiMS0xMTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3YyBIEu5y8Xr_7i9dJiAJQTmE__kfDwJaqVXSz5-8U=)
As Mayor of Dayton, I have been on the frontlines of so many of the most difficult and defining issues facing our state, from reviving manufacturing and creating good-paying jobs to taking on the opioid crisis and gun violence. Now, I’m ready to fight for all Ohio families.
Right now, corruption, cronyism and criminal conduct is just the way things are done, and our leaders -- like Republican Governor Mike DeWine -- are too weak to do something. It’s time for a middle-class governor who will fight for Ohioans, not another millionaire who serves corporate interests.
Unlike Mike DeWine, I’m not a millionaire who grew up in a wealthy family. My dad was a union ironworker and my mom worked odd jobs to help us get by. I’m not in this race to support corporations and the wealthy elite. I’m running for families like mine.
I’m running because I believe that if you work hard and play by the rules, you should be able to provide for yourself and your family. You shouldn’t have to leave the state or attend a fancy school. You should be able to build your family and help your community wherever you are -- and frankly, that’s not the case anymore.
**[I’m ready to do something about it. I’m ready to fight for Ohio families and our values. Are you? Watch our video, then donate to support our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38576707/316073997/-481488817?refcode=em_welcome_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjE0ZWRiMS0xMTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3YyBIEu5y8Xr_7i9dJiAJQTmE__kfDwJaqVXSz5-8U=)**
We have a real opportunity to flip this seat and elect a governor for the people, not corporate backers. But it won’t be easy -- that’s why I’m hoping I can count on your support in this fight.
Onward,
Nan Whaley

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38576708/316073998/-481488817?refcode=em_welcome_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjE0ZWRiMS0xMTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3YyBIEu5y8Xr_7i9dJiAJQTmE__kfDwJaqVXSz5-8U=)**

name: Sen. Tammy Duckworth
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I'm reaching out to ask you to make a contribution in support of my reelection campaign.
#
Team,
**[I’m reaching out today to ask you to split a contribution, of any amount you can afford, between my campaign and Senator Jacky Rosen’s.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38576738/316074140/-1679024927?refcode=jr_em_nd_211112_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTlkZjIyMS0xMjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-1HndYFN7lqDwMApfnJr8dVq_B6UluSqVz9MH3N698=)**
But first, let me tell you a little bit about why I ran for Senate in the first place.
When I was a kid, the company my dad worked for was sold. He lost his job and my family was eventually forced onto public assistance. My brother and I relied on reduced-price meals at our public school and we used food stamps to put dinner on the table -- until they ran out. It was tough, and we probably wouldn’t have made it through without government support.
Those experiences shaped the person I am today, and motivated me to speak up on behalf of families like my own who need a little help to get by. And also to speak out _against_ Republicans who want to slash critical safety net programs that families depend on.
**Now, as a U.S. Senator, I can do more to ensure we’re making good decisions in Washington that make life easier for working families.**
I will continue to be an advocate for our working families in Washington -- but in order to do that, I need your help to win my reelection campaign. So:
**[Split a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, between my campaign and Senator Jacky Rosen’s today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38576739/316074141/-1679024927?refcode=jr_em_nd_211112_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTlkZjIyMS0xMjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-1HndYFN7lqDwMApfnJr8dVq_B6UluSqVz9MH3N698=)**
Thank you for your support,
Tammy Duckworth

clean_body: I'm reaching out to ask you to make a contribution in support of my reelection campaign. Team, = But first, let me tell you a little bit about why I ran for Senate in the first place. When I was a kid, the company my dad worked for was sold. He lost his job and my family was eventually forced onto public assistance. My brother and I relied on reduced-price meals at our public school and we used food stamps to put dinner on the table -- until they ran out. It was tough, and we probably wouldn’t have made it through without government support. Those experiences shaped the person I am today, and motivated me to speak up on behalf of families like my own who need a little help to get by. And also to speak out against Republicans who want to slash critical safety net programs that families depend on. Now, as a U.S. Senator, I can do more to ensure we’re making good decisions in Washington that make life easier for working families. I will continue to be an advocate for our working families in Washington -- but in order to do that, I need your help to win my reelection campaign. So: = Thank you for your support, Tammy Duckworth =

body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6bca87df06a44512851ad1c1b8cd38c1&_e=VI8A-wxi5F1xT39StcoWVrUxr65fksrGwfkLy4De8ssuycbmTj8O5iLNJBEtD71wiJgjWnBL7a_2ygNChAY6WfN2eddTViroe7okWEDnNQAWs0KsKiF2xpKW4rqDXLxdga8sD7F7oMh7nrpAQlv5ZNoZBwwVoM0EcAIx682482o_zD-TtfgOv-z6-2ZOrnE_d_o7QkKJGge9fN0V1R4-ycndv3dTlNCdO2dTQcwiLRCZjyh4Rl5xa7n-3rhPXnG6dQjSxf96O0MoOHrVjMjWaVc6gSTj0loLiLfvKD0rTrcxxlqq_HEknR_tTcFrNTLQqu7RQjt54BcGjbCUucWD1Ihvu8GjSP0qTCMu_HVpHteHliz5zUG8F2ywIqrTXmVEY-8okpL5gzVObmzzOmXwpop7JX_htapCisyuotILmH3GJ3ofrDg-Z_jyvvl4GszF_JNcJa4DbI6H_1v8hP7WFz0AClrKE84MXQPPe4FQz2Q%3D)

Peter,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6bca87df06a44512851ad1c1b8cd38c1&_e=VI8A-wxi5F1xT39StcoWVrUxr65fksrGwfkLy4De8ssuycbmTj8O5iLNJBEtD71wiJgjWnBL7a_2ygNChAY6WfN2eddTViroe7okWEDnNQAWs0KsKiF2xpKW4rqDXLxdga8sD7F7oMh7nrpAQlv5ZNoZBwwVoM0EcAIx682482o_zD-TtfgOv-z6-2ZOrnE_d_o7QkKJGge9fN0V1R4-ycndv3dTlNCdO2dTQcwiLRCZjyh4Rl5xa7n-3rhPXnG6dQjSxf96O0MoOHrVjMjWaYkNjxuhQ3oByB6GhPFr_apAzRfD82Rjg80KGWTlicNG0cobSlNNKD2YSPWUtc8S6-oz8mZvF2HxSN6DEuL_rdpMZAMIUjltK5w1nNWCCKci1Jc76yJXZ-y9XS_CiFmE-QBCm4BrdD9YsqWKHfyBP98cgBVj8qFq82sYRIE_00pCO6WE9gwi8ffi5-ToiG_6cSpFxkJan1pS6v16ho30quU%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6bca87df06a44512851ad1c1b8cd38c1&_e=VI8A-wxi5F1xT39StcoWVrUxr65fksrGwfkLy4De8ssuycbmTj8O5iLNJBEtD71wiJgjWnBL7a_2ygNChAY6WfN2eddTViroe7okWEDnNQAWs0KsKiF2xpKW4rqDXLxdga8sD7F7oMh7nrpAQlv5ZNoZBwwVoM0EcAIx682482o_zD-TtfgOv-z6-2ZOrnE_d_o7QkKJGge9fN0V1R4-ycndv3dTlNCdO2dTQcwiLRCZjyh4Rl5xa7n-3rhPXnG6dQjSxf96O0MoOHrVjMjWaZvAvOp6XjzK5he2H33AVM2gAcIVXto1KIToKlnQfOS98WamyYwjaKhyIWjsH4OaE7yN2FIkr6cheSj8kP-BlrXXcrPXHUbUqshLMzAvx5UwW4YuAk2Dkiafs6psLNygtZzM_l8M7MsG6I3Uj7dl8ghFsU-LCDwQ4XjkTcLtyxhRaWJ9MaarniVfftNltvKjyfc63NvdvTsgdqW_YKN7haA%3D)
I am running against Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud Democrat who has voted for every idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Peter. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6bca87df06a44512851ad1c1b8cd38c1&_e=VI8A-wxi5F1xT39StcoWVrUxr65fksrGwfkLy4De8ssuycbmTj8O5iLNJBEtD71wiJgjWnBL7a_2ygNChAY6WfN2eddTViroe7okWEDnNQAWs0KsKiF2xpKW4rqDXLxdga8sD7F7oMh7nrpAQlv5ZNoZBwwVoM0EcAIx682482o_zD-TtfgOv-z6-2ZOrnE_d_o7QkKJGge9fN0V1R4-ycndv3dTlNCdO2dTQcwiLRCZjyh4Rl5xa7n-3rhPXnG6dQjSxf96O0MoOHrVjMjWaVrF2cdgvRmJjoeTk0Lvx3MXq4PAOR4cHpFlGtEVXYJt8cgHeIw-IuOTFqrcVQA20SXELyyt_633MRa3Naq7ozYDLwKov0bn3dXSJ7--qFKO0WG76_R5soKBsZfDXEuwPt8fU8152jjCH7YvXFplflqCmdVcWTvG4OzpAO5FUKoXNnod-X6MQ0Et5r8PBoeVhD-QvsRcWd_Pcv3mWXwn64M%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6bca87df06a44512851ad1c1b8cd38c1&_e=VI8A-wxi5F1xT39StcoWVrUxr65fksrGwfkLy4De8ssuycbmTj8O5iLNJBEtD71wiJgjWnBL7a_2ygNChAY6WfN2eddTViroe7okWEDnNQAWs0KsKiF2xpKW4rqDXLxdga8sD7F7oMh7nrpAQlv5ZNoZBwwVoM0EcAIx682482o_zD-TtfgOv-z6-2ZOrnE_d_o7QkKJGge9fN0V1R4-ycndv3dTlNCdO2dTQcwiLRCZjyh4Rl5xa7n-3rhPXnG6dQjSxf96O0MoOHrVjMjWaRsNtTFXQQ9ZirKMk0iTgyScGKHamhVmiwtRIS8mfkYDsK-fhjlG2Zed7Glk2KrZgmfbfZMUpySUONW4nMysiBLpAuvBQwGz0RBctG986i-kN0zsRU2SFGa8lsv_s2t81w-v3XC3jKg7HDKgMEdCNWLGsc8uI_Y4Kesi2H4xzy5Irb1kKzJDtvscB42QrgkDm_ZYN1PJFEbpZXERZZvXuhs%3D)
Herschel Walker

body:
National Republicans expanded their list of top Democratic targets.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38576812/316074465/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211112-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGFjNDZhZC0xMjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wbNedq1giPF9s_ZSZev-ith4IVh-7mOxfH7ZOKfw3JE=)
