| Peter,

This is serious.

The leader of the national House Republican campaign arm just said:

**“In a cycle like this, no Democrat is safe.”**

**National Republicans expanded their list of top Democratic targets from 57 to 70 — only hours after big GOP wins this month.**

Republicans need to flip just five seats to regain the House majority, and they are playing for keeps. Kevin McCarthy is so confident that he says that winning in 2022 will ensure Republican control for the next _decade_.

**The infrastructure bill proves that Democrats are delivering results.** Now, we need to do everything we can to make sure Democrats have the resources to get our winning message across to voters.

[_**Please, rush in a contribution today to stop Republicans and support as many rural Democrats as possible.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38576813/316074466/-1273307081?refcode=BLU-BRP-20211112-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGFjNDZhZC0xMjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wbNedq1giPF9s_ZSZev-ith4IVh-7mOxfH7ZOKfw3JE=)

body:
We cannot allow Kyrsten Sinema to continue robbing the Democratic Party of critical wins. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPOMFh3BCcwzR2iU5qUHACHnG07PViUORZ6r4gFlPcTuuNKKH5PIaGpVT3rDrdgLVx3zo9fNb6ZbDwf3cOoKkDQ96N8t4OifW9mKExv1DEkXz2olAIU8f9a-CyI4S05ieu6kg6gy5LjeVIQWNeX7DPkXSIhZCuAtyYGvpCRcHrcu7WtVEqCriGmaeEppJWypMJqN2B7sMAA3yXW938IUJ9Ao_Uwjd5HSxy8BDXmNApH_xTg3f2HBNKGwSBIF6OXpKJGSZpdfi8LCO3d9pxBVYypA/3gy/rqG2XfBsQa-_S_bmD5Do4g/h0/SQxvkOmK-dIroerUP13ozIgX9M4UMGfIkAAX3FhyCXA)
Peter, One of the core promises of the Biden administration was to raise taxes on multi-millionaires, billionaires, and corporations to pay for popular agenda items like child care, healthcare, education, and climate measures. And with Democrats in charge of the House and the Senate, getting it done seemed like it should be a no-brainer. **But a group of corporate Democrats — led by Senator Kyrsten Sinema — are blocking this from happening.** Sinema reportedly told the Biden administration that raising taxes _by a mere 3 percentage points_ on households earning more than $5 million is too onerous, arguing that she would only support an increased tax on people who earn $10 million a year or more. We cannot allow Kyrsten Sinema to continue robbing the Democratic Party of critical wins — whether that be a wealth tax, the Build Back Better Act, abolishing the filibuster, or something else — that the party needs in order to keep their House and Senate majorities in the midterms. **[There's now less than a year left until the midterms, Peter, and we need to clearly communicate to Senator Sinema that we are ready to hold her accountable, and that we are ready to oust her for someone who will work for us in Congress. Will you chip in whatever you can to our growing movement?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSnQIvuwJ5fUsIFio1_aaoU3-2p6J2U_ocJvsriptCiSaIX3bdnYKypgcP8qUQ6sdD7kX-bXrOMH410d6l38mPGtg6SjbmxoW5Nm31LapyagaavMpWIVnD3eSUkHDlgyebBxw3y4FZPkjWu9NTNOSTmUCs0vJn_FSkx9eH9O3dY7QqqAi_iKs89hCF_MwYIJ6PvHxnDuPt6-0d6gEUTiJdZNt7EWjCHhGLC-h3Uc10ODWX_24jjjqk6WYmH4kdb8xXcEAEvXtw6jQXqd_WZCD8MZWlpdGABU_ZAgvUHeJmIWpASyVIZ7NcHug7Q4CvsylIHpK1yaxKpR89TGoKxiuyQq6-PBIuLiL7vCW0rJNSORk/3gy/rqG2XfBsQa-_S_bmD5Do4g/h1/DfhDHkvghDLwlqI1xaXyMq0KgrmGGi1if0W3OGcHP8E)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSnQIvuwJ5fUsIFio1_aaoU3-2p6J2U_ocJvsriptCiSar6CHyqAY9aTKWJaFxS7Lbw01pkxbZ7VAm25xiMYxxJ55qwn97PHmhlVyoV2sSWBVRfxF6MQsKcl2Q5IlQG93N-mJPh4H9cpsqaOcrhmXuiNSeKKVgpRfdMubRYMOzmt_8wM6ggu_tz4yWn-ue5NysyijhKUn93pRvqB5IqTeauFwOrJaVcsS2FoMzVg7sOXJk3YnY4-4qGjcvZ158M1jpraY0w9UMMz-l4CfSk8R7oIEkvwh_EJC9bvqGg3BbR1TidQO-LFULjtlGl4TYQGlIwHj4ABIgbE-Uxu5PtQDwfvBicPqkU79ygGdjXmljxpY/3gy/rqG2XfBsQa-_S_bmD5Do4g/h2/GnupqOXn6AZajc6MDrgtTjnZG-7m3UJTUYDdIBw6kR0) We know that ousting an incumbent Senator isn't easy work, but here's the truth: the numbers are on our side — **and we _can_ win.**
* Recent polling shows that Arizona Democratic primary voters are more likely to support a candidate who supports President Biden's agenda than one who doesn't, like Kyrsten Sinema.
* Recent polling _also_ showed that two-thirds of Democrats in Arizona say they'd vote for a primary challenger to Sinema — and that was before she blocked the Build Back Better plan.

**[It's now up to us to harness this energy and momentum to build a strong coalition of Arizonans who are ready for a new chapter in Arizona politics. We're now just getting started — and having your support this early on will be immensely impactful. clean_body: What grade would you give President Biden? | | BREAKING: U.S. economy adds 531,000 jobs in October | | **URGENT ACTION REQUESTED: **** WILL YOU COMPLETE DEMOCRATIC HQ 'S REPORT CARD FOR JOE BIDEN?**** We're ECSTATIC! The latest reports just revealed the US economy is bouncing back faster than expected. We're so proud to see President Biden's Build Back Better agenda delivering for the American people -- but we want to know what you think. That 's why we're asking you to complete our Official Presidential Report Card before midnight. QUICKLY: WHAT GRADE WOULD YOU GIVE JOE BIDEN? We're calling for 5 responses your area by 11:59 PM tonight. We're over the moon!! The latest reports just revealed that our economy is rebounding faster than experts expected. We added over 531,000 jobs last month alone! President Biden said it best: Our Democrats and their bold leadership are to thank for this incredible economic recovery. We're so proud to see President Biden's Build Back Better agenda delivering for the American people. But if we're going to defend our Democrats nationwide, we need to know our best grassroots supporters feel the same way. ** | Thanks, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I’m sincerely asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Today, I’m reaching out to ask if you will make a small donation before our mid-FEC fundraising deadline ends on Tuesday. Our goal is to get 2,500 individual donations between now and then, and I’m confident that with your help we can get there.

But I’m also asking you to do more than make a contribution. I’m sincerely asking you to believe in our fight to flip this U.S. Senate seat from red to blue and return it to the people of Wisconsin — because the truth is, we have a real opening in this race.

**A brand-new Marquette University Law School poll found only 38% of registered voters would re-elect Ron Johnson and 52% would vote for "someone else."**

Major election forecasters are already calling Wisconsin the tipping point for Senate control, which means we can’t take anything for granted from here on out. We can win this seat back for the people of Wisconsin and expand our Senate majority, but we've got to start laying the groundwork now.

The problem is, our fundraising has significantly slowed down over the past few weeks, and we are about to reach the halfway point in the quarter. The mid-FEC deadline is on Tuesday, which means we only have a short amount of time to get back on track. That’s why I'm asking:

[**Will you rush a donation of $10 or more to support our campaign today? We’re taking on the most vulnerable incumbent Republican up in 2022, and the polling is crystal clear: Wisconsin could be the tipping point for Senate control. Chip in today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38577058/316075264/1201999653?refcode=em21_211112_MFEC1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx_twoasks_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211112_MFEC1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx_twoasks_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sarah-godlewski&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWUzYzhiMC0xMzQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfiXAS0YgwaWeJyoxSZBQh-QUEbft40_6265E-5y3y8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38577059/316075265/1201999653?refcode=em21_211112_MFEC1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx_twoasks&utm_campaign=em21_211112_MFEC1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx_twoasks&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sarah-godlewski&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWUzYzhiMC0xMzQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfiXAS0YgwaWeJyoxSZBQh-QUEbft40_6265E-5y3y8=)

This race won't be easy, and midterm elections are historically tough for Democrats. I've never been one to back down from a tough fight, but no one runs for office alone. It was only with grassroots support that I was able to win two statewide campaigns during a midterm election. We won by a larger margin than the Governor, Lt. Governor, and the Attorney General, and flipped nine Trump counties. We can win this race, too.

Wisconsin deserves a U.S. Senator who will fight to restore voting rights, create good-paying union jobs, lower the cost of prescription drugs, raise the minimum wage, defend reproductive freedom — and yes, end the damn filibuster if that's what it takes to get the job done. I will be that Senator.

To make sure this campaign is successful, we'll need to share our vision to voters in all 72 counties of the state. Hitting our 2,500 mid-FEC donor goal is the first step in making sure we have the resources to execute our plan. Can you help with a small donation?

[**Please consider making a contribution of $10 or more to power our campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. With your help, we will reach our mid-FEC donor goal and flip this seat blue. Thanks in advance.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38577065/316075271/1201999653?refcode=em21_211112_MFEC1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx_twoasks_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211112_MFEC1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx_twoasks_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sarah-godlewski&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWUzYzhiMC0xMzQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfiXAS0YgwaWeJyoxSZBQh-QUEbft40_6265E-5y3y8=)

As you may know, I’m not taking any donations from corporate PACs, so we could really use your support here. I would greatly appreciate it.

— Sarah Godlewski

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38577066/316075272/1201999653?refcode=em21_211112_MFEC1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx_twoasks&utm_campaign=em21_211112_MFEC1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx_twoasks&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sarah-godlewski&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWUzYzhiMC0xMzQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfiXAS0YgwaWeJyoxSZBQh-QUEbft40_6265E-5y3y8=)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Regardless of my opponent, this will be a hard-fought race
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Folks —
In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history.
**Regardless of who my opponent is in 2022, this will be a hard-fought race, and I'm not taking anything for granted.**
With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority — affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade.
Make no mistake, no matter who emerges as the Republican nominee, this will still be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are already flooding the state with millions of dollars in attack ads, and they will continue to do everything in their power to flip this seat red.
With all eyes on New Hampshire, it's critical that my campaign has the resources necessary to build a robust on-the-ground campaign that is ready for whatever the GOP throws our way. [**Can you split a donation between my campaign and Alex Padilla's to keep the Senate blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21-mh?refcode=em211112-1-15&t=1&refcode2=445_159979_5jbac3&akid=445%2E159979%2E5jbac3)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21-mh?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em211112-1-15&t=20&refcode2=445_159979_5jbac3&akid=445%2E159979%2E5jbac3)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21-mh?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211112-1-15&t=21&refcode2=445_159979_5jbac3&akid=445%2E159979%2E5jbac3)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21-mh?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211112-1-15&t=22&refcode2=445_159979_5jbac3&akid=445%2E159979%2E5jbac3)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21-mh?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211112-1-15&t=23&refcode2=445_159979_5jbac3&akid=445%2E159979%2E5jbac3)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21-mh?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211112-1-15&t=24&refcode2=445_159979_5jbac3&akid=445%2E159979%2E5jbac3)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21-mh?express_lane=true&refcode=em211112-1-15&t=25&refcode2=445_159979_5jbac3&akid=445%2E159979%2E5jbac3)**
---
****
The stakes of this election are high, and this race could decide the fate of the Senate. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, team. Defending our Senate majority is the only way we can stop Mitch McConnell from blocking our progress and enacting his right-wing agenda. What happens in New Hampshire could shape the course of our country for decades.
I’m no stranger to tough fights, and I know we can win this. But it’s not going to be easy, and it’s going to take all of us working together. [**Piece by piece, one dollar at a time, we are going to build the strongest campaign we can. That starts with you, friend — please split a donation between Alex Padilla's and my campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21-mh?refcode=em211112-1-15&t=26&refcode2=445_159979_5jbac3&akid=445%2E159979%2E5jbac3)
Thank you for your support. I couldn’t be more grateful to have you with me.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-nov21-mh?refcode=em211112-1-15&t=27&refcode2=445_159979_5jbac3&akid=445%2E159979%2E5jbac3)**

Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0fff435451094ec4b0527379cc4c1b2a&_e=oCNUtKUTMgKM9eq9PoJQauB-8bp1T52j_Z41vRmkDHDx4ukLZej9zef_fWdsgXHMbjQPz8gjrqk5Wvnp18pZj9o3hUe22j8ppmO0dNF51VLFjY4cEgihpPCAGKpKnwnORt51HbWellSpOH6eiRDm-bKwZGrbeQdiL4bPrfTI8-x67rxnUMwqdXz3ezu5C2sTQ9kuEtA0tjXRma3O2UCMlpYksiRoSBDCDdaQTOxgZtUWLastfOtvWGV0elkMiSXpuceS-k7u55Sz0IyUmh9mL8xjrnSUTcQTlYFcJs3Vbu3x7dD_6blReSoA1eTZjx0Han_OiVcq93Rn0Hf8jCuJcBli4qQcQUimgvTtV0Wde39_OSCrKLoo7wLdcTPDY12p2Xk9cEySqQ7Apki3ilH6rZ6mAH-FfMIde7H1yjqT0Q3V7Qq2qbS6JHBeq-mpxHdHZXoUwYZ8P3IDrEpWapxGOg4pnEE8okPbxHUcYwzHL7M%3D)

Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0fff435451094ec4b0527379cc4c1b2a&_e=oCNUtKUTMgKM9eq9PoJQauB-8bp1T52j_Z41vRmkDHDx4ukLZej9zef_fWdsgXHMbjQPz8gjrqk5Wvnp18pZj9o3hUe22j8ppmO0dNF51VLFjY4cEgihpPCAGKpKnwnORt51HbWellSpOH6eiRDm-bKwZGrbeQdiL4bPrfTI8-x67rxnUMwqdXz3ezu5C2sTQ9kuEtA0tjXRma3O2UCMlpYksiRoSBDCDdaQTOxgZtUWLastfOtvWGV0elkMiSXpuceS-k7u55Sz0IyUmh9mLxcb_Ecs4AkP_0nfRMXI1SkLh_mpi_moegLgRRYEr4V0MowTu9WGf-s4U0imsWRagbaHwLZuKzjOyPs3v6r-4Q_gTGqiL5_nVLNYY_4S2VAwPGEtbouw_3butUc4tQoRstCL0UgMOTNPu916T_9O7Ov3CTlQusJJGQucM6arOiVKbP6tuKZ9tfvM7FAG7BjkLvwF3FKFRRrqTV2MJCQBCnY%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0fff435451094ec4b0527379cc4c1b2a&_e=oCNUtKUTMgKM9eq9PoJQauB-8bp1T52j_Z41vRmkDHDx4ukLZej9zef_fWdsgXHMbjQPz8gjrqk5Wvnp18pZj9o3hUe22j8ppmO0dNF51VLFjY4cEgihpPCAGKpKnwnORt51HbWellSpOH6eiRDm-bKwZGrbeQdiL4bPrfTI8-x67rxnUMwqdXz3ezu5C2sTQ9kuEtA0tjXRma3O2UCMlpYksiRoSBDCDdaQTOxgZtUWLastfOtvWGV0elkMiSXpuceS-k7u55Sz0IyUmh9mL9RxDxAaygnqYt5bki9cXoNqpg-kJut0TxDZHUWSljXKV753VYy8nVIEElfuExLthwfj8daaDZPygWikMSak5KDyGRvopPjJdl1bVs8BOk6BtYTDZ3p8kLNMAPplDtSE4pao8AH9nZAkFil4KHJeuAVsl2OrN1DnK6EtlSacuqbTUxjQyC3mzxt8XBe3oftGBg0KFOGhGMbhwGZD6n5hXYo%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0fff435451094ec4b0527379cc4c1b2a&_e=oCNUtKUTMgKM9eq9PoJQauB-8bp1T52j_Z41vRmkDHDx4ukLZej9zef_fWdsgXHMbjQPz8gjrqk5Wvnp18pZj9o3hUe22j8ppmO0dNF51VLFjY4cEgihpPCAGKpKnwnORt51HbWellSpOH6eiRDm-bKwZGrbeQdiL4bPrfTI8-x67rxnUMwqdXz3ezu5C2sTQ9kuEtA0tjXRma3O2UCMlpYksiRoSBDCDdaQTOxgZtUWLastfOtvWGV0elkMiSXpuceS-k7u55Sz0IyUmh9mL9EW6eS1rVZPpWKMOrNFeqBDqeLEnM8W87FD54szPqZnUNY2VNGYfqfHTwIRX16SswNBDZU52xid63fJUNWJ6DDw3MxqI91FBG1ynhhLg3lVWJA-OF3LFMl1UZedXF38X4hnQ5eg52Dm8qZpZYIz7ajJ10koP6a9SW7iLUZ8bn6OQQhYO_gPZzJEZFfMi936UT0xsSlYFJvC2ysPZfO0UTU%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0fff435451094ec4b0527379cc4c1b2a&_e=oCNUtKUTMgKM9eq9PoJQauB-8bp1T52j_Z41vRmkDHDx4ukLZej9zef_fWdsgXHMbjQPz8gjrqk5Wvnp18pZj9o3hUe22j8ppmO0dNF51VLFjY4cEgihpPCAGKpKnwnORt51HbWellSpOH6eiRDm-bKwZGrbeQdiL4bPrfTI8-x67rxnUMwqdXz3ezu5C2sTQ9kuEtA0tjXRma3O2UCMlpYksiRoSBDCDdaQTOxgZtUWLastfOtvWGV0elkMiSXpuceS-k7u55Sz0IyUmh9mL6aeUq-v4EWTiPaU_oRZoMr55gcrccJfQPpCEjlTyDZjNFQcS847KZoXZ6yy68lHTImax6IMQXxWD47BoxlyRe-BqAMISaO95kmH-UuHzK0ntjL7TYlwA1ZBMm3M7x7UQldoGceCsKkZtXbKR6nIoBXLalRktonyt6PoChTbzQ5dOBiD0u0d2bePZQu69wkNgltN84Tb4CrAgKnw8_C0nVw%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0fff435451094ec4b0527379cc4c1b2a&_e=oCNUtKUTMgKM9eq9PoJQauB-8bp1T52j_Z41vRmkDHDx4ukLZej9zef_fWdsgXHMbjQPz8gjrqk5Wvnp18pZj9o3hUe22j8ppmO0dNF51VLFjY4cEgihpPCAGKpKnwnORt51HbWellSpOH6eiRDm-bKwZGrbeQdiL4bPrfTI8-x67rxnUMwqdXz3ezu5C2sTQ9kuEtA0tjXRma3O2UCMlpYksiRoSBDCDdaQTOxgZtUWLastfOtvWGV0elkMiSXpuceS-k7u55Sz0IyUmh9mLwyqtoBlGsvmIMUDsWGCHOwoHnragiIqF3Z5kWfwWk4C4WYkr8bf1IqSozQU2zzu_RKM-CWF5Rf0x2VD0YV7ltnK18rgT0nT3GBS9cuqv_RBPD812bPYP4KuYmnjJ0asYWCW3sLU96R2vhod1_-4MxT-u9PtMnyWyd-E9eAzzbpF3EY9CDdadK_WXMDbzcUFK81EQyIjQq85xpaHn3FelxI%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0fff435451094ec4b0527379cc4c1b2a&_e=oCNUtKUTMgKM9eq9PoJQauB-8bp1T52j_Z41vRmkDHDx4ukLZej9zef_fWdsgXHMbjQPz8gjrqk5Wvnp18pZj9o3hUe22j8ppmO0dNF51VLFjY4cEgihpPCAGKpKnwnORt51HbWellSpOH6eiRDm-bKwZGrbeQdiL4bPrfTI8-x67rxnUMwqdXz3ezu5C2sTQ9kuEtA0tjXRma3O2UCMlpYksiRoSBDCDdaQTOxgZtUWLastfOtvWGV0elkMiSXpuceS-k7u55Sz0IyUmh9mL4PfxgaB6QoxMUlvfN6SLezB27DgfC78IEnegf7ZP6IQz-OSPb6G1NY2I7dJxcfn1jXfN-uAemvywtjzajoAtDE3PFgEwuvoqOk5l_YJhdqwHwo-IxXGja3BxtqmJi5nn1-WHur2Nbk9JdA1o0l_QoyjsnfGXZmHa7MaQIUwDozyjmofb8m4LKi4F7V8gBq4G-2_ymrKbDskQ9BdYq6UZy8%3D)

clean_body: I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | Fellow patriot, Not too long ago, Latinos were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Latino,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, a proud Latina Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Hey folks -- it’s Andrea, Tim’s wife. You might not know this, but Tim and I are pretty competitive people. So when he was telling me about his big mid-month fundraising deadline, I had an idea: let’s bet on who can raise the most money -- loser does dishes for a week. (But really, I just want the bragging rights!) Folks, you’ve got to help me beat Tim! [ ]Can I count on you to chip in today so I can claim victory and Tim’s campaign can meet its $25,000 mid-month fundraising goal? [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount Let’s win this! clean_body: We wanted to make sure you saw Mark’s message earlier... He wants to hear from you. We know you care about what goes on in Santa Fe... That’s why...... Peter, We wanted to make sure you saw Mark’s message earlier... He wants to hear from you. We know you care about what goes on in Santa Fe... That’s why Mark is coming to YOU for your input. He wants to know what issues are most important to you and wants you to help prioritize what our campaign focuses should be in the coming month. We want to collect as many responses for his review by 11:59 PM TONIGHT - this is your last chance! For too long, New Mexicans have put up with leadership that does not share our values and silences our voices. Mark is going to change that. We’ll be sharing the responses collected here with him... Participate quickly to make sure he sees yours. Thank you, Team Ronchetti Peter, I was hoping I could grab your attention for just a few moments, I need to hear from you. I know you’re tired of Governor Lujan Grisham’s “leadership...” It’s such a shame to see a state as beautiful as ours so consistently let down by someone who does not represent our values, respect our wishes, and silences our voices. As the next governor of New Mexico, I’ll put the YOU and your family FIRST. But, in order to do that, I need to hear directly from you. My team and I are planning out what to focus on this month, and we want to get YOUR input. Your answers to our November Agenda Survey will help shape our campaign’s goals and priorities. Governor Lujan Grisham has sided with left wing, defund-the-police activists. She’s squeezed her heavy hand around our children’s education and she’s failed to secure our border and stop crime. She’s failed in every effort to help small businesses recover from COVID-19 and despite being one of the most restrictive states in the country, our numbers only continue to rise. She has always let New Mexicans down. It’s beyond time we changed that - and the first step is making sure YOUR VOICE is heard. I’ll be reviewing responses with my team SOON - will I see yours? Thank you, Mark Ronchetti | | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click to unsubscribe.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m recruiting you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=993ed99dafab41d3b1ae039db35d8571&_e=vEVtQJ5xce2ICDQjh7NgiFqkWHFAPJ6ACzq0n8Imjm2wzrRbtK_iZ5iI7zCYVeRMMEJ6w7P_UVuKXfeyjPJ6P3KjoI3-L8ibx9Fmy4nJNvAzH82Bpl-x5I6gQwrcbIFM6qFnuQCXhGNgBSWd8ygitDhDufEsHflurQhY-TyRE6JkGXZvzohGE8316Zl7H7M4ikvoajW-2gXcGg3dDCKZM6V9D0rz_KeItLv4ew4toDgCrLSos6_kXp2ExE0LKm9pnwjFjF003DBRYuMOc_I5s_-JVq8YlKxt_hExf8FQR8BJY_K2w6MfKKIyCh_n89-GMOtHf6r-bIjA0s4nG37adxOwZiFuyLkqVcsUzYCc5DbnwMOl1SlRcyBgN2qaXwMZsa5lVRvBUgF4axE7cWNPsGHzusF0PKAOz7kV7tgcVFP2RP2eRB5YQPU-7EuiEAb7uNDrwz7K6O-mRGKlBD38Ew%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=993ed99dafab41d3b1ae039db35d8571&_e=vEVtQJ5xce2ICDQjh7NgiFqkWHFAPJ6ACzq0n8Imjm2wzrRbtK_iZ5iI7zCYVeRMMEJ6w7P_UVuKXfeyjPJ6P3KjoI3-L8ibx9Fmy4nJNvAzH82Bpl-x5I6gQwrcbIFM6qFnuQCXhGNgBSWd8ygitDhDufEsHflurQhY-TyRE6JkGXZvzohGE8316Zl7H7M4ikvoajW-2gXcGg3dDCKZM6V9D0rz_KeItLv4ew4toDgCrLSos6_kXp2ExE0LKm9prvIxFPtsN23Cplp3vuSz50v9On1zue5Hw9Pb5JakPQKOP5qb6SwXVkJHLSyNuSpDmSXG4gvDgByUPl2KHoh8jtdXj-6mbWjuygMmab5mNeMnL4Uh-Py020mMnYfZB5F5Bcct4Dxo0IoRtYErZzZ8fRy_2nlmmVuofshH6ZG3_ucW4uWYo2FGbjeHuYe0Q5GYOKK9onz_2kR9taaQh9qUUw%3D%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=993ed99dafab41d3b1ae039db35d8571&_e=vEVtQJ5xce2ICDQjh7NgiFqkWHFAPJ6ACzq0n8Imjm2wzrRbtK_iZ5iI7zCYVeRMMEJ6w7P_UVuKXfeyjPJ6P3KjoI3-L8ibx9Fmy4nJNvAzH82Bpl-x5I6gQwrcbIFM6qFnuQCXhGNgBSWd8ygitDhDufEsHflurQhY-TyRE6JkGXZvzohGE8316Zl7H7M4ikvoajW-2gXcGg3dDCKZM6V9D0rz_KeItLv4ew4toDgCrLSos6_kXp2ExE0LKm9p6DdWzRlNpkUm3kQKiW9rlm6lqRHNN1UxQiTCKF_RfFLNEqUnU4IfnQzgVanAGFIhfNQyODf-yc7ztBTBbEYZTun5E9QAyBkXc7KPbKuLBLJPOthOaDhFOrJ0zH8zigsSmQ8bedp4ogyph7lcLifM6Cy8e7mnDnoaTqjaZnQK17AxHGydahn8oF1om9ADEl3l6m5QLda1IgPCx7ZRRgmanQ%3D%3D)
I am running against Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud Democrat who has voted for every idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=993ed99dafab41d3b1ae039db35d8571&_e=vEVtQJ5xce2ICDQjh7NgiFqkWHFAPJ6ACzq0n8Imjm2wzrRbtK_iZ5iI7zCYVeRMMEJ6w7P_UVuKXfeyjPJ6P3KjoI3-L8ibx9Fmy4nJNvAzH82Bpl-x5I6gQwrcbIFM6qFnuQCXhGNgBSWd8ygitDhDufEsHflurQhY-TyRE6JkGXZvzohGE8316Zl7H7M4ikvoajW-2gXcGg3dDCKZM6V9D0rz_KeItLv4ew4toDgCrLSos6_kXp2ExE0LKm9p5wbaNtg5Qt5NA-Lmbgr_JvHFKYYt2pwDPiLuHon6Z4uPnz52mHQQfp-QPkFsQJvS9ArLUk-Qg6MsPXO2fG_wQKpK-pGAthpIbnePL-lN8R0uXDSQArg1XCYV414j80O6KBXU6_p01uCNE7V8Y4XDFPbegazfSqjVwG0FL3o-DYX8MTJQ3hQSxIFvEnfaInwTAB3JKFQ0mEVo6bpnZuhtEw%3D%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Fellow Conservative, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=993ed99dafab41d3b1ae039db35d8571&_e=vEVtQJ5xce2ICDQjh7NgiFqkWHFAPJ6ACzq0n8Imjm2wzrRbtK_iZ5iI7zCYVeRMMEJ6w7P_UVuKXfeyjPJ6P3KjoI3-L8ibx9Fmy4nJNvAzH82Bpl-x5I6gQwrcbIFM6qFnuQCXhGNgBSWd8ygitDhDufEsHflurQhY-TyRE6JkGXZvzohGE8316Zl7H7M4ikvoajW-2gXcGg3dDCKZM6V9D0rz_KeItLv4ew4toDgCrLSos6_kXp2ExE0LKm9pVzDMxW7wsoqsWGma0QZWcOLsGTA-UgmiGYqDPjhOwwWT-s6JTP_5ukmTTrdAUGx_p-V-Bs9kBdnJIKKu9rvN6oN3__r28JVrszbVvKFNEaeg7KMyc8B61fBAb8cOajhxjFyr5w2qT9wSe-fJeMt_SzLmx6GuJ_u-SzYpD-JvMryRkPpG2GOomVL60AAXEU1wGBogF9KPGPpJPYVUJEAtQQ%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. #
Peter, in case you haven’t been following along, things have been pretty busy in Washington!
Last week, the House sent a historic $1.2 trillion infrastructure package to President Biden's desk for his signature AND also took a critical step towards finally passing the Build Back Better Act.
Because Pramila didn’t let up in her fight for all of us, that vote will happen next week — giving us just days to make a strong case for childcare, paid leave, pre-K, Medicare expansion, climate action, affordable housing, and so much more. At the same time, corporate special interests continue to ramp up their attacks against these necessary AND popular priorities.
The midpoint of the big FEC fundraising quarter _also_ happens to be approaching next week, which is why we’re setting a new goal: **2,000 contributions by midnight on Monday to power Pramila’s fearless advocacy for the Build Back Better Act and other progressive priorities forward.**

name: Adam Laxalt
subject: ALERT: Nevada Senate race officially a "toss-up"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Republicans are ready to FLIP the Senate!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753374:JTxGM_2Nl:m:1:3253819041:6541D52830F3D0F89EE8AC2FE9261E16:r)
Peter,

In the wake of historic victories in formerly deep-blue Virginia, Nevada Republicans are ready to flip the Senate as momentum shifts toward our movement.

The University of Virginia's Center for Politics - one of the most well-known political analysis organizations in the nation - has moved Nevada's Senate race from "Leans Democrat" to "Toss-up." Because I represent the biggest threat to their majority, Democrats are already focusing their false attacks on me.

This is a major sign of momentum and a clear recognition by the national media that Catherine Cortez Masto is on the ropes. [**Whatever you can give -- even just $1 -- we need your help to keep this huge momentum going.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753374:JTxGM_2Nl:m:1:3253819041:6541D52830F3D0F89EE8AC2FE9261E16:r) [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753374:JTxGM_2Nl:m:1:3253819041:6541D52830F3D0F89EE8AC2FE9261E16:r)
---

Virginia showed what we've known for a long time - especially here in Nevada - that parents are stepping up to fight for their children's education. They won't stand for critical race theory indoctrinations or efforts by radical liberals to get between them and their kids.

The results last week are no surprise to those of us but if we want change, we must continue the fight and make sure our voices are heard loud and clear next November, just as Virginians made their voices heard last week.

I am thankful for your continued support as we fight to protect Nevada. With your help - along with leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis who have endorsed my candidacy - we will be victorious.

Best,
Adam Laxalt

\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753375:JTxGM_2Nl:m:1:3253819041:6541D52830F3D0F89EE8AC2FE9261E16:r) A note for Peter, from Adam Laxalt:

Peter, thank you for your support as I take on the Democrat establishment to FLIP Nevada and the U.S. Senate. Our movement is off to a great start, but the battle has just begun.

Even CNN has rated my race one of the MOST LIKELY blue to red flips for 2022. It's clear, the road to the Senate majority runs through Nevada, but I need your immediate help to fight back against the Democrats' fundraising machine.

[**Help restore a Republican majority**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753375:JTxGM_2Nl:m:1:3253819041:6541D52830F3D0F89EE8AC2FE9261E16:r)
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt

name: Mississippi Freedom Caucus
subject: Large Turn-Out for Freedom
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODE3NTgxMjEzNTQwNDIzODMwJmM9YTl1MyZlPTAmYj03OTE1MzE2MTgmZD1tOGg1djF4.3LYmm957UeunAIMAEtRcVDF2dpu0jhABe80TSuZrEXU)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| November 12, 2021
---
Over 300 turn-out to defend our rights and liberties
Last night the Mississippi Freedom Caucus and American’s for Prosperity-Mississippi hosted a dinner, inviting patriots from around the state to honor veterans and discuss how to preserve the freedoms and liberties our veterans fought to uphold. The Gin in Nesbit was standing room only with over 300 patriots from around the state of Mississippi in attendance. The evening was kicked-off by John Williams where he challenged everyone to get involved and hold their government officials accountable. Then each member of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus discussed different aspects of state government and how everyone there could be a part of the solution for Mississippi. Rep. Brady Williamson, a veteran and Major in the Mississippi National Guard lead the crowd as we honored those who have served our country to keep our nation free. Chairman Steve Hopkins announced that board members of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus will be traveling to Atlanta in December to finalize plans for a joint venture with the U.S. House Freedom Caucus. As the Mississippi Freedom Caucus grows in numbers and influence this alliance will bring additional resources to our state as we fight for our constitutional rights and liberties. The evening concluded with members of the Freedom Caucus answering questions as each member promised to be “brutally honest” in their replies. Members of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus are always available to attend events anywhere in our state. We love talking about our liberties and freedoms and we especially love meeting fellow patriots who are ready to defend our rights. The Mississippi Freedom Caucus can be found on Facebook @MSFREEDOMCAUCUS and online at www.FreedomCaucus.ms For Mississippi,

name: David Chipman, Giffords.org
subject: Watch a clip from my segment on Jon Stewart’s show "The Problem” last evening
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends,
I joined Giffords as a Senior Policy Advisor to be part of the fight to save lives and ensure gun ownership is safe and responsible.
I worked at the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF) for 25 years, and served on the Firearms Committee for the International Association of Chiefs of Police for two terms. I wrote most of their materials on gun violence prevention.
That’s why I’m speaking out against our country’s epidemic of gun violence. Last night, I was featured on Jon Stewart’s show "The Problem,'' discussing the role of guns in domestic violence incidents.
[**Watch a clip of my segment here, and make a donation to Giffords to help us stop the cycle of preventable gun violence.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-chipman-stewart?refcode=em211112-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1204_3935704_aij-Wu&akid=1204%2E3935704%2Eaij-Wu)
**[WATCH NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-chipman-stewart?refcode=em211112-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1204_3935704_aij-Wu&akid=1204%2E3935704%2Eaij-Wu)**
Unrestricted firearm access helps fuel domestic violence. Firearms are used to commit more than half of all intimate partner homicides in the United States.
Congress has a responsibility to act to keep us safe from irresponsible gun owners and sellers. Period. They need to enact policies that prevent abusers from having access to firearms.
But so many members of Congress are in the pocket of the gun lobby, who continue to profit at the expense of public safety. The NRA and NSSF cannot continue to line their pockets with impunity as violence spikes nationwide.
[**Take a minute to watch me on Jon Stewart’s “The Problem,” and help Giffords hold the gun lobby accountable.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-chipman-stewart?refcode=em211112-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=1204_3935704_aij-Wu&akid=1204%2E3935704%2Eaij-Wu)
I am a gun owner. And like the majority of responsible gun owners, I support passing laws like universal background checks that promote responsible and safe gun ownership. To me, it’s common sense. And I refuse to let the gun lobby stand in our way of passing critical legislation.
With your help, we are going to make sure the NRA, the NSSF, and the rest of the gun lobby are held accountable and don’t get in our way of saving lives.
Sincerely,
David Chipman
Senior Policy Advisor, Giffords
**[WATCH NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-chipman-stewart?refcode=em211112-1-subs&t=4&refcode2=1204_3935704_aij-Wu&akid=1204%2E3935704%2Eaij-Wu)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1204%2E3935704%2Eaij-Wu) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
| | Friend,
Over 20,000 babies were aborted in Ohio last year. I want to bring that number to **ZERO**. But don’t just believe my words, look at my actions.
While in Congress, I co-sponsored legislation that would have prohibited abortion at 20 weeks, defunded Planned Parenthood, and defined life as beginning at conception.
According to the Ohio Right to Life, I have a **100% pro-life voting record.** I will proudly carry this legacy into the Governor’s office.

Team -

Since yesterday was Veterans Day, I want to talk about our brave men and women who served this country. On Veterans day we should honor all those who served but live every day like it is Veterans Day because those who served this great nation and protected our freedoms did so for me, for you, your family, and your children.

I am pledging 100% of my Congressional salary to Veterans causes here in the Lehigh Valley because their sacrifice means so much to me. Whether they are struggling from physical disabilities or mental like PTSD, no veteran should ever be left behind.

I made a short video to share with you about what Veterans Day means to me, please watch and share with your friends and family.

To our Veterans, thank you from the bottom of my heart for your service, and God Bless America.

-Lisa

**Democrat ****Inflation**

Just this week, the new inflation figures were released and let me just say they are more than alarming. This week, the Labor Department released statistics that showed inflation growing 6.2% over the past 12 that was driven largely by a 4.8 percent increase in energy costs and a 0.9 percent increase in food prices. This is the highest rate in **_30 years._**

A rise in energy costs you say? I wonder what could be "fueling" that? Could it be the Democrats' push to shut down affordable American energy projects in favor of relying on hostile foreign nations to provide the American people with energy?

We were told that inflation would be "transitory" but it appears to be more persistent than Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Susan Wild have let on. Make no mistake about it, inflation is a tax on every American and it is only growing. The worst part is, the only answer that Washington can come up with is to spend more. When will it stop?

Listen, it has been a long few months and we are all feeling the pinch at the gas pump, the grocery store, heating your home, and just about every other purchase you may make. Democrat leadership in Washington is pushing spending bills that number in the trillions and claiming the only way to fix the current situation is to make government bigger. I'm here to push back against the Liberal Wish-list spending that will turn our American Dream into a Socialist Nightmare.

Honor all those who served today but live ever Scheller for Congress Newsletter | | | ---|--- Team - Since yesterday was Veterans Day, I want to talk about our brave men and women who served this country. On Veterans day we should honor all those who served but live every day like it is Veterans Day because those who served this great nation and protected our freedoms did so for me, for you, your family, and your children. I am pledging 100% of my Congressional salary to Veterans causes here in the Lehigh Valley because their sacrifice means so much to me. Whether they are struggling from physical disabilities or mental like PTSD, no veteran should ever be left behind. I made a short video to share with you about what Veterans Day means to me, please watch and share with your friends and family. clean_body: Americans deserve better | | | | | | | | | Friend, Joe Biden’s go-at-it-alone approach is tone-deaf to the heartbeat of the American people. With the holidays approaching fast, we are facing a supply chain crisis and rising costs on everything from gas to groceries. This is absolutely unacceptable. Joe Biden is not serving the people like he was elected to do. Instead, he is serving his party by pushing policies that only aim to serve their Radical Left wish list. The fact that Biden isn’t listening to the people he was elected to serve is absolutely unacceptable. The American people deserve much better than Biden in the Oval Office. We need leaders who listen to people’s calls and do absolutely everything in their power to meet their needs. Instead, we have a leader that only listens to his party’s calls as he has done his entire career. name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 11/12/21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=1)
---
Friend, Veterans are often asked, "why did you join the military?" While there are many reasons, there is one reason why we serve—because we believe our friends, family, neighbors, fellow Americans, and country are worth fighting for. **Ultimately, that is why veterans serve.** Our veterans, and also the active servicemen and women, were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice in the line of duty to ensure our homeland and the people they left at home were safe and free. _"The willingness with which our young people are likely to serve in any war, no matter how justified, shall be directly proportional to how they perceive the Veterans of earlier wars were treated and appreciated by their nation." — President George Washington_ As someone who has taken the oath to preserve and protect our country, said goodbye to my family not knowing if I'd see them again, and was willing to put my life on the line for our country's red, white, and blue, **I stand and salute our veterans** as we honor our veterans this week and month. To my fellow Illinoisans, if we want to truly honor our veterans, we need to understand they are willing to give their life to preserve all the United States of America stands for, especially freedom. **To the veterans across Illinois and throughout our country, thank you for your service.** S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** We have lots of great volunteers, but during the week of Veterans Day, I want to highlight another fellow Jarhead. Thank you to our Elgin Township Director, Eric Stare! Eric has staffed me at multiple events and is responsible for our strong support in this portion of Kane County. Thank you, Eric, for your hard work, friendship, and service to our country! [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA7k94egQ5aUP_wqMEHIljqV1C7_gpqD9y6-757NIMrIw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=2) [If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=3)
* * *
**In the News** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=954wJVfXJnGDSMt_j90vIl2I9Mts3vNP7Yqes3Kf2OPgsaMpbyqSYqj0jHp5qK9K1qqnVHEbidBj2mOgyX2Ygw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=4) **This week I joined WHCO's Real County 97.3 & 1230 to talk about a wide range of issues in Illinois, including veto session and how we have a leadership deficit under JB Pritzker. **[Listen to my interview on WHCO here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=954wJVfXJnGDSMt_j90vIl2I9Mts3vNP7Yqes3Kf2OPgsaMpbyqSYqj0jHp5qK9K1qqnVHEbidBj2mOgyX2Ygw&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=5)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA-j__2T6rYpGM7UOgxRhhquAvJqQnOd1QzIRLYT3iPbU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=6) During the week of Veterans Day, it is also the Marine Corps birthday (November 10). As a Marine Corps veteran, it was an honor to spend time with fellow Marines in Litchfield. We shared stories of our time in the Marines and I explained my commitment to veterans issues if given the honor to serve as your Governor. [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA-j__2T6rYpGM7UOgxRhhquAvJqQnOd1QzIRLYT3iPbU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=7)
* * *
**Army-Navy Game Watch Party** **Join me and fellow veterans on December 11th at Bandito Barney's in East Dundee for a Watch Party for the Army vs. Navy game!** [RSVP to attend our watch party here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=8) [](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=9)
* * *
**Get Involved** Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? **[Pitch in $5, $25, $50, or $100 NOW](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=10)** so we can share our [Facebook post](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA-j__2T6rYpGM7UOgxRhhquAvJqQnOd1QzIRLYT3iPbU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_11_12&n=11) highlighting the service of our Illinois veterans. clean_body: | Friend, Veterans are often asked, "why did you join the military?" While there are many reasons, there is one reason why we serve—because we believe our friends, family, neighbors, fellow Americans, and country are worth fighting for. Ultimately, that is why veterans serve. Our veterans, and also the active servicemen and women, were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice in the line of duty to ensure our homeland and the people they left at home were safe and free. "The willingness with which our young people are likely to serve in any war, no matter how justified, shall be directly proportional to how they perceive the Veterans of earlier wars were treated and appreciated by their nation." — President George Washington As someone who has taken the oath to preserve and protect our country, said goodbye to my family not knowing if I'd see them again, and was willing to put my life on the line for our country's red, white, and blue, I stand and salute our veterans as we honor our veterans this week and month. To my fellow Illinoisans, if we want to truly honor our veterans, we need to understand they are willing to give their life to preserve all the United States of America stands for, especially freedom. To the veterans across Illinois and throughout our country, thank you for your service. S/F, Paul Schimpf Volunteer of the Week We have lots of great volunteers, but during the week of Veterans Day, I want to highlight another fellow Jarhead. Thank you to our Elgin Township Director, Eric Stare! Eric has staffed me at multiple events and is responsible for our strong support in this portion of Kane County. body:

He’s in talks to **PAY****illegal immigrants** so-called reparations **for****BREAKING****American laws,** and thus being separated from their families. That’s right, friend. Joe Biden is PAYING illegal immigrants up to half a million dollars PER family member as some reward for unlawfully entering our country. On top of that, permanent U.S. status will likely also be granted alongside the payout. **_This is insane. _** We must take a stand, friend. name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4ce11ddf0ce044778f66c0a233618296&_e=4_ERFHfo5GWydDl6jQDctU-CH7bata_Y0sz7ehwgBiduGonLYh85Tj-kCno7jQ4NoH0UhV4xcN7a3yRnyOaHuX3DHLpGbCwu0004GCOlzRa4I5CPoQIMkmvyip3Re1IN8ahA1WCkm17j2ipKpnt4AQdmfbm_lxbUW_wdMaH4NDlnLGvbqh50_STPaFv9BHxBz0qwwYc4hPNuHoLgI-daSbaczfjADzt7BTlQ9Fa8_JoHd35Uj8m-twu2byyXFclIaUIrI6WUXf28rBU_e9NolHy10krReNpx4wrRRfSiB98%3D)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now with trial underway, it has been falling apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. clean_body: I hope you’ll help me kick off my campaign! | Friend, I have some important and exciting news - please read the following carefully: I AM RUNNING TO REPRESENT YOU IN CONGRESS IN IOWA’S 1ST DISTRICT! This is going to be an uphill battle. As I’m sure you know, Nancy Pelosi has made me the number ONE target for Democrats in 2022. She knows that my constituents are STRONG and LOYAL. She also knows that I will never stop fighting against Socialism or fightingFOR FREEDOM! Pelosi tried to steal my election in 2020, and I only won by 6 votes \- so this is not going to be easy, but I know we can do it again. We are going to have to fight harder than ever against the Radical Left’s agenda. It’s time for Republicans to Take Back the House. It’s time for lower taxes, a secure Southern Border, and freedom for ALL Americans. Will you rush ANYTHING you can to help me kick off my campaign for 2022 strong? | Taking Back the House starts with your help. God Bless you and God Bless America, Congresswoman Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. Box 33 Ottumwa, IA 52501 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

clean_body: Dear Peter, I wanted to be sure you saw my thoughts on the Kyle Rittenhouse trial. We on the right need to be very clear: the only reason Kyle Rittenhouse is on trial is because of a public pressure campaign from the left-wing mob. And because this fits their political narrative that is anti-white, anti-male, anti-gun, and anti-conservative, an innocent kid is being prosecuted. Donald Trump was exactly right when he said the corporate media really is the enemy of the people. We must continue to fight against the woke mob together, Peter. Best, Patrick | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2021 Patrick Witt for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Ohioans deserve safety and security in our cities and to be safe and secure in what our children are being taught. This week, Jane proved why she is the grassroots, America First candidate who will fight to ensure law enforcement has the tools they need to keep Ohioans safe, and parents have a voice in their children’s education. With events across Ohio, Jane is showing exactly the hard work and determination she will bring to Washington. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Win The Streets** Jane was thrilled to be joined by former NYPD Commissioner Bernard Kerik for a few stops around Ohio to discuss the importance of supporting law enforcement and to fire up our great volunteers during our Super Saturday. Last Friday, [L.E.P.D. Firearms, Range, and Training Facility](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=74536a19a63e4333a5c2aca74cbe0d7a&_e=eKX4TB6JjCSRmCI9L3HajC0bs0e2a0W2mWTtxXcZgidYYMnD01MuVup0nkCX4fPsts8jU7nSjCubAJF7NHhjWGnKZwnRwX1vN5RwOSuSwP90jYBWxMoAsOQklkEf2kcSnOEcGolOUJGIzgbWr7nHQAoz-fPnxzKUbROuVfKPWdFuxoC6uPmYy4sO6hAp6c2Ix-ibkyozU7Y5dKs_KcX84NIj_nDnZ-kK1MZi8tQsCBBMCrqYJkYPyJ6RVbrWa1tP) hosted Jane, Commissioner Kerik, and law enforcement from central Ohio for a great event to highlight the importance of the men and women in blue and the need to keep up the fight against Democrats’ desire to defund the police. They also found some time to head to the firing range. On Saturday, Jane and Commissioner Kerik were in Dayton to fire up our volunteers ahead of our Super Saturday and talk about the need for a U.S. Senate candidate that believes in law and order, protecting the Second Amendment, and holding criminals accountable. Later that day, Jane and Commissioner Kerik joined Rep. Jon Cross, Rep. Haraz Ghanbari, Rep. Jim Hoops, and three County Sheriffs in Kenton to talk about how we can strengthen our police and stand up for law enforcement. **Media Roundup** While Jane and former NYPD Commissioner Kerik were crisscrossing the state, we had time to share Jane’s vision for Ohio with media outlets. _According to the Hardin County Republican Party, Ohio Northern University College Republicans were denied the ability to sell "Back the Blue" shirts on campus._ _ _ _"This is about free speech, and the importance for people to stand up for the men and women in blue," said Jane Timken, a U.S Senate candidate. "I applaud those students for backing the police, and its unfortunate that we live in a divisive country that standing up for the police is something that is negative."_ _ _ Read the full article [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=74536a19a63e4333a5c2aca74cbe0d7a&_e=eKX4TB6JjCSRmCI9L3HajCOr9qIpCKE5HU3trUzhtYQ3sV837ZbHGG15VtJqf2cZ-Up6tIE-HRyqPU2405__4H6mPz9lNRjoc4hJIIcNnYqbNpURordXQMgzaSfI4ek_HPKFG6QcxPXjCVSgKIs-lYdgNre7ID83S0RoKmX9RteF9_gg1zLu3aE7aCfuBSYQw6oOBvxG01PTDpFdv-TFNQ9xdIm6TBChvKRULmYsTxkfFocQGw6nZKFRLyQeq9fbIVey7aBKVhoRTxlpWcHd7oJm6aqaILE_DUL1Em6_cAEtwma67GiDaEui7Y9hGoqi_9lxfCcPf4mWjfE9BlfBe5KQOZxUYKooQettbI9ov2nLwRpGLjxVflEOVu9doKt4wxk3zr9pRzsl0439QpNkaSVtR_65ckFZQMK2ttsOn64idbi_rGxl9AfAj1dLsNGzCcoStMMEIL7LqQmaYV29kwAg06j-0u4wsSIwVZGvxuo%3D) and watch Jane's interview with WLIO [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=74536a19a63e4333a5c2aca74cbe0d7a&_e=eKX4TB6JjCSRmCI9L3HajCOr9qIpCKE5HU3trUzhtYQ3sV837ZbHGG15VtJqf2cZ-Up6tIE-HRyqPU2405__4H6mPz9lNRjoc4hJIIcNnYqbNpURordXQMgzaSfI4ek_HPKFG6QcxPXjCVSgKIs-lYdgNre7ID83S0RoKmX9RteF9_gg1zLu3aE7aCfuBSYQw6oOBvxG01PTDpFdv-TFNQ9xdIm6TBChvKRULmYsTxkfFocQGw6nZKFRLyQeq9fbIVey7aBKVhoRTxlpWcHd7t0-SyQ-YTqgM8Fry0KP4VwVjwOzfJTre3Jbi92b7Hokf002zpbP_pHP_Ath4YsjJgnj0Bquxx0IyQFyc5LMvPmLMWMC_baY-GES9NZJLblFSyS_aqXqzNM_3YQkKa7NM0gsdofu_yAfGspdBz71rVjG-9mhrbHX0-_9QMshvdS_qQMfe729XMn-t91tnAb4LzMdAfrKF30s2AvcrLhZCfk%3D). On Tuesday night, Jane joined Sean Spicer and Lyndsay Keith on Newsmax to discuss her Parents First Tour and Joe Biden’s assault on American energy by potentially shutting down Line 5. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=74536a19a63e4333a5c2aca74cbe0d7a&_e=eKX4TB6JjCSRmCI9L3HajA72LcWbZFHQCShnMaP7ZvaQrJBCxyRzvSEo6PQC9tLId4ZQyxSaRleFgJ7GCRVrYZWhwHrT8mSlELRX3m7vHQfJ4GeTWbOIXfyi7ZSId3DTAhC5rYsjHhI0Qi_3Vyq5MNoiuussxS5mvm5VLDTqdwE0F3MDKgc5Gph6k9KGh6G6KRm__B95_-gnjcwDJ1bfsN_O527KUj2iukZvErkB83DXFwv0GjghDar7_byFnTLA8C5N-qgInwhKq6Ccq-toaw%3D%3D)
On Wednesday, Jane joined Hugh Hewitt to talk about the issues important to Ohioans. We need someone who can roll up their sleeves and get things done, and that’s exactly what Jane will do in Washington.
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=74536a19a63e4333a5c2aca74cbe0d7a&_e=eKX4TB6JjCSRmCI9L3HajJOBh4jBRdn4q5KsLGaZE2UDtc-NLnZ6FHqdjzXZfLqzd0MWRtJrmDG3dy8n10GQa-m-5tEHfC41riTwdZuQmErWbetCRAjgk2eeJKQrpCq99IHP1FaF6ueJy0FVdX1X8a818e5kDG4ugc6DE-yvtoyIXhCLEJzQynTAd0K50LEIBKmeBV4dVhQKhCPxlwjoog5j-s0bnEUhR_6qTFgGJWBIbceYPfQQdCBwnDLlVCDHZb1C-fRspgoew4BtsmS6jQ%3D%3D)
**Parents First!**
Jane kicked off the first stop in her Parents First Tour this Wednesday in Lake County. Joined by newly elected School Board Members Jeff Thompson and Annie Payne, Jane took her message of empowering moms and dads to make the best decisions for their children.
Parents across Ohio are fired up and ready for a U.S. Senator who will put them and their children first, not the government.

I hope everyone has a great weekend.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Whitmer Targets 2nd Amendment Supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • PO Box 23 • Stevensville, MI 49127
body:
Whitmer's "safety" rhetoric is just a smokescreen for her real goal – to disarm Americans. That’s something we cannot tolerate. | | | |
---
| | | Peter:

This past weekend I took a brief break from the campaign trail to clear my head while enjoying the great outdoors with some friends on our annual hunting trip.
---
|
---
| Sitting in my blind got me thinking about _Governor Whitmer’s action last year that put over 6,000 Michigan residents in the firearms and ammunition industry out of work_. **She called them “non-essential” during the coronavirus pandemic and shut down their businesses.**

It was another of her shots (pun intended) at law-abiding gun owners.

She’s shown she’ll do whatever it takes to hurt us and deny us our rights.

Like so many of her decrees during 2020, **she used her powers to unconstitutionally violate the rights of our residents and put people out of work.** And she doubled-down on specifically targeting the firearms and ammunition business saying, “I would do it again. I absolutely stand by the decision that I made.”

Her attacks should come as no surprise though.

_Whitmer supports reinstating the failed 1994 “assault weapon” ban. _

Even the Justice Department in a 2004 report found that the ban’s effects on gun violence were “small at best and perhaps too small for reliable measurement.”

Criminals will get guns. Her naive, pie-in-the-sky belief that criminals will somehow obey her bans and restrictions is just ludicrous.

**In my 33-year career in law enforcement, I’ve actively worked to reduce violence in our cities. I can tell you there’s not a criminal I’ve arrested that hasn’t been violating numerous laws.** There is just no rational explanation for the Governor’s naiveté.

One of the rifles the 1994 law banned was the Colt AR-15. AR-15 style rifles are the most popular rifle in the country and they’re used by hundreds of thousands of hunters.

Yet Whitmer would like to ban these and other “scary” firearms.

Whitmer also supports other extreme measures like “red flag” laws that would deny due process to the accused. She talks the typical liberal line of “closing loopholes” which is code for restricting constitutional rights.

_Her safety rhetoric is just a smokescreen for her real goal – to disarm Americans_. That’s something we cannot tolerate.

**Let me be very clear: _I support our second amendment rights and will oppose any and every attempt to usurp those rights_.**

I’ve dealt with violent criminals my entire career. I’ve lost friends in the line of duty, and I understand the danger fellow officers face every day when they put on their uniform.

But banning “scary” guns is not the answer. It will only leave our citizens more vulnerable to the criminals who ignore the laws.

The media doesn’t talk about firearms that have been used defensively. That doesn’t fit the liberal narrative.

The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention has reported that nearly every major study on the issue has found that _defensive gun use by Americans happens between 500,000 and 3 million times per year_. Think about that. Americans defend themselves with firearms up to 3 million times in a year.

What happens when these firearms are banned and only criminals have guns?

That’s what Governor Whitmer and her radical allies want.

Is that what you want? To be defenseless in your home?

**It’s time to take a stand. It’s time to dump Whitmer.**

Join me. Make a contribution.
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=d8f28c1d25&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| Volunteer. Spread the word.

Dump Whitmer.

Sincerely, Michael Brown
_Republican for Governor_ PS I recently wrote an article that was published in _Woods and Water News_. It’ll give you more insight into my background and thoughts on hunting, conservation and firearms. **[Read it here](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=093268e570&e=0636b97700) or click the image below**.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=171476e83c754a5b98525549650c9efa&_e=4oyja6IqBkj1G0_VV8zd8yW5Tuvv5nS1hWUUd4hr0dTHedSjZrMS1FP_ea4z_e4cDGETZYv69EBl3wxG3STCVB2SyOevGw97etbb7aMcH1J1PXjcFKvDBQAT9TRrv1EpdLO9lzWXNiKTAz-xvQpesV8aMxsCij_3BwITJeEqBFTdsiw6UVLxDEraXQ8MMdEPKlx_orXGkzfGy-UMWsc-CkjcA5FbXElwpdaStCEgG_Xah39eOlPEtLX2OdtrAYiY4rC3r5ERubw97QIC8ECk180dJvvVlCnZOvsq-UsFeLYnywl2TNQpoXJtYJbiWmy_FpVn-N0QVIjuhPebJlPTr07wQilvchAFV0lTqbXk99ewYvfTryIeuRDirF1mKUDA-7kU5NT3S8rI67aIs7IANCEDvHKnl_6XfFHW7VxWrLinr5tl-1MEpoH7tRjdjHi4TFpMqys9cAVQQ6raAKW02tUwGRtC0gn_7MnGrDW_Wwo%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=171476e83c754a5b98525549650c9efa&_e=4oyja6IqBkj1G0_VV8zd8yW5Tuvv5nS1hWUUd4hr0dTHedSjZrMS1FP_ea4z_e4cDGETZYv69EBl3wxG3STCVB2SyOevGw97etbb7aMcH1J1PXjcFKvDBQAT9TRrv1EpdLO9lzWXNiKTAz-xvQpesV8aMxsCij_3BwITJeEqBFTdsiw6UVLxDEraXQ8MMdEPKlx_orXGkzfGy-UMWsc-CkjcA5FbXElwpdaStCEgG_Xah39eOlPEtLX2OdtrAYiYNQ9IW5kh3vzt_Hb1kyzrkGhZIcP8eLSmxdePqvnMM5b652-RZfrNmktZl58oCzQpjRu3klfumTAWPhbRcF8vtzvqRtqmTZZ8BTqc3N2T1PWj0kwYyA04hYH-rRNm2KoR9zVP5J0ZFT8U_VKXbHAUUnCBoSHU0kYDWHnjR9kT6mKnqutXW_gHHfU12gjsDZWAMD2GHpHp7SRFvqTuHkTP_ThxLZwckjjOo-FjPNviRbc%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=171476e83c754a5b98525549650c9efa&_e=4oyja6IqBkj1G0_VV8zd8yW5Tuvv5nS1hWUUd4hr0dTHedSjZrMS1FP_ea4z_e4cDGETZYv69EBl3wxG3STCVB2SyOevGw97etbb7aMcH1J1PXjcFKvDBQAT9TRrv1EpdLO9lzWXNiKTAz-xvQpesV8aMxsCij_3BwITJeEqBFTdsiw6UVLxDEraXQ8MMdEPKlx_orXGkzfGy-UMWsc-CkjcA5FbXElwpdaStCEgG_Xah39eOlPEtLX2OdtrAYiY8utJZEu7_O74H8NwQErdtEebNdBLEZHzSN3DBuoiIZipAuaAvs1E3ktnH0afOqvMT48XIMBSU_eThB3ey1b7OuQ7rSpapu-h0jhwa1m2qXcj2Tku_A1dubDIWrzAHRdhyrlZYYZ9mvOsJd0C3AuzAFFIsE8qa85a913V8ZueJq_1GQDZuAxDR3-ba_WqdSgSBpDAa2QGMoNJVX-gPuNQI-2MGyu7PP5eEGyKQ5It1N8%3D)
I am running against Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud Democrat who has voted for every idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=171476e83c754a5b98525549650c9efa&_e=4oyja6IqBkj1G0_VV8zd8yW5Tuvv5nS1hWUUd4hr0dTHedSjZrMS1FP_ea4z_e4cDGETZYv69EBl3wxG3STCVB2SyOevGw97etbb7aMcH1J1PXjcFKvDBQAT9TRrv1EpdLO9lzWXNiKTAz-xvQpesV8aMxsCij_3BwITJeEqBFTdsiw6UVLxDEraXQ8MMdEPKlx_orXGkzfGy-UMWsc-CkjcA5FbXElwpdaStCEgG_Xah39eOlPEtLX2OdtrAYiYI4biIO5ObGTcS3aCPG_eRqtzYPXIci-yTlbW-uZPU5AGTaOcnkZn1Mh0HUUJ8KjQMxcPAyZoD_L2MzvT58HP-y-TiQwQ9IlG_RwaOLcmozMs8sFzRBn2rqCbjwvGsGnYysAXmVw1NF53XpH_nJsuoqu6kvBeTy_oM-z4i_-sSnCeR2rxDR30xgIfaJWGdf5ghNWoE6CWEZR11tePmLp2TvO1vBKPqxUzoH5Fa6_v2c8%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Fellow Conservative, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=171476e83c754a5b98525549650c9efa&_e=4oyja6IqBkj1G0_VV8zd8yW5Tuvv5nS1hWUUd4hr0dTHedSjZrMS1FP_ea4z_e4cDGETZYv69EBl3wxG3STCVB2SyOevGw97etbb7aMcH1J1PXjcFKvDBQAT9TRrv1EpdLO9lzWXNiKTAz-xvQpesV8aMxsCij_3BwITJeEqBFTdsiw6UVLxDEraXQ8MMdEPKlx_orXGkzfGy-UMWsc-CkjcA5FbXElwpdaStCEgG_Xah39eOlPEtLX2OdtrAYiY66ss55WF_SGSNFV1OtxaAXDD-32_nGJna0lIZeNd8nTzH4BDQTo3hl3fdg0be4hzFbunvVSfBLNd4wPl6NuRpRnNrO0CdI86FdkilOD6sueEI_xijMAJIvaZVtEVfFGwkmxRZ4AoSwaIITGTy1_0V9ty33d0D8Y9XFcvvTbKrmfq3J9IpOOPSqXTd6pNgP3LvwtyAFyTXh-SrJ6h6X7pCpmxWhDPgNq8oKOyAcn4usI%3D)

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’m still waiting for your response, Derek 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I want to read your responses.
#
Hi Derek,
Earlier this week, we sent out a survey asking you to participate in our Post-Election Day Focus Group. Hundreds have given their input so far, and my team and I have been blown away by the responses.
But, Derek, we noticed that you haven’t responded yet. 👀
As one of our campaign’s top supporters in 18326, it’s _suuuper_ important to me that we get your input on our overall campaign strategy. [**Derek, can you take a second to represent 18326 by participating in our Post-Election Day Focus Group now?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=1&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)
**[Enter the focus group →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=2&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)**
Here’s the thing, Derek: Election Day showed that we have a long road ahead of us if we’re going to flip this seat blue. And the stakes are really, really high — so we need to build the strongest campaign possible, one where we _all_ have a stake.
We’re coming directly to our top supporters for feedback — not relying on information from expensive polling firms. So I’m counting on all of yinz to share your feedback.
[**Derek, will you take just a few minutes (or less!) of your time to answer our Focus Group questions?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=3&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)
**[Enter the focus group →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=4&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)**
Thanks, Derek. I’m looking forward to reading your responses. **🙏**
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
\--------Forwarded email--------
Sender: JohnFetterman.com
Date: Tuesday, November 11, 2021
Subject: Hey Derek — You have been individually selected to join our official Post-Election Day Focus Group.
When looking for feedback from supporters, a lot of Senate campaigns typically go directly to professional polling firms. But not our campaign. **Instead, we’re coming directly to you, Derek.**
John wants to hear unique opinions from real people on our campaign strategy to win PA in 2022, which is why we picked you to represent Cresco in our official Post-Election Day Focus Group.
[**Will you take a minute to answer a few questions about our campaign strategy as part of our official Post-Election Day Focus Group?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=5&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm) Your input will be a _huuuuge_ help as we carefully calculate the next phase of our campaign.
_[John Fetterman is running a true 67 County campaign strategy across the Commonwealth to reach every voter in every county — no matter how red or blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=6&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)_
[Do you agree with John’s campaign strategy?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=7&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)
Select your answer: Yes No Unsure
**[Enter the focus group →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=8&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)**
Look, if we learned anything from Election Day last Tuesday, it’s just how hard the 2022 midterm elections could be for Democrats.
The more qualitative feedback we get from genuine Team Fetterman supporters in our Focus Group, the more insight we'll have from the ground about how we can best defeat the GOP and flip this seat.
**_That’s why it’s so important that we get your input_**** _, Derek!_**
So, will you please take a few minutes (or less!!) of your time to participate in our Post-Election Day Focus Group? **[You can click here or use your own custom link to begin!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=9&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)**
[https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=10&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)
**[Enter the focus group →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-post-e-day-focus-group/?source=em20211112-3439&t=11&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)**
Thank you for taking the time to answer our Post-Election Day Focus Group questions today, Derek. We’ll loop back soon with the results!
Thank you,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211112-3439-footer&t=12&refcode2=3439_434096_sTX-sm&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=13&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=3439%2E434096%2EsTX-sm)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek,****

****I would first like to take a moment to highlight our Veterans, having just celebrated Veterans Day this past week! Our service men and women risk their lives everyday to ensure we maintain the freedoms and liberties our country was founded on. These individuals make our way of living possible and we owe them our endless gratitude for the sacrifices made on our behalf. Several of our own Representatives have dedicated years of service to the military, now continuing to serve their country locally - it’s truly an honor to work alongside them. The New Hampshire Republican Party will always support our troops, and pursue policies that allot our Veterans with the respect and dignity they deserve. ****

****Some may have already heard the news that President Joe Biden is visiting the Granite State this coming Tuesday. In response, the NHGOP is organizing a demonstration to convey how deeply unwelcome he, and his disastrous policies, are in New Hampshire. From our crumbling southern border and spiking inflation, to overreaching federal mandates, it’s clear Joe Biden isn’t interested in pursuing policies that benefit anyone but his own far-left driven agenda. If you’d like to join us in calling out President Biden’s poor leadership, sign up to receive further details with the graphic below. **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **
