| **MESSAGE FROM THE REPUBLICAN LEADER **
**House Republicans and Friends Across New Hampshire,**
**As Joe Biden prepares for his visit to New Hampshire, I cannot help but reflect upon all of the ways in which he has failed and continues to fail the Granite State. From paying nearly twice as much for a gallon of gas, to the rising prices of goods across the board, and now his attempts to give our taxpayer money to illegal immigrants while the IRS stalks your bank account, I literally cannot fit all of his incompetence in one note without writing a book. With 2022 on the horizon, we must never forget the tide which our caucus is fighting against.******
**While Democrats continue their lockstep attempts to raise taxes and establish income taxes, force you to get vaccinated or lose your job and keep you from having a say in your child's education, our caucus is fighting every single day to protect your rights and liberties.The only way that we can truly stave off the Democrat destruction of the Live Free of Die state is to assure that when we go to the polls next November, we vote out every single one of them. A red wave is on the way, and I hope that it washes away every last bit of the Democrat agenda along with it.**
**All the best,

**** Jason Osborne, House Majority Leader****

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

If last week taught us anything, it’s this →

| **Peter, this is a much longer email than I usually send you, but I think it’s really important,** [**so I’m hoping you’ll stick with me to the end and consider chipping in $3:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38578520/316104355/908631020?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20211112_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNlODE1ZC0zYTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYOZYprFppI1vS-t9MDSnRnGh7j9egejKqa1c-ZSN_w=) | [$10,000 GOAL: CHIP IN $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38578521/316104356/908631020?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20211112_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNlODE1ZC0zYTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYOZYprFppI1vS-t9MDSnRnGh7j9egejKqa1c-ZSN_w=)
---
I was just featured in the _Los Angeles Times_ discussing our strategy for reaching out to Latino voters in 2022 and beyond:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38578522/316104357/908631020?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20211112_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNlODE1ZC0zYTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYOZYprFppI1vS-t9MDSnRnGh7j9egejKqa1c-ZSN_w=)
Here’s the point, Peter:
**We can’t treat Latino voters like a monolith, like a block that will always vote for Democrats because we do half-hearted outreach when we need them.**
It’s _more_ than running your message through Google Translate in the last three weeks of a campaign.

**It’s speaking to every individual about what matters to them and their family — because every single family is different.**

We need to spend early and _adequately_ on outreach to our community and make sure it is done in a culturally competent way.

**_That’s how I’ve won my last four terms as CA-29's Congressman, and it’s how we keep the House Majority in 2022._**

But I’ll be honest, Peter, this sort of genuine, people-first outreach costs a lot of money.

**That’s why I need to ask for your help _at this moment_. We’re just weeks from Election Year, which means our time to make early investments is running out. **

[**Can you rush an $3 donation to help us fund the type of campaign we need to win? We need $10,000 to create a strong foundation for the voter outreach programs we need »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38578523/316104358/908631020?amount=3&refcode=TCFC_20211112_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNlODE1ZC0zYTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYOZYprFppI1vS-t9MDSnRnGh7j9egejKqa1c-ZSN_w=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38578530/316104365/908631020?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=TCFC_20211112_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWNlODE1ZC0zYTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYOZYprFppI1vS-t9MDSnRnGh7j9egejKqa1c-ZSN_w=)

**Inflation Continues To Soar 📈**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=123b8db396184f228409027016553278&_e=nRLlcYw1MU_L7CsUM2TAhl-Ppdre9LPDYIvyBFgHso0bxm_leBZHINmSJoS5UejIlwgSishhJSZpkUf4lEi0SlrmsfheHmTVOwDV3XVkCmCy45KX3ozAiVFp13toLmvIimGCvrBsLxmVLZVBuQlg1AaMPhKMOgriXc-I4-BBe73sMcOPCDswzeLuhcP_dE-ohofYGwHsdCyw4W62eIp4dOaGN0wPgZEzk7RRGcf28hXUZ8FEgT8dswbFIOjsTwJRNNt72uAPTs8Mki3QwuSPuaVdS47I3PWztn1S9cP4BMrPNV2o3q8mzgtthao8__2NRe5nZQYMiZQO-E9gPKQ9rg9sfKDH2bTRSP98PTHHi_XrE_qfM7ZmWPNPzdLrUwbneOHQS4VIksYFwfpRzAyHsNoICirMCY6Dhcvjc9ADQXE%3D)
_Image courtesy of National Review_
If you want to know how well the Biden administration is doing, just look at the records it’s breaking.

The latest record broken? The highest [inflation rate in 30 years](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=123b8db396184f228409027016553278&_e=nRLlcYw1MU_L7CsUM2TAhmjPE5lqN05QivqiZAzkqjBZR1vR-i0Sj2vl0e8pmbzf76tMwVtE5kmN0z4bIQIIRrD4Hj1b1f4rdi0gRxPreMdlHLu323ZyIYUjTAjf3-dKrZ4CPaz35gMucCKvIcPPube4k_ap6z92ENKwznIzqEOmrjp1X9qxJsYJD492QUUcoht4bx16R3yid5Cwk_zgHwlz33sMWB3XPBwyswoSAZpTfvixgS4kR4bIzZddVPxXtMkov86k8pk1qBP0Ag3Cy9qqHDd_vBg9Dn8ohtjCvvlOrc80ljv8-DiEwJnfxm_GNFRyH5i4B5XabenQZ2ckCoCSz2oFa6YK3zpYXLd2pHE%3D). What does this mean for hardworking Americans?

I’m sure you’ve noticed the difference in [your bill](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=123b8db396184f228409027016553278&_e=nRLlcYw1MU_L7CsUM2TAhnTgW2AXa3E5c0LoKLct8Y87MN1KBVXtSAUF9ut8CGMBj_fw4oc16nf5Ho6tIIJIaYtvtYZfJ-nWroG40fvxqX0hizFh6daV9JVaxrLMAG59f6loqNXXP1uOCNnZNStxOWEE3zQHMdTMNDV6c1t6RMyCUHA3ffasCzq9bgnJjQ2oOlrjm88AkCfAQGO25L6PuNcFz5CYM2cqM6fgdgU3r55_EZTzxURix7DITbK-fpHjiOGRYucg8sOwmZWIU8gCrsND1AkSEpfEroXnAbXaoYAbnD8aZR1P7-neGGbiWWUAljJKELfV21lssLUkk8VwyWUGRwfvO3iiZXSoUzgn6VaiJxxcejrpCj2-OGh6fm0k) at the grocery store and gas station. Gas, bacon, eggs, baby food, baby clothes, cars, televisions, appliances, and fuel — they are all noticeably more [expensive](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=123b8db396184f228409027016553278&_e=nRLlcYw1MU_L7CsUM2TAhl-Ppdre9LPDYIvyBFgHso0bxm_leBZHINmSJoS5UejIlwgSishhJSZpkUf4lEi0SlrmsfheHmTVOwDV3XVkCmCy45KX3ozAiVFp13toLmvIimGCvrBsLxmVLZVBuQlg1AaMPhKMOgriXc-I4-BBe73sMcOPCDswzeLuhcP_dE-ohofYGwHsdCyw4W62eIp4dGf9EjHX8foWkvAgMIkPEhrZK-TMqXF4D7Yk2zn8aIN-_hJRnhiYqO0N8wzpVit5EiG8r82PQNCjr0d_jf29Mq8YKTmoFsxPTCv1ieewNeskWqqw6e_xIel8GFpHZ-PN6to4gjQYGTyYTo7GPEXb_mRbYYCFCVMDIn2e9b0IMjYxRz1LrcYO1pha1p-KeMJ8gVXigb2lHcl0LA3Ym6sf9-8%3D).

And what’s Biden doing about all this? He’s about to sign yet _another_ [trillion-dollar spending bill](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=123b8db396184f228409027016553278&_e=nRLlcYw1MU_L7CsUM2TAhsYe7iyM5dtNVc4_2CxhaMNA6v3JRk3--azNaHFDB83lxM6X6vTgVEOVz7cf7PgILxnxkHEKZxubphjSxaK_yT5znQKizZMuxh65sJazK2-j59e_BbDQ5ugLB6iGkoqS3LmLtNn2VDpzY_wR5TwYi-YLgXwyI-AVA31uuuHI_hbGpJv8yT_UM9SoFIkIMy77dyeYOsHowHstjom6Kc9UerYm_3diLva2Pr6xKAXaec8MiMPYMbVGFSHthUWP5UhaY4rzkpjKqzZyxIPERo535cBmdZvFyD5r9BfiFHIovmG7z8D6fUloqoBcT-I82RMwIwYemgJ-6X0RIfM6s4qIRnc%3D) and is considering canceling yet _another_ [pipeline](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=123b8db396184f228409027016553278&_e=nRLlcYw1MU_L7CsUM2TAhnTgW2AXa3E5c0LoKLct8Y-P0jPHbemsbNWeXyvtcfBeny7uDq1-lvgDcl2uwboqTQJngA54ByWGkHt276XcT6uSlKV2vjyzkzkl75ICC5wIOSX0QBokdwV4MouTSxaEJGEtkhACwmS3LU61r4tsAIORXUHmkEijEweQdQw08D_9O2TehoaDxad6GbVaC_dBVTv0d8sGxZBWPNtLRizZkeSvepAvrpKuv8E1PXNHSRhPlmifIYG71H9reUdKnQvScNJqYKvm92ivbOM1W_afa8ggrCEZtJmy6n8pjxr7JaA7caIgdyhILwvgJs2eVSoLMd71KfhMehhi-5YqBKp8Dss%3D). These misguided measures will only fuel the flames of inflation and send our costs through the proverbial roof.

Biden spent months [denying](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=123b8db396184f228409027016553278&_e=nRLlcYw1MU_L7CsUM2TAhu-4iSF86-VZs8ZOHhVIPx2f4K4SMZ2xdE9p8WaVlE-pLNYfH6cKNpEulPmRv5uWK69fXtc2oham-yuKo1iQNuaNBq2QpTZmhR1sXpOvJrdOJN4fJzQlrgS0V5xIKTXwsfp8FSktJ25KwcTKnlsqJFP-FD_6VW1LscFsmayy1O8m41bqHq538H3s-re5M8zlj1ZjP3z1bXu-McQhRdT_mz_883oMPuSLpAguyvdMMkXy8o9E1O-NWA-f8gmFVshbPg6VekFyC5SjHV0xqM1Wztd52XIE_P7LjTqrpetlc_J7M4Oaw3_v_hr8FzuVRPZLgTrZ8Flpxtzpfh5rJm2r0mM%3D) America had an inflation problem. One thing is clear: if we’re going to get our economy under control and protect hardworking Americans, **Republicans need to retake Congress in 2022.**

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=123b8db396184f228409027016553278&_e=nRLlcYw1MU_L7CsUM2TAhvqhGrGNY1Hay8sEDsOwGjJw8h7bARj_9wL3SqYGRSnnMvMNhABxtEI5Pu44WUsVUimRAPaWvDuA4gIGXJeU7QcSuyw2yqAj9QneX_2IKSpzavPIo_iDIA86CDX7Y5E4KeSY7whxwBsKAkUqLgTo5-HdOfndTbbO_lxztW0gVodMFnbk1MWYK1GANlZeQa4cMbQxzRECnqnYCjyiPpcBRAsiLOFQuNoKk-ZnRy-uAN_Q_RUaAr5fczDJ_slMqQy6Ac5SfwwaS8AY5gTXmIPJBzrA_xXKUxcxkWGnrL2RoNec2yM6K8f2qQtNRpzSpJT56Q5iuYqtDOQWQj5AD86Vq8w%3D)
Staff Sergeant Ryan Knauss, a Corryton, Tennessee native, died serving his country during the Afghanistan withdrawal. His legacy will forever be his service, his bravery, and his ability to make fellow Tennesseans proud.

This week, we honored Ryan’s service by breaking ground on a pedestrian bridge at Ryan’s alma mater, Gibbs High School that will bear his name. The bridge will cross over Tazewell Pike — a busy road that has seen too many accidents. This way, Ryan’s memory will stay with us and he will continue protecting people long after he is gone.
